items.title_en: Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS
items.title_zh: 摩托罗拉宣布与 GrapheneOS 基金会达成合作
items.summary_en: Motorola teams up with the GrapheneOS Foundation to focus on security-hardened Android foundations and open-source collaboration. The move could influence future device security updates, transparency, and baseline protections across Motorola hardware.
items.summary_zh: 摩托罗拉与 GrapheneOS 基金会达成合作，表明在 Android 安全加固与开源协作方面的重点。此举可能影响未来的安全更新、透明度以及硬件基础安全特性的建立。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo
items.title_zh: 苹果推出 MacBook Neo
items.summary_en: Apple officially launches MacBook Neo, a budget-friendly model powered by A18 Pro, targeting students and light workloads. The device promises improved energy efficiency and a more accessible gateway into Apple's ecosystem, potentially expanding its mass-market share.
items.summary_zh: 苹果正式推出 MacBook Neo，搭载 A18 Pro 芯片，定位入门级，面向学生与轻量级工作。新机承诺提升能效并降低入门门槛，或对苹果在大众市场的份额产生积极影响。

items.title_en: Microgpt
items.title_zh: MicroGPT：轻量级 GPT 的新思路
items.summary_en: A compact framework for running GPT-like agents on modest hardware. Emphasizes modular tooling, lightweight memory, and efficient orchestration to enable on-device AI and edge applications. This approach could lower barriers to deploying autonomous AI in real-world products.
items.summary_zh: 提出在中等算力设备上运行 GPT 风格代理的紧凑框架。强调模块化工具、轻量级内存和高效编排，以实现边缘设备上的 AI 自主执行。该思路可能降低在真实产品中部署自治 AI 的门槛。

items.title_en: Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns
items.title_zh: Meta 的 AI 智能眼镜与数据隐私担忧
items.summary_en: Meta's AI glasses spark privacy debates as workers report pervasive sensing and potential data collection. The piece weighs the balance between convenience and surveillance, and what it means for corporate wearables and future AR devices.
items.summary_zh: Meta 的 AI 智能眼镜引发隐私争议，员工反映设备在日常使用中存在广泛感知和潜在数据收集。文章讨论便利性与监控之间的权衡，以及这类企业级穿戴设备和未来 AR 设备的治理含义。

items.title_en: The Xkcd thing, now interactive
items.title_zh: XKCD 的东西，现在可交互
items.summary_en: An interactive rendition of an XKCD concept demonstrates how comics-inspired ideas can translate into interactive web experiences.
items.summary_zh: XKCD 的某个知名梗现已实现交互版本，展示了幽默内容与互动界面的结合，以及童趣式的 UI 实验。

items.title_en: Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable
items.title_zh: 摩托罗拉的 GrapheneOS 设备将支持解锁与重新锁定引导加载程序
items.summary_en: Motorola's GrapheneOS devices will support bootloader unlock and relock, restoring user control over the device's software stack while keeping the security workflow intact. This enables custom ROM flashing and safer recovery paths, aligned with GrapheneOS's privacy and hardening goals. It also tests how manufacturers balance openness with enterprise security expectations.
items.summary_zh: 摩托罗拉的 GrapheneOS 设备将支持解锁并重新锁定引导加载程序，重新赋予用户对软件栈的控制，同时保持安全更新流程完备。此举让刷入自定义 ROM 和更安全的设备恢复成为可能，与 GrapheneOS 的隐私与强化安全目标相契合。也反映出厂商在开放性与企业安全之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Global warming has accelerated significantly
items.title_zh: 全球变暖显著加速
items.summary_en: New measurements show the pace of global warming has accelerated beyond prior projections, delivering record-high temperatures and more frequent extreme weather events. The finding underscores the urgency for rapid decarbonization and climate-tech innovation.
items.summary_zh: 最新数据显示全球变暖速率显著加快，突破以往预测，伴随创纪录高温和更频繁的极端天气。该发现凸显了迅速降低碳排放和推动气候科技创新的紧迫性。

items.title_en: British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time
items.title_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省永久采用夏令时
items.summary_en: British Columbia will permanently observe daylight time, ending seasonal clock changes. The move aims to simplify scheduling and energy planning, but could complicate activities tied to daylight patterns and cross-border coordination with the US and other provinces.
items.summary_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省将永久采用夏令时，取消季节性时钟调整。此举旨在简化日程与能源规划，但可能让依赖日照模式的活动和跨境协调变得更复杂。

items.title_en: “Microslop” filtered in the official Microsoft Copilot Discord server
items.title_zh: 官方 Copilot Discord 服务器屏蔽“Microslop”一词
items.summary_en: Microsoft blocks the term 'Microslop' in its Copilot Discord server, then locks the channel after backlash. The incident underscores tensions between branding, community moderation, and how corporate AI products are managed in public spaces.
items.summary_zh: 微软在官方 Copilot Discord 服务器屏蔽了“Microslop”一词，遭遇反对后又封锁服务器。此事件凸显品牌控制、社区治理以及在公开场合管理企业 AI 产品的张力。

items.title_en: Judge orders government to begin refunding more than $130B in tariffs
items.title_zh: 法官命令政府开始退还超过1300亿美元的关税
items.summary_en: A judge ordered the government to begin refunding more than $130 billion in tariffs collected over the years, a move that could ease costs for importers and reshape trade dynamics. The ruling may accelerate how swiftly refunds are processed and influence ongoing tariff policy debates.
items.summary_zh: 法官命令政府开始退还累计超过1300亿美元的关税。这笔退款将减轻进口商成本，并可能重塑关税政策的执行节奏与相关讨论。

items.title_en: Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise
items.title_zh: 维基百科因大规模管理员账户被入侵而进入只读模式
items.summary_en: Mass admin account compromise forced Wikipedia into read-only mode to protect content integrity. The incident underscores the risk of credential breaches in high-privilege accounts and the need for rapid incident response, MFA enforcement, and auditing for large collaborative platforms.
items.summary_zh: 大量管理员账户被入侵，迫使维基百科进入只读模式以防止进一步编辑。此事件凸显高权限账户安全风险，以及快速处置、强制多因素认证和审计的重要性，尤其对大型协作型百科平台。

items.title_en: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
items.title_zh: 我60岁了，Claude Code 重燃了我的热情
items.summary_en: A 60-year-old coder shares how Claude Code rekindled their love for programming, illustrating AI copilots' potential to re-engage seasoned developers. It spotlights the human dimension of AI-assisted work and the value of reusable, long‑term motivation.
items.summary_zh: 一位60岁程序员分享，Claude Code 重燃了他对编程的热情，体现 AI 辅助工具在激励老练开发者方面的潜力。也提醒我们，AI 助手的价值在于激发人们对长期学习与创作的热情。

items.title_en: Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions
items.title_zh: 科技行业就业现状显著低于2008年和2020年衰退期
items.summary_en: Tech labor market deteriorated more sharply than during the 2008 financial crisis or the 2020 recession, with hiring slowdowns and rising layoffs across the sector. The trend raises questions about demand for tech talent, AI adoption, and policy responses.
items.summary_zh: 科技行业的就业市场比2008年金融危机或2020年衰退期间更为疲弱，出现招聘放缓和裁员增加。这一趋势引发对技术需求、AI应用和政策应对的担忧。

items.title_en: GPT-5.4
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 发布
items.summary_en: OpenAI releases GPT-5.4 with iterative improvements focused on safety, efficiency, and alignment for enterprise use. The update signals ongoing maturation of the GPT family as companies increasingly rely on AI assistants for critical workflows.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4，强调在安全性、效率和对齐方面的改进，面向企业应用场景。此更新体现了 GPT 系列的持续成熟，以及企业对 AI 助手在关键工作流中的依赖增加。

items.title_en: I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services
items.title_zh: 我不愿意在任何在线服务上验证身份或年龄
items.summary_en: Verifying identity or age has become a friction point in many online services, and I’m reluctant to do it. The post argues that invasive KYC checks erode privacy and push users away, and it hints at privacy-preserving alternatives and the broader trend toward minimal verification.
items.summary_zh: 在线服务对身份/年龄的验证日益增多，造成用户体验负担。该文指出强制性的身份核验侵蚀隐私、抑制使用意愿，并探讨更隐私友好的身份认证替代方案以及数字身份的未来趋势。

items.title_en: Google Workspace CLI
items.title_zh: Google Workspace 命令行工具
items.summary_en: The Google Workspace CLI project provides a command-line interface for automating and scripting Workspace admin tasks. It enables developers to manage users, drive configurations, and integrate with existing CI/CD workflows. The move aligns with a broader push to make cloud admin workflows more programmable.
items.summary_zh: Google Workspace CLI 提供了用于自动化和脚本化管理任务的命令行界面，方便开发者对用户、配置等执行操作并集成到 CI/CD 流水线。此举体现云端管理工作流向可编程化的趋势，提升运维效率。

items.title_en: 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips
items.title_zh: Firefox 崩溃中有 10% 由位翻转引发
items.summary_en: Reports that about 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips in memory, underscoring the impact of hardware faults on software reliability. The finding motivates better error handling, ECC memory use, and robust testing for resilience.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示约 10% 的 Firefox 崩溃由内存位翻转引起，凸显硬件故障对软件可靠性的影响。该发现促使加强错误处理、使用 ECC 内存以及提高容错测试。

items.title_en: Nobody gets promoted for simplicity
items.title_zh: 没人因为简单而升职
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that promotions in many tech organizations reward complexity and visibility rather than keeping systems simple. The author points to entrenched incentives that favor adding features, optimization, or risk-taking over clean, minimal design. The takeaway is to prioritize clarity, reliability, and lean architectures to unlock long-term value and career advancement.
items.summary_zh: 一篇观点文章认为，许多科技组织的晋升机制偏向复杂性和可见度，而非坚持简单设计。作者指出习以成年的激励让人们更重视增添功能、优化和冒险，而不是追求清晰、稳定的系统。核心信息是，长远价值来自清晰、可靠、简化的架构，有助于职业发展的提升。

items.title_en: MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max
items.title_zh: 搭载全新 M5 Pro 与 M5 Max 的 MacBook Pro
items.summary_en: Apple introduces the MacBook Pro with the new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, signaling another generational leap in performance and efficiency. Pro workflows like 3D rendering, video editing, and ML workloads should see meaningful speedups, with improved energy efficiency and media acceleration.
items.summary_zh: 苹果推出搭载全新 M5 Pro/Max 的 MacBook Pro，预示性能与能效进入新一代。3D 渲染、视频编辑和机器学习等专业工作流有望显著提速，同时提升媒体处理能力与续航表现。

items.title_en: Ghostty – Terminal Emulator
items.title_zh: Ghostty 终端模拟器
items.summary_en: Ghostty is a modern terminal emulator project aimed at boosting UX with features like multi-tab support and performance improvements. For power users, a refined terminal experience can significantly boost productivity across desktop and mobile workflows.
items.summary_zh: Ghostty 是一个面向提升用户体验的现代终端模拟器项目，可能包含多标签等功能和性能改进。对资深开发者而言，优化的终端体验能显著提升桌面与移动工作流程的生产力。

items.title_en: System76 on Age Verification Laws
items.title_zh: System76 对年龄验证法的看法
items.summary_en: System76 argues that age-verification requirements risk privacy and accessibility for users and developers, potentially burdening open-source hardware and software ecosystems. The post calls for balanced policy that protects vulnerable users without stifling innovation.
items.summary_zh: System76 指出年龄验证要求可能侵犯隐私、降低可访问性，并给开源硬件和软件生态带来额外负担。文中呼吁在保护脆弱用户与不扼杀创新之间实现政策平衡。

items.title_en: Claude's Cycles [pdf]
items.title_zh: Claude 的循环（PDF）
items.summary_en: Stanford/Knuth-hosted paper examines cycles in Claude, offering formal analysis and possibly algorithmic insights. It presents a theoretical exploration of repetitive structures in Claude’s context, with formal proofs or demonstrations. The work contributes to understanding computational cycles and their implications in Claude’s framework.
items.summary_zh: 这份由斯坦福/ Knuth 团队整理的论文探讨了 Claude 中的循环现象，给出形式化分析与潜在的算法洞见。内容聚焦 Claude 语境下的重复结构，包含证明或演示。该研究有助于理解计算循环及其在 Claude 框架中的意义。

items.title_en: Dario Amodei calls OpenAI’s messaging around military deal ‘straight up lies’
items.title_zh: Dario Amodei 指出 OpenAI 就军事交易的表述是直截了当的谎言
items.summary_en: Anthropic's CEO Dario Amodei criticized OpenAI's public messaging about a military deal as 'straight up lies'. The comment underscores tension around AI governance, defense partnerships, and corporate communications. It spotlights how leadership dynamics can shape perceptions of strategic collaborations.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的首席执行官 Dario Amodei 指出 OpenAI 就军事交易的公开表述是直截了当的谎言。该评论凸显了 AI 治理、国防伙伴关系与企业传播之间的紧张关系，也反映出高层决策对外部认知的影响。

items.title_en: Something is afoot in the land of Qwen
items.title_zh: Qwen 领域有新动向
items.summary_en: Activity around Qwen, a notable AI model family, hints at new releases, integrations, or benchmarks. The update signals continued momentum in Chinese-language AI communities and open-source ecosystems, with potential implications for model competitiveness and ecosystem engagement.
items.summary_zh: 围绕知名 AI 模型家族 Qwen 的动向显示出新版本、集成或基准测试的迹象，体现中文 AI 社区与开源生态的持续势头，可能影响模型竞争力及生态参与度。

items.title_en: Building a new Flash
items.title_zh: 在 Newgrounds 上打造全新 Flash 替代品
items.summary_en: A project aims to build a new Flash-like experience on modern platforms, reviving the classic animation and game ecosystem from the old web. It highlights the community's desire for open, accessible tooling and the challenges of sustaining a Flash-era ecosystem in today’s tech landscape.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目旨在在现代平台上打造类似 Flash 的全新体验，以复兴旧网页时代的动画和游戏生态。它凸显社区对开放、易获取工具的渴望，以及在当今技术环境中维持 Flash 时代生态所面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Plasma Bigscreen – 10-foot interface for KDE plasma
items.title_zh: Plasma Bigscreen：KDE Plasma 的十英尺界面
items.summary_en: An experimental KDE project to bring the desktop experience to a 10-foot living-room interface. It explores TV-friendly navigation, remote input, and media-centric workflows that reimagine the desktop for large screens.
items.summary_zh: KDE 团队在尝试将桌面体验扩展到十英尺的客厅界面，聚焦电视友好型导航、遥控输入以及以媒体为中心的工作流，重新定义大屏幕上的桌面使用方式。

items.title_en: The L in "LLM" Stands for Lying
items.title_zh: LLM 中的 L 代表撒谎
items.summary_en: Argues that large language models frequently produce incorrect or deceptive outputs, challenging developers to evaluate reliability and trust.
items.summary_zh: 认为大型语言模型经常产生不正确或误导性的输出，敦促开发者评估可靠性与信任度。文章探讨模型能力与真实度之间的权衡，以及从业者应当衡量的指标。

items.title_en: /e/OS is a complete, fully “deGoogled” mobile ecosystem
items.title_zh: /e/OS 是一个完整、完全去谷歌化的移动生态系统
items.summary_en: The e Foundation positions /e/OS as a fully de-Googled mobile ecosystem with privacy-first apps and open-source approaches, aiming to rival mainstream platforms while retaining broad app compatibility.
items.summary_zh: /e/OS 被描述为一个完整的去谷歌化移动生态，强调隐私优先的应用与开源替代，力求在保持应用兼容的同时挑战主流平台。

items.title_en: Where things stand with the Department of War
items.title_zh: 战争部进展情况
items.summary_en: Anthropic provides an update on its collaboration framed as the 'Department of War' program, outlining milestones, security measures, and engagements with government partners. The update highlights how safety and governance considerations shape public-sector AI deployments.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 提供了关于名为“战争部”的项目的最新进展，概述了关键里程碑、安全措施以及与政府伙伴的合作。更新强调了安全治理在公共部门 AI 部署中的作用。

items.title_en: A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines
items.title_zh: 一个 GitHub 问题标题被劫持，影响约4千台开发者机器
items.summary_en: A blog suggests that a crafted GitHub issue title could trigger an injection in an AI-assisted workflow, potentially compromising thousands of developer machines. The post underscores the need for input sanitization, strict tool boundaries, and provenance verification when AI is integrated with code hosting.
items.summary_zh: 一篇博文指出，通过设计的 GitHub issue 标题可能在 AI 助手工作流中触发命令注入，进而影响数千名开发者的机器。此事强调在将 AI 与代码托管服务结合使用时需加强输入过滤、边界控制和来源可信度的验证。

items.title_en: An interactive map of Flock Cams
items.title_zh: Flock 摄像头互动地图
items.summary_en: A map visualizes the locations and coverage of Flock’s camera network, providing transparency into surveillance tech used in public or semi-public spaces. It raises privacy considerations, as more data about camera placement becomes publicly accessible. The project demonstrates how mapping can contextualize safety tech in communities.
items.summary_zh: 一张地图展示了 Flock 摄像头网络的分布与覆盖范围，使公众能够更直观看到用于公共或半公共空间的监控技术。随之而来的，是对隐私的关切，因为摄像头布点等信息更加透明可见。该项目展示了如何通过地图来理解和评估社区中的安防技术。

items.title_en: How to talk to anyone and why you should
items.title_zh: 如何和任何人交谈以及为何要这样做
items.summary_en: A practical guide to conversations, focusing on initiating talks, reading social cues, and building rapport, underscoring soft skills as essential alongside technical prowess.
items.summary_zh: 一份实用的交谈指南，聚焦于如何开启对话、解读社交信号与建立融洽关系，强调软技能在技术能力之上的重要性。

items.title_en: Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team
items.title_zh: 与 Anthropic 红队联合加强 Firefox 安全
items.summary_en: Mozilla recruited Anthropic's red team to test Firefox against adversarial threats, uncovering vulnerabilities and proposing hardening strategies. The effort demonstrates how external red-team exercises can raise browser security in a era of AI-assisted attacks.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 邀请 Anthropic 红队对 Firefox 进行对抗性测试，揭示漏洞并提出加固策略。此举展示了在 AI 驱动威胁日益猖獗的背景下，外部红队演练如何提升浏览器安全性。

items.title_en: Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs
items.title_zh: 喜欢‘协同范式’的员工可能不适合本职工作
items.summary_en: A Cornell piece suggests that teams heavy on buzzwords like synergizing paradigms may underperform, emphasizing concrete problem-solving over abstract rhetoric. The message resonates in tech culture where clear outcomes beat grand metaphors.
items.summary_zh: Cornell 的研究称，过分依赖“协同范式”等空洞术语的员工可能业绩不佳，强调解决问题的具体性比空谈更重要。这一观点在科技团队中尤为相关。

items.title_en: Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes
items.title_zh: Ars Technica 因 AI 造假引发的争议解雇记者
items.summary_en: A journalist is fired after allegations that quotes attributed to AI were fabricated. The incident underscores the need for rigorous verification when using AI in journalism and the ethics of AI-assisted reporting.
items.summary_zh: 因涉及 AI 捏造引述的争议，记者被解雇。这一事件凸显在新闻报道中使用 AI 时，需进行严格的核实与伦理考量，以及对AI生成内容的信任风险。

items.title_en: US economy unexpectedly sheds 92k jobs in February
items.title_zh: 二月美国经济意外减少9.2万个工作岗位
items.summary_en: February payroll data surprised to the downside, shedding about 92,000 jobs as hiring cooled across sectors. The softer labor market could influence Fed policy expectations and AI-driven productivity gains.
items.summary_zh: 二月就业数据意外下降约9.2万个岗位，招聘在各领域放缓。这一趋势可能影响美联储的货币政策预期，并对 AI 驱动的生产力成长路径产生影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch
items.title_zh: Show HN：我用从零开始构建的语音代理实现低于 500 ms 的延迟
items.summary_en: A self-built voice agent achieves sub-500ms latency end-to-end, with architecture details and benchmarks that illustrate practical latency optimization in real-time AI.
items.summary_zh: 作者自建语音代理，端到端延迟低于 500 ms，并分享架构与基准测试要点，展示在语音 AI 堆栈中压缩延迟的可行路径。

items.title_en: Good software knows when to stop
items.title_zh: 好软件知道何时该停下来
items.summary_en: A piece argues for restraint in software, warning against feature creep and unnecessary complexity. Focus on reliability, security, and maintainability—letting tools do a few things well rather than many mediocre ones.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张软件开发需要克制，反对无休止的功能堆叠与复杂性。强调以可靠性、安保和可维护性为核心，让工具专注做好几件事，而不是堆砌大量功能。

items.title_en: Agentic Engineering Patterns
items.title_zh: 代理式工程模式
items.summary_en: A primer on building AI-assisted systems using agentic patterns—designs that orchestrate agents, prompts, and tools to perform complex tasks. The piece outlines practical patterns to balance autonomy, reliability, and controllability as AI agents collaborate with software.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用代理式模式构建 AI 辅助系统的方法，强调通过代理、提示与工具的协同来完成复杂任务。提出在自主性、可靠性与可控性之间取得平衡的实用设计模式。

items.title_en: I'm losing the SEO battle for my own open source project
items.title_zh: 我在自己的开源项目的 SEO 竞争中落败
items.summary_en: A prominent open-source maintainer laments SEO challenges and discovers that organic search visibility can dwarf good code. The post outlines why docs, SEO hygiene, and credible references matter for discoverability and offers pragmatic steps to improve search presence.
items.summary_zh: 这位开源项目维护者对 SEO 竞争发出感叹，指出良好的代码并不必然带来可观的搜索能见度。文中强调文档、SEO 规范和可信引用在发现性中的重要性，并给出提升搜索存在感的实用建议。

items.title_en: Decision trees – the unreasonable power of nested decision rules
items.title_zh: 决策树：嵌套决策规则的强大力量
items.summary_en: Nested decision rules let a decision tree encode nuanced logic with transparent paths, but depth can make them unwieldy. With careful structure and pruning, they remain a practical tool for governable, explainable rules even as data-driven models rise.
items.summary_zh: 嵌套决策规则使决策树能够以透明的路径表达细致的逻辑，但深度增加会使其变得难以维护。通过合适的结构和剪枝，它仍然是可解释性强、可治理的规则工具，即便在数据驱动模型盛行时也有用。

items.title_en: Physics Girl: Super-Kamiokande – Imaging the sun by detecting neutrinos [video]
items.title_zh: Physics Girl：通过探测中微子成像太阳的 Super-Kamiokande【视频】
items.summary_en: A physics explainer video on how the Super-Kamiokande detector images the Sun by detecting neutrinos, illustrating how particle physics probes solar processes. The video translates complex detector science into intuition about neutrino astronomy and why it matters for understanding fusion in the Sun.
items.summary_zh: 该视频讲解通过探测中微子来成像太阳，展示大规模探测器如何揭示太阳的核聚变过程。内容将高能物理与天文学交汇，帮助理解中微子天文学的重要性。

items.title_en: CBP tapped into the online advertising ecosystem to track peoples’ movements
items.title_zh: CBP 借助在线广告数据生态系统追踪民众活动
items.summary_en: Reveals CBP’s use of the online advertising ecosystem to track movements, raising privacy and civil liberties concerns. The finding spotlights how commercial data flows enable government surveillance and the need for policy guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 揭示海关执法机构利用在线广告生态系统追踪民众行动，引发隐私与公民自由担忧。强调商业数据流对政府监控的作用及需要政策约束。

items.title_en: No right to relicense this project
items.title_zh: 无权重新授权此项目
items.summary_en: Discusses licensing rights around relicensing a project, arguing that the author cannot unilaterally relicense without consent or that relicensing rights are contested. The post underscores how licensing choices affect community adoption and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 探讨关于对一个项目进行再授权的许可权问题，认为作者在未获得同意的情况下不能单方面改变授权，或指出再授权权利存在争议。文章强调许可选择会影响社区采纳与协作。

items.title_en: Lenovo’s new ThinkPads score 10/10 for repairability
items.title_zh: Lenovo 新 ThinkPads 获得维修性满分 10/10
items.summary_en: iFixit rates Lenovo ThinkPads with a perfect 10 for repairability, signaling strong serviceability in upgradeable components and modular design. The review highlights replaceable batteries, accessible screws, and easy part swaps as durable, repair-friendly design practices.
items.summary_zh: iFixit 给出联想 ThinkPad 的维修性满分 10/10，体现其模块化设计与易于维护的部件替换性。评测强调可更换电池、易于打开的螺丝和便捷的部件更换等特性。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Please restrict new accounts from posting
items.title_zh: Ask HN：请限制新账户发帖
items.summary_en: Ask HN asks for restricting new accounts from posting, touching on moderation, spam suppression, and the trade-offs of gating new users.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN 提出限制新账户发帖的设想，涉及版面治理、垃圾信息压制以及对新用户的门槛影响等权衡。

items.title_en: If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit?
items.title_zh: 如果 AI 写代码，会话应成为提交的一部分吗？
items.summary_en: If AI-assisted sessions influence code changes, teams may consider embedding session provenance in commits or metadata for traceability. This raises questions about reproducibility, review, and auditing of AI-influenced work.
items.summary_zh: 若 AI 辅助的编辑会影响代码变更，团队可考虑在提交中嵌入会话出处或元数据以实现可追溯性。这引发关于可复现性、审查与对 AI 影响的审计等问题。

items.title_en: The Brand Age
items.title_zh: 品牌时代
items.summary_en: Paul Graham argues that the era of branding is as crucial as product skills, shaping how startups gain trust and scale. He contends that a strong brand can unlock network effects and resilience in competitive markets.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·格雷厄姆认为品牌时代与产品能力同等重要，塑造初创企业如何获得信任和扩张。他指出强品牌能够在竞争激烈的市场中释放网络效应与韧性。

items.title_en: Everett shuts down Flock camera network after judge rules footage public record
items.title_zh: Everett 关闭 Flock 摄像头网络，法院裁定录像可公开记录
items.summary_en: A court ruling that FLOCK camera footage must become public records prompts authorities to shut down the network, highlighting tensions between surveillance, privacy, and accountability. The move underscores legal risk for city surveillance programs.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定 FLOCK 监控录像应作为公开记录，促使相关部门关闭网络，凸显监控、隐私与问责之间的紧张关系。此举凸显城市级监控项目的法律风险。

items.title_en: Jolla phone – a full-stack European alternative
items.title_zh: Jolla 手机——全栈式欧洲替代方案
items.summary_en: Jolla's phone with Sailfish OS positions a European alternative to dominant platforms, emphasizing privacy and open standards, though facing app ecosystem challenges.
items.summary_zh: Jolla 的手机以 Sailfish OS 为基础，作为对主流平台的欧洲替代，强调隐私与开放标准，但在应用生态方面仍有挑战。

items.title_en: Uploading Pirated Books via BitTorrent Qualifies as Fair Use, Meta Argues
items.title_zh: Meta 主张通过 BitTorrent 上传盗版书可构成合理使用
items.summary_en: Meta argues that uploading pirated books via BitTorrent should qualify as fair use, a stance that could reshape how courts view user-generated sharing and platform liability. The argument underscores the tension between copyright enforcement and transformative use in the digital commons.
items.summary_zh: Meta 主张通过 BitTorrent 上传盗版书籍应被认定为合理使用，这一立场如果被采纳，可能改变法院对用户分享与平台责任的判定。此举凸显数字环境中版权保护与转化性使用之间的张力。

items.title_en: LLMs work best when the user defines their acceptance criteria first
items.title_zh: 在使用大型语言模型时，先定义接受标准效果最佳
items.summary_en: Defining acceptance criteria before prompting an LLM dramatically improves reliability and repeatability, helping teams avoid hallucinations and scope creep. Practically, it encourages writing tests, constraints, and evaluation before generation.
items.summary_zh: 在提示前先定义接受标准能显著提升大语言模型输出的可靠性，减少错觉与范围漂移。实践要点包括编写测试、设置约束和评估准则，再生成结果。

items.title_en: New iPad Air, powered by M4
items.title_zh: 新款 iPad Air，搭载 M4 芯片
items.summary_en: Apple unveils a new iPad Air powered by the M4, signaling continued silicon cadence and improved performance-per-watt for mobile devices. The move reinforces Apple's silicon cadence and cross-device AI strategy.
items.summary_zh: 苹果发布搭载 M4 芯片的新款 iPad Air，意味着移动设备性能与能效的提升，并映射出苹果在各产品线统一 AI 计算与效率的策略。

items.title_en: When does MCP make sense vs CLI?
items.title_zh: 什么时候 MCP 比 CLI 更合适
items.summary_en: A comparison of when a higher-level command protocol (MCP) provides meaningful abstraction and automation over a plain CLI, and when the simplicity and direct control of a CLI wins. It emphasizes tradeoffs like readability, scripting, and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在何种场景下更高层的命令协议 MCP 能带来对比简单 CLI 更有意义的抽象与自动化，以及何时应偏好 CLI 的简单性与直接控制。强调可读性、脚本化与生态成熟度等权衡。

items.title_en: Pentagon formally labels Anthropic supply-chain risk
items.title_zh: 五角大楼正式将 Anthropic 供应链风险列为重点关注
items.summary_en: The Pentagon formally flags Anthropic's supply-chain risk, signaling heightened scrutiny of AI vendors used in defense contexts. The designation could affect contracts, compliance requirements, and risk mitigation measures across the defense AI ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼正式将 Anthropic 的供应链风险列为重点关注对象，表明对用于防务领域的 AI 供应商将进行更严格审查。这一认定可能影响防务 AI 生态中的合同、合规要求与风险管理措施。

items.title_en: Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine)
items.title_zh: 在2025年不用引擎也能做游戏
items.summary_en: The piece argues that solo developers can still ship modern games in 2025 without relying on traditional game engines, by leveraging modern tooling, custom pipelines, and lightweight frameworks. It discusses practical workflows, asset management, and performance considerations that enable indie developers to compete.
items.summary_zh: 文章论述在 2025 年，个人开发者无需传统引擎也能制作现代游戏，依赖现代工具、定制管线与轻量级框架。内容聚焦实际工作流、资源管理与性能考量，展示独立开发者的可行路径。

items.title_en: Proton Mail Helped FBI Unmask Anonymous 'Stop Cop City' Protester
items.title_zh: Proton Mail 曾帮助 FBI 识别匿名 Stop Cop City 抗议者
items.summary_en: Proton Mail reportedly assisted the FBI in identifying an anonymous Stop Cop City protester, drawing privacy concerns about metadata leakage and law-enforcement access. The case prompts renewed debate over encrypted services and user anonymity.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，Proton Mail 协助 FBI 识别了一名匿名 Stop Cop City 抗议者，引发对元数据暴露与执法机构访问的隐私担忧。此事促使人们重新讨论加密服务与用户匿名性的边界。

items.title_en: TikTok will not introduce end-to-end encryption, saying it makes users less safe
items.title_zh: TikTok 不引入端到端加密，称这会让用户更不安全
items.summary_en: TikTok states it will not implement end-to-end encryption, arguing it could endanger users or complicate moderation, while privacy advocates push for stronger encryption. The stance underscores the ongoing tension between user safety, regulatory compliance, and privacy on popular social apps.
items.summary_zh: TikTok 表示不采用端对端加密，理由是可能危及用户安全或让内容审核更复杂。此立场凸显在流行社交应用中，隐私、合规与安全之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: MacBook Air with M5
items.title_zh: 搭载 M5 的 MacBook Air
items.summary_en: Apple unveils a new MacBook Air powered by the M5, signaling a lightweight yet capable option for portable work with improved CPU/GPU performance and efficiency. Expect better battery life and a thinner, fanless or quiet design, depending on the model.
items.summary_zh: 苹果推出配备 M5 的新款 MacBook Air，强调轻薄便携与更高效的性能。芯片升级带来更长续航和更强的处理能力，机身设计也可能更安静。

items.title_en: Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents
items.title_zh: Agent Safehouse：macOS 原生本地代理沙箱
items.summary_en: Agent Safehouse provides macOS-native sandboxing for local agents, letting autonomous tasks run in isolated environments without container overhead. By evading full containers while maintaining isolation, it reduces cross-agent risk and strengthens security for macOS automation workflows. This approach matters for developers deploying agents on Mac workstations or in Mac-centric stacks.
items.summary_zh: Agent Safehouse 提供了 macOS 原生的本地代理沙箱化，允许自主任务在相对独立的环境中运行而无需容器开销。通过在不牺牲隔离的前提下提高安全性，它降低了跨代理的风险，提升了 macOS 自动化工作流的安全性。对于在 Mac 环境中部署代理的开发者尤为相关。

items.title_en: Ki Editor - an editor that operates on the AST
items.title_zh: Ki Editor：一个在 AST 上工作的编辑器
items.summary_en: Ki Editor operates on the AST, letting you transform code by editing its syntax tree rather than raw text. This enables safer refactors and more reliable transformations across languages. It signals a shift toward AST-driven editing as a core editor capability.
items.summary_zh: Ki Editor 通过对 AST 进行操作来变更代码，而非直接编辑文本。这使重构更安全、跨语言的变换更可靠，体现了以代码结构为核心的编辑器发展方向。

items.title_en: AI Made Writing Code Easier. It Made Being an Engineer Harder
items.title_zh: AI 让写代码更容易，却让工程师更难
items.summary_en: AI reduces the burden of writing code but shifts engineering work toward maintaining, testing, and integrating AI-generated artifacts. It raises expectations and reshapes skills and team workflows in nontrivial ways.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能降低了编写代码的门槛，但将工程工作的重点转向维护、测试与集成 AI 产物。它提高了期望值，改变了技能需求和团队的工作方式。

items.title_en: Qwen3.5 Fine-Tuning Guide
items.title_zh: Qwen3.5 微调指南 - Unsloth 文档
items.summary_en: Unsloth's guide walks through practical fine-tuning of Qwen 3.5, including data selection, training steps, and safety considerations. The document helps practitioners push model behavior in controlled directions while managing budget and risk.
items.summary_zh: Unsloth 的指南讲解如何对 Qwen 3.5 进行实际微调，包括数据选择、训练步骤与安全性考量，帮助从业者在受控条件下引导模型行为，同时兼顾预算与风险管理。

items.title_en: Relicensing with AI-Assisted Rewrite
items.title_zh: AI 辅助重授权
items.summary_en: Relies on relicensing with AI-assisted rewrite to change licensing terms, exploring feasibility, ethical concerns, and legal implications. It looks at how AI tools can expedite licensing tasks, while prompting debate about originality and rights.
items.summary_zh: 探讨通过 AI 辅助重写来变更许可条款的可行性、伦理与法律含义。研究 AI 工具能否加速许可工作，同时引发对原创性与权利的讨论。

items.title_en: GPT‑5.3 Instant
items.title_zh: GPT-5.3 Instant
items.summary_en: OpenAI announces GPT-5.3 Instant, implying faster response times and efficiency improvements for developers deploying guidance or chat-powered apps. The update likely focuses on latency reductions, cost optimization, and better handling of streaming or long prompts.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 公布 GPT‑5.3 Instant，面向开发者的快速响应与更高效部署。更新的重点在于降低延迟、优化成本，以及对流式与长提示的更好处理。

items.title_en: Government grant-funded research should not be published in for-profit journals
items.title_zh: 政府资助研究不应在营利性期刊发表
items.summary_en: A column argues that publicly funded science should be published in non-profit or open venues rather than for-profit journals. It discusses how paywalls and profit motives can distort access and research dissemination. This stance aligns with ongoing debates about scientific publishing reform.
items.summary_zh: 一篇专栏认为政府资助的科研应在非营利性或开放渠道发表，而非营利性期刊。文章指出付费墙与利润动机可能扭曲信息获取与研究传播，与当前关于科学出版改革的讨论相呼应。

items.title_en: Don't become an engineering manager
items.title_zh: 别当工程经理
items.summary_en: A contrarian take on career paths in tech: becoming an engineering manager isn't necessarily the best route for every IC-focused engineer. The piece argues for choosing tracks that align with your strengths, whether people leadership or technical depth, and notes common traps of management roles.
items.summary_zh: 本篇对科技领域的职业路径提出另一种观点：并非每位具技术实力的人都应走管理路线。文章建议根据个人优势选择方向，无论是技术深度还是人员领导，并警示管理岗位的常见陷阱。

items.title_en: How to run Qwen 3.5 locally
items.title_zh: 如何在本地运行 Qwen 3.5
items.summary_en: Practical guide to running Qwen 3.5 locally, covering hardware, dependencies, and setup steps, helping users avoid cloud hosting costs.
items.summary_zh: 给出在本地运行 Qwen 3.5 的实用指南，包含硬件、依赖与搭建步骤，帮助用户降低云端托管成本。

items.title_en: FrameBook
items.title_zh: FrameBook
items.summary_en: FrameBook appears to be a project or concept named FrameBook, but specifics aren’t clear from the title alone.
items.summary_zh: “FrameBook”似乎是一个名为 FrameBook 的项目或概念，但从标题本身无法得知具体细节。

items.title_en: Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的 Cowork 功能在 macOS 上无警告地生成 10GB 虚拟机捆绑包
items.summary_en: Cowork unexpectedly creates a 10GB VM bundle on macOS, raising concerns about disk usage and UX clarity for AI-enabled developer tools.
items.summary_zh: Cowork 功能在 macOS 上意外生成 10GB 的虚拟机捆绑包，影响磁盘空间与性能，引发对开发工具 UX 和资源管理的关注。

items.title_en: this css proves me human
items.title_zh: 这段 CSS 证明我是真人
items.summary_en: A creative CSS-based approach demonstrates a canny way to distinguish humans from bots without traditional captchas, leaning into responsive layouts and styling to verify human interaction. The piece argues for UX-friendly anti-bot checks that don’t degrade accessibility.
items.summary_zh: 创新型 CSS 方法通过强调布局与交互来证明“我是人类”，避免传统验证码带来的用户摩擦。文章也讨论了无障碍与 UX 的权衡。

items.title_en: Yoghurt delivery women combatting loneliness in Japan
items.title_zh: 日本的酸奶外送女工缓解孤独
items.summary_en: Yoghurt delivery workers in Japan provide regular visits that double as social contact for lonely households, turning a simple service into a lifeline. The story illustrates how community programs can alleviate loneliness and why scalable companionship solutions matter.
items.summary_zh: 日本的酸奶外送工作者通过定期来访，为孤独的居民提供社交接触，将简单服务变成情感支援。报道展示社区型关怀如何缓解孤独，以及可扩展的陪伴解决方案为何重要。

items.title_en: India's top court angry after junior judge cites fake AI-generated orders
items.title_zh: 印度最高法院对下级法官引用假 AI 生成命令表示愤怒
items.summary_en: India's Supreme Court lashes out after a junior judge cited fake AI-generated orders, underscoring the risk of relying on AI for legal documents. The incident highlights the need for human checks, provenance, and trust in automated tooling within high-stakes domains.
items.summary_zh: 印度最高法院对一名初级法官引用伪造的 AI 生成命令表示愤怒，凸显在高风险领域对 AI 生成法律文书的可追溯性与人工审核的必要性。

items.title_en: Nvidia PersonaPlex 7B on Apple Silicon: Full-Duplex Speech-to-Speech in Swift
items.title_zh: NVIDIA PersonaPlex 7B 在 Apple Silicon 上实现全双工语音到语音
items.summary_en: NVIDIA PersonaPlex 7B runs on Apple Silicon with a native Swift pipeline delivering full-duplex speech-to-speech, showing how on-device ML can achieve low-latency, private voice interactions without a server.
items.summary_zh: 在 Apple Silicon 上，NVIDIA PersonaPlex 7B 通过本地 Swift 流水线实现全双工语音到语音，展示了端上机器学习在无服务器、低延迟私密语音交互中的可行性。

items.title_en: Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering
items.title_zh: Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering
items.summary_en: The first part of a reverse-engineering series delves into the M4 Neural Engine's microarchitecture, sharing experiments and hypotheses about how Apple accelerates on-device ML. The write-up helps readers gauge performance implications for on-device AI and what it means for developers optimizing models for iPhone/iPad.
items.summary_zh: 这是一系列反向工程的第一篇，揭示 M4 神经引擎的微架构，结合实验和推断来理解苹果在设备上加速机器学习的方式。文中分析了对端设备 AI 性能的影响，以及开发者在 iPhone/iPad 上优化模型时需要考虑的要点。

items.title_en: UUID package coming to Go standard library
items.title_zh: Go 标准库将新增 UUID 包
items.summary_en: Go is adding a standard UUID package, standardizing globally unique identifiers across projects. This reduces dependency drift and helps ensure consistent encoding, parsing, and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: Go 将引入标准库中的 UUID 包，统一跨项目的全局唯一标识符用法，减少依赖差异并提升互操作性。

items.title_en: Apple's 512GB Mac Studio vanishes, a quiet acknowledgment of the RAM shortage
items.title_zh: 苹果的 512GB Mac Studio 现货断货， RAM 短缺的低声表达
items.summary_en: Apple has quietly dropped the 512GB Mac Studio option, signaling how supply constraints in RAM/storage influence product lineups. The move underscores broader chip shortages affecting hardware strategies.
items.summary_zh: 苹果悄然移除 512GB Mac Studio 选项，反映出 RAM/存储供应受限对产品线的影响。这一举动揭示了芯片短缺对硬件策略的更广泛压力。

items.title_en: WebMCP is available for early preview
items.title_zh: WebMCP 提供早期预览
items.summary_en: WebMCP offers a browser-based preview of the MCP framework, signaling an accessible path for web-centric tooling and automation. Early previews hint at how developers might use modular APIs in the browser.
items.summary_zh: WebMCP 提供了基于浏览器的 MCP 框架预览，展示了面向网页工具与自动化的可访问路径。早期预览揭示了开发者在浏览器中使用模块化 API 的潜力。

items.title_en: Put the zip code first
items.title_zh: 把邮编放在首位
items.summary_en: Advocates reorganizing data workflows to prioritize ZIP codes, improving geolocation accuracy, routing, and regional targeting in logistics and commerce. The approach surface-level argues for locality-aware design and could affect privacy as ZIP-level data becomes more central.
items.summary_zh: 倡导在数据工作流中将 ZIP 码放在首位，以提升定位、路由和区域定向的精度，改善物流与商业运营。此思路强调面向地理邻近性的设计，同时也可能带来更强的隐私考量。

items.title_en: U.S. science agency moves to restrict foreign scientists from its labs
items.title_zh: 美国科学机构将限制外国科学家进入其实验室
items.summary_en: National labs adopt policies to limit foreign scientists' access amid security concerns, potentially hindering collaboration and talent pipelines in research.
items.summary_zh: 国家实验室将限制外国科学家进入实验室的政策，出于安全考虑。可能打击国际合作与人才流动，对科研生态与资助产生深远影响。

items.title_en: The changing goalposts of AGI and timelines
items.title_zh: AGI 时间线在变，未来仍未定
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AGI timelines are slippery because definitions and expectations shift; it urges clearer criteria and governance considerations.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，AGI 的时间线因定义与预期的不断变化而难以把握，呼吁对标准化评估和治理的更清晰框架。

items.title_en: First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study
items.title_zh: 胎儿期脊柱裂修复的首例体内干细胞治疗显示安全
items.summary_en: A study reports in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida appears safe, marking a promising prenatal treatment for a serious condition. Long-term efficacy remains to be seen, but this advances prenatal regenerative medicine.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示胎内干细胞治疗用于修复胎儿脊柱裂的安全性初步结果良好，标志着产前干细胞治疗的潜力。未来需要关注长期效果和伦理议题。

items.title_en: A decade of Docker containers
items.title_zh: 十年 Docker 容器的发展
items.summary_en: Docker popularized containerization and made portable environments, reproducible builds, and scalable deployments standard in modern software. Over a decade, tooling and orchestration matured, but security, performance, and complexity trade-offs persist.
items.summary_zh: Docker 让容器化成为软件交付的基石，推动了可移植环境、可重复构建与可扩展部署的常态化。十年来，工具链与编排生态不断完善，但在隔离、性能与复杂性之间的权衡仍然存在。

items.title_en: Making Firefox's right-click not suck with about:config
items.title_zh: 用 about:config 让 Firefox 右键菜单更好用
items.summary_en: Offers practical tweaks to Firefox via about:config to improve the context menu UX, such as removing clutter, enabling useful shortcuts, or restoring missing items. The tweaks illustrate how browser customization can dramatically affect daily productivity.
items.summary_zh: 提供通过 about:config 优化 Firefox 右键菜单体验的实用技巧，包括精简项、启用有用的快捷方式、恢复缺失项目等。此类自定义演示了浏览器设置对日常生产力的显著影响。

items.title_en: Helix: A post-modern text editor
items.title_zh: Helix：后现代文本编辑器
items.summary_en: Helix positions itself as a modern take on text editing, pairing modal editing with modern performance, syntax awareness, and a customizable pipeline. It challenges entrenched editors by offering a fresh UX and strong language tooling.
items.summary_zh: Helix 作为后现代文本编辑器，提供现代化的编辑体验、强大语言工具和可定制工作流，挑战传统编辑器的格局。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How to be alone?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：如何学会独处？
items.summary_en: Ask HN asks for guidance on solitude, compiling perspectives on mental health, productivity, and how to spend time alone effectively.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN：如何学会独处？汇集了关于孤独、心理健康以及独处时的高效生活方式的观点。

items.title_en: Welcome (back) to Macintosh
items.title_zh: 欢迎（回归）Macintosh
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on the enduring relevance or revival of the Macintosh ecosystem in modern computing, exploring nostalgia alongside current developer workflows.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Macintosh 生态的现状与未来，兼顾怀旧情感与当下开发者工作流的现实性。

items.title_en: “It turns out” (2010)
items.title_zh: It turns out（2010）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at a 2010 post titled It turns out and its ongoing influence on how early tech findings are discussed.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2010 年的一篇名为 It turns out 的文章及其在早期科技发现讨论方式中的持续影响。

items.title_en: Labor market impacts of AI: A new measure and early evidence
items.title_zh: AI 对劳动力市场影响的新指标与初步证据
items.summary_en: Anthropic introduces a new metric to quantify AI-related labor market effects and presents early findings showing mixed signals: some roles gain efficiency and resilience, while routine tasks face displacement. Implications for policy and workforce training are discussed.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 引入新指标来量化 AI 对劳动力市场的影响，并给出初步证据，结果呈现两极：部分岗位提升效率与韧性，常规任务存在被替代的风险。对政策与职业培训具有重要启示。

items.title_en: CasNum
items.title_zh: CasNum（化学 CAS 编号工具）
items.summary_en: CasNum is a small GitHub project by 0x0mer focused on CAS numbers used in chemistry.
items.summary_zh: CasNum 是 0x0mer 在 GitHub 上的一个小型项目，专注于化学物质的 CAS 编号。

items.title_en: iPhone 17e
items.title_zh: iPhone 17e
items.summary_en: Apple launches iPhone 17e, a likely mid-cycle update focusing on efficiency, camera, and AI features; a sign of ongoing hardware cadence.
items.summary_zh: 苹果发布 iPhone 17e，作为中期更新，可能带来新相机、芯片或人工智能相关特性，体现苹果在核心设计上的迭代策略与性价比取向。

items.title_en: Show HN: Jido 2.0, Elixir Agent Framework
items.title_zh: Show HN: Jido 2.0，Elixir Agent 框架
items.summary_en: Jido 2.0 is an Elixir-based agent framework that abstracts agent lifecycle, supervision, and messaging. The update targets more ergonomic APIs and better integration with the BEAM ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Jido 2.0 是一个基于 Elixir 的代理框架，聚焦简化代理的生命周期、监督与消息传递等能力。更新带来更友好的 API 与对 BEAM 生态的更好整合。

items.title_en: Effort to prevent government officials from engaging in prediction markets
items.title_zh: 阻止政府官员参与预测市场的努力
items.summary_en: Lawmakers push to ban federal elected officials from profiting in prediction markets to curb conflicts of interest and insider-trading risk. The move reflects growing scrutiny of how predictive markets intersect with governance and policy making.
items.summary_zh: 立法者推动禁止联邦民选官员在预测市场获利，以遏制利益冲突与内幕交易风险。这一举措反映出对预测市场在治理和政策制定中的作用日益审慎的态度。

items.title_en: New iron nanomaterial wipes out cancer cells without harming healthy tissue
items.title_zh: 新型铁纳米材料可在不伤害健康组织的情况下清除癌细胞
items.summary_en: A new iron-based nanomaterial selectively targets and destroys cancer cells while sparing healthy tissue, pointing toward targeted therapies with fewer side effects. Clinical translation will require extensive safety validation and regulatory steps.
items.summary_zh: 一种新型铁基纳米材料能选择性地攻击并清除癌细胞，同时尽量避免损伤健康组织，显示出副作用较低的靶向治疗潜力。进入临床需要全面的安全性评估与监管批准。

items.title_en: Iran War Cost Tracker
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争成本追踪器
items.summary_en: A public cost-tracker tracks the financial and human toll of Iran-related conflicts, aggregating sanctions, military spending, and civilian impact. It provides a data-driven lens on the economic burden of regional conflicts, useful for policymakers and technologists tracking macro-trends.
items.summary_zh: 一个公开的成本追踪器汇总与伊朗相关冲突的经济与人道成本，包括制裁、军费与民生影响，提供对区域冲突经济负担的数据视角，便于决策者与研究者掌握宏观趋势。

items.title_en: I ported Linux to the PS5 and turned it into a Steam Machine
items.title_zh: 把 Linux 搬到 PS5，变成了一台 Steam 机
items.summary_en: A port of Linux to the PS5 turning it into a Steam Machine demonstrates the boundaries of console openness and the appeal of hobbyist hardware hacking. It highlights what’s possible when communities push beyond stock configurations.
items.summary_zh: 作者将 Linux 移植到 PS5，并将其改造成 Steam 机器，展现了主机开放性的边界以及爱好者硬件改造的魅力。该举动揭示了社区推动下的潜在可能性。

items.title_en: Cloud VM benchmarks 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年云虚拟机基准：7 家提供商的 44 种实例性能与性价比
items.summary_en: An expansive benchmark compares 44 VM types across seven cloud providers, highlighting how performance per dollar varies across workloads from compute-heavy to memory-intensive. The findings help engineers choose cost-efficient instances and reveal that value is highly provider- and region-dependent, so the cheapest option is rarely best.
items.summary_zh: 这项涵盖七家云厂商、44种实例的基准测试，揭示不同工作负载下的性价比差异。研究帮助开发者在成本与性能之间做出取舍，并暴露出不同提供商与区域带来的价值差异，通常最便宜的选项并非最佳选择。

items.title_en: LLM Writing Tropes.md
items.title_zh: LLM 写作套路.md
items.summary_en: A catalog of common tropes and patterns when writing with large language models, including prompt strategies, narrative devices, and ethical considerations.
items.summary_zh: 整理了与大型语言模型相关的常见写作套路、提示策略、叙事手法及伦理考量，为希望用 AI 协助写作的开发者和作者提供实用指南。

items.title_en: Mullvad VPN: Banned TV Ad in the Streets of London [video]
items.title_zh: Mullvad VPN：在伦敦街头的禁播广告【视频】
items.summary_en: Mullvad VPN ran a provocative street ad in London to promote privacy, highlighting guerrilla marketing and the tension between advertising norms and privacy advocacy. The stunt underscores how privacy-focused brands push against conventional media constraints to reach audiences.
items.summary_zh: Mullvad VPN 在伦敦街头进行了一场挑衅性的广告行动，强调隐私保护并挑战传统广告规范。此举凸显以隐私为核心的品牌如何利用非常规手段触达受众。

items.title_en: Intel's make-or-break 18A process node debuts for data center with 288-core Xeon
items.title_zh: 英特尔 18A 制程首次用于数据中心，配备 288 核 Xeon
items.summary_en: Intel debuts its 18A process node for data centers with a 288-core Xeon multi-core monster, promising advances in density and efficiency with Foveros packaging and DDR5 capabilities. The launch matters for AI inference and HPC workloads, signaling how next-gen nodes aim to boost total cost of ownership for hyperscale customers.
items.summary_zh: 英特尔推出面向数据中心的 18A 制程节点，配备 288 核 Xeon，承诺在密度与能效方面带来突破，并结合 Foveros 封装与 DDR5。此举对 AI 推理与高性能计算工作负载意义重大，或降低大型云环境的总拥有成本。

items.title_en: When AI writes the software, who verifies it?
items.title_zh: 当 AI 编写软件，谁来验证它？
items.summary_en: The piece argues verification remains the hard part when AI writes software; human audits, formal methods, and reliable pipelines are needed to ensure correctness, security, and compliance. It discusses governance and the risk of relying solely on AI for critical code.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为当 AI 编写软件时，验证仍是最难的环节，需要人工审查、形式化方法与可靠的开发流程来确保正确性、安 全与合规，并讨论治理与对 AI 产出的过度信任风险。

items.title_en: LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown
items.title_zh: LibreOffice Writer 现支持 Markdown
items.summary_en: LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown, allowing users to write in Markdown and export to rich formats. This bridges traditional word processing with lightweight markup workflows, benefiting developers and technical writers who blend prose and code. It may influence how teams adopt LibreOffice for collaboration.
items.summary_zh: LibreOffice Writer 现已支持 Markdown，允许用户使用 Markdown 编写并导出为富文本格式。此举将传统文字处理与轻量级标记工作流连接起来，方便开发者和技术写作者在文本与代码之间切换。可能改变团队在协作中对 LibreOffice 的采用方式。

items.title_en: A standard protocol to handle and discard low-effort, AI-Generated pull requests
items.title_zh: 处理和丢弃低 Effort、AI 生成拉取请求的标准协议
items.summary_en: A standard protocol outlines how to handle and discard low-effort AI-generated pull requests, including labeling, human review thresholds, and criteria for auto-closure. The rule aims to keep codebases sane while leveraging AI assistance.
items.summary_zh: 一套标准协议规定如何处理和丢弃低质量的 AI 生成拉取请求，涵盖标签、人工审核门槛及自动关闭的条件，旨在在利用 AI 辅助的同时维持代码库的健康性。

items.title_en: Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc
items.title_zh: 显微镜也能读出激光光盘上的视频
items.summary_en: A quirky demonstration shows microscopic observation can reveal the video encoded on a LaserDisc by analyzing the physical grooves. The stunt illustrates how data can be recovered from old media and invites reflection on data preservation and analog-to-digital interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的演示显示，通过观察激光光盘的物理凹槽，显微镜可以还原其中的视频信息。这提醒人们关注旧媒体的数据保存与模拟到数字接口的转化。

items.title_en: Warn about PyPy being unmaintained
items.title_zh: 警告：PyPy 不再维护
items.summary_en: Discussion about flagging PyPy as unmaintained, highlighting concerns about compatibility, security, and the Python ecosystem's reliance on alternative runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 关于对 PyPy 不再维护的标注，突显兼容性、安全性与 Python 生态对替代运行时的依赖等议题。

items.title_en: RFC 9849. TLS Encrypted Client Hello
items.title_zh: TLS Encrypted Client Hello（RFC 9849）
items.summary_en: Explains RFC 9849, which encrypts the TLS ClientHello to protect metadata during handshake from passive observers. It discusses deployment considerations, compatibility, and potential performance impacts.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 RFC 9849，它在 TLS 握手阶段对 ClientHello 进行加密，以保护元数据不被被动监听者获取。讨论部署注意事项、兼容性以及潜在的性能影响。

items.title_en: Google Safe Browsing missed 84% of confirmed phishing sites
items.title_zh: Google Safe Browsing 未能拦截84%的经证实钓鱼站点
items.summary_en: A security report finds Google Safe Browsing blocked only a minority of confirmed phishing sites, leaving many attackers unblocked. The result underscores the limitations of browser-level protections and the need for additional phishing defenses.
items.summary_zh: 安全报告显示 Google Safe Browsing 未阻挡大量经证实的钓鱼站点，暴露浏览器层防护的局限性，并强调需要额外的钓鱼防护措施。

items.title_en: The government uses targeted advertising to track your location
items.title_zh: 政府利用定向广告来追踪你的位置
items.summary_en: A report details how targeted advertising enables location tracking by government actors, often via data brokers and ad tech pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 报道揭示定向广告如何通过数据代理和广告技术管道让政府追踪你的位置，暴露隐私脆弱性，并呼吁加强隐私保护。

items.title_en: Microgpt explained interactively
items.title_zh: 微型 GPT 的交互式讲解
items.summary_en: MicroGPT shows how compact language-model agents can orchestrate tools and tasks with lightweight prompts. The interactive guide walks through architecture, tradeoffs, and practical patterns for building small, efficient AI assistants. It helps developers reason about scalability and resource use when moving beyond monolithic models.
items.summary_zh: MicroGPT 展示了紧凑型语言模型代理如何通过简洁提示来编排工具和任务。互动指南带你了解架构、取舍和构建小型高效 AI 助手的实用模式，帮助开发者在从单一大模型向分布式、低资源方案演进时评估可扩展性与资源使用。

items.title_en: Moss is a pixel canvas where every brush is a tiny program
items.title_zh: Moss：每一笔刷都是小程序的像素画布
items.summary_en: Moss turns brush strokes into small programs, forming a pixel canvas. The design lets artists craft complex visuals by composing tiny algorithms, blurring the line between art and software. It showcases computation embedded directly in visual creation.
items.summary_zh: Moss 将笔触变为小程序，形成像素画布。通过把微型算法拼接来创作复杂视觉效果，模糊了艺术与软件的边界。展示了将计算直接嵌入视觉创作中的创新做法。

items.title_en: Bet on German Train Delays
items.title_zh: 在德国铁路延误上下注
items.summary_en: Launches a platform letting users bet on whether German trains will be delayed, leveraging crowd-informed predictions. The project highlights the intersection of betting markets with real-world infrastructure data, and raises questions about regulation and data quality.
items.summary_zh: 推出一个平台，允许用户对德国列车是否发生延误进行下注，利用群体预测来形成观点。该项目凸显了博彩市场与现实基础设施数据的交叉，同时也引发监管和数据质量方面的讨论。

items.title_en: OpenClaw surpasses React to become the most-starred software project on GitHub
items.title_zh: OpenClaw 超越 React，成为 GitHub 上最受欢迎的软件项目
items.summary_en: OpenClaw's star count tops React, signaling rapid community interest and the volatility of popularity in open-source projects.
items.summary_zh: OpenClaw 以星标数超过 React，成为 GitHub 上最受关注的软件项目之一，体现开源生态中新项目快速积聚热度的趋势。

items.title_en: Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting
items.title_zh: Show HN：Moongate——用 .NET 10 与 Lua 脚本的 Ultima Online 服务器模拟器
items.summary_en: Moongate is a modern Ultima Online server emulator built in .NET 10 with Lua scripting, illustrating how legacy games can be reimagined with contemporary tooling. The project showcases rapid iteration, portability, and community-driven game hosting.
items.summary_zh: Moongate 是用 .NET 10 和 Lua 脚本构建的现代版 Ultima Online 服务器模拟器，展示了用现代工具重现经典游戏的可能性。它体现了社区驱动的游戏托管、快速迭代和可移植性。

items.title_en: Right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU
items.title_zh: 将大模型大小与系统内存、CPU、显卡匹配
items.summary_en: Practical guidance on sizing and deploying LLMs to fit hardware constraints, including model selection, quantization, memory management, and offloading strategies.
items.summary_zh: 给出在硬件约束下为大模型定尺寸的实用建议，包括模型选择、量化、内存管理和卸载策略。

items.title_en: Files are the interface humans and agents interact with
items.title_zh: 文件是人类与智能体互动的界面
items.summary_en: Argument that files remain the primary interface for human-AI collaboration, with implications for reproducibility, tooling, and cognitive load.
items.summary_zh: 提出文件仍是人类与人工智能协作的核心界面，涉及可重复性、工具链和认知负担等方面的影响。

items.title_en: LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor
items.title_zh: LibreSprite：开源像素画编辑器
items.summary_en: LibreSprite is an open-source pixel art editor aimed at indie developers and hobbyists, offering sprite sheets, animation, and tilemap support. It lowers barriers to retro game creation and highlights the vitality of OSS tools for artists.
items.summary_zh: LibreSprite 是一个开源像素画编辑器，面向独立开发者和爱好者，提供精灵动画、图块和工具链。它为独立游戏开发提供了易用且可扩展的工具。

items.title_en: Libre Solar – Open Hardware for Renewable Energy
items.title_zh: Libre Solar：面向可再生能源的开源硬件
items.summary_en: Libre Solar offers open hardware designs for renewable energy, from solar charge controllers to microinverters, enabling DIY communities to build and customize sustainable electronics. The project underscores the value of open-source hardware in accelerating energy tech adoption.
items.summary_zh: Libre Solar 提供面向可再生能源的开源硬件设计，从太阳能充电控制器到微型逆变器，帮助社区搭建并定制可持续电子设备。该项目凸显了开源硬件在推动能源科技普及方面的价值。

items.title_en: Voxile: A ray-traced game made in its own engine and programming language
items.title_zh: Voxile：一款基于自家引擎与编程语言的光线追踪游戏
items.summary_en: Voxile showcases a ray-traced game built on its own engine and a custom programming language, illustrating how bespoke tech stacks can deliver tight performance and experimental tooling. The project highlights novelty in game development where engine and language are co-designed for specific art and performance goals.
items.summary_zh: Voxile 展示了一款用自家引擎与自研编程语言实现的光线追踪游戏，体现定制化技术栈在性能和开发灵活性上的潜力。该项目突显引擎与语言协同设计在实现特定美术与性能目标中的创新。

items.title_en: LibreOffice: Request to the European Commission to adhere to its own guidances
items.title_zh: LibreOffice 请求欧盟委员会遵守自身指南
items.summary_en: The Document Foundation calls on the European Commission to follow its own guidelines, likely relating to compatibility, openness, or procurement standards. The note argues that adherence matters for interoperability, trust, and governance of open-source software in public sector adoption.
items.summary_zh: 文档基金会呼吁欧盟委员会遵循其自身指南，涉及兼容性、开放标准或采购规范等领域。文章强调遵循指南对公部门采用开源软件时的互操作性与信任治理具有关键作用。

items.title_en: Payphone Go
items.title_zh: Payphone Go
items.summary_en: Payphone Go reimagines legacy payphones as a modern payment interface.
items.summary_zh: Payphone Go 将传统电话亭改造成现代支付接口。

items.title_en: Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance
items.title_zh: Arm Cortex X925：接近桌面性能
items.summary_en: Arm's Cortex X925 targets desktop-class performance, reshaping expectations for ARM-based laptops and software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Arm Cortex X925 旨在实现桌面级性能，可能改变 ARM 架构在笔记本/桌面上的应用前景及软件兼容性预期。

items.title_en: Anthropic, please make a new Slack
items.title_zh: Anthropic，请做一个新的 Slack
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that AI orgs deserve a dedicated, privacy-conscious collaboration tool better suited for safety workflows than popular chat platforms. The piece riffs on how tooling choices shape collaboration, security, and incident response.
items.summary_zh: 文章呼吁为 AI 组织打造一个隐私友好、比现有聊天工具更合适的内部协作工具，强调工具选择对安全、协作和事件响应的影响。

items.title_en: A CPU that runs entirely on GPU
items.title_zh: 一个完全在 GPU 上运行的 CPU
items.summary_en: A CPU implemented to run entirely on GPU hardware demonstrates offloading instruction scheduling and execution to GPU kernels, blurring the line between CPU and GPU architectures. The project is not about replacing CPUs yet, but it shows how GPU-centric designs could inform emulation, education, and certain HPC workloads. It hints at potential benefits like unified memory usage and high parallelism for specific tasks.
items.summary_zh: 这个在GPU上完整运行的CPU展示了将指令执行移植到GPU内核的可能性，模糊了CPU与GPU的边界。该项目尚不能替代实际CPU，但为仿真、教育和高性能计算场景提供了新的设计思路，可能带来内存整合和并行性提升的潜在收益。

items.title_en: Don't make me talk to your chatbot
items.title_zh: 别让我和你的聊天机器人对话
items.summary_en: A critique of chatbots as customer-facing interfaces, arguing that automated assistants often degrade UX or misalign with user needs. The piece advocates for better design choices, including optional human fallback and transparent limitations.
items.summary_zh: 对以聊天机器人为前端的用户体验提出批评，认为自动化助手常常无法完全满足需求。主张更完善的设计，例如提供人类支持的后备选项与对能力边界的透明化。

items.title_en: CT Scans of Health Wearables
items.title_zh: 健康穿戴设备的 CT 扫描
items.summary_en: Lumafield's Scan of the Month reveals internal components of health wearables through CT imaging, shedding light on battery layouts, sensors, and assembly quality. The series prompts engineers to consider safety, security, and repairability in wearable design.
items.summary_zh: Lumafield 的本月扫描展示了健康穿戴设备的内部结构，如电池布局和传感器设计，关注安全性、可维修性与硬件工程细节。

items.title_en: Simple screw counter
items.title_zh: 极简螺丝计数器
items.summary_en: A tiny DIY counter that tallies screws with a simple mechanism and a microcontroller, illustrating how approachable hardware tooling can be built from inexpensive parts. It highlights how counting tools can improve accuracy in even small-scale projects.
items.summary_zh: 极简螺丝计数器的硬件设计演示——用少量元件和微控制器就能实现螺丝使用计数，体现低成本工具在小型项目中的应用价值。

items.title_en: Operational issue – Multiple services (UAE)
items.title_zh: 操作性问题 – 阿联酋多项服务
items.summary_en: An AWS Health status update lists outages affecting multiple UAE services, impacting regional users and businesses relying on cloud availability, with guidance on remediation timelines.
items.summary_zh: AWS 健康状态更新显示阿联酋多项服务发生故障，影响当地用户与依赖云服务的企业，并提供修复时间指引。

items.title_en: Possible US Government iPhone-Hacking Toolkit in foreign spy and criminal hands
items.title_zh: 美国政府 iPhone 黑客工具包可能落入外国间谍与犯罪分子之手
items.summary_en: Wired reports on a coercive cyber toolkit used by government intelligence that could fall into foreign spies or criminals' hands, raising concerns about supply chain, weaponization of iOS exploits, and export controls. The piece warns of consequences for user privacy and national security.
items.summary_zh: Wired 报道称一款来自政府情报部门的网络工具包可能流入外国间谍与犯罪分子之手，引发对供应链、iOS 漏洞的武器化及出口管制的担忧。此事对用户隐私与国家安全的潜在影响需关注。

items.title_en: Flightradar24 for Ships
items.title_zh: 船舶版 Flightradar24
items.summary_en: Adapting the flight-tracking concept to maritime vessels, this service enables real-time tracking of ships, routes, and statuses. It highlights how vessel telemetry and open data standards could streamline port logistics and global supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 将航班追踪概念移植到海运领域，支持对船舶、航线与状态的实时追踪。此类船舶遥测与开放标准的应用前景，可能提升港口物流与全球供应链的效率。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁在招人？（2026 年 3 月）
items.summary_en: A community recruiting thread listing ongoing openings; useful snapshot of the hiring climate and remote/AI-related opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 这是 2026 年 3 月的招聘贴，汇聚了各家公司正在招人的职位信息，反映当下技术人才的需求和远程工作机会的热点。

items.title_en: Dumping Lego NXT firmware off of an existing brick (2025)
items.title_zh: 从现有乐高 NXT 砖块提取固件（2025）
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate how to dump the firmware from an existing LEGO NXT brick. The write-up covers reading flash memory and bypassing protections to enable analysis, customization, or custom firmware. It underscores how hardware hacking of educational devices can illuminate both openness and security risks in consumer IoT.
items.summary_zh: 研究者演示如何从现有的乐高 NXT 块中提取固件。文章介绍读取闪存和绕过保护以实现分析、定制或自定义固件的过程。此类硬件黑客行为凸显教育用设备的开放性与消费类物联网的安全风险。

items.title_en: Apple Studio Display and Studio Display XDR
items.title_zh: 苹果 Studio Display 与 Studio Display XDR
items.summary_en: Apple unveils a refreshed Studio Display and a new Studio Display XDR, signaling updates to Pro-level monitor lineup with improved brightness, color accuracy, and maybe nano-texture options. The move positions Apple's own displays against external vendors in pro sets.
items.summary_zh: 苹果公布全新 Studio Display 与 Studio Display XDR，提升亮度、色彩准确性，并可能带来纳米纹理等专业选项。此举巩固苹果在专业显示领域的自家生态并与外部厂商展开竞争。

items.title_en: War prediction markets are a national-security threat
items.title_zh: 战争预测市场是国家安全威胁
items.summary_en: The Atlantic piece argues that war prediction markets create security risks and information hazards, potentially enabling manipulation or misleading signals in critical policy decisions. It underscores governance questions around open predictive markets.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为战争预测市场带来安全风险和信息隐患，可能导致在关键政策决策中产生误导性信号或被操纵，引发对开放预测市场治理的思考。

items.title_en: Poor Man's Polaroid
items.title_zh: 穷人的宝丽来：用低成本方案实现宝丽来风格照片
items.summary_en: A budget-friendly project demonstrates how to reproduce Polaroid-style photos with inexpensive gear. By pairing a cheap camera or smartphone with a DIY frame and instant-print workflow, it achieves retro aesthetics without the cost of a real Polaroid setup.
items.summary_zh: 一个低成本项目演示如何用廉价设备复刻宝丽来风格的照片。通过将便宜的相机或手机与自制相框和即时打印流程结合，实现在不花大钱的情况下获得复古效果。

items.title_en: Glaze by Raycast
items.title_zh: Raycast 推出的 Glaze
items.summary_en: Glaze is a new product from Raycast designed to streamline workflows, likely by combining automation and UI tooling. The release expands Raycast’s ecosystem beyond its core Mac productivity tools, signaling continued investment in developer-focused tooling.
items.summary_zh: Glaze 是 Raycast 推出的一款新产品，旨在简化工作流程，可能通过结合自动化与界面工具实现。此举扩展了 Raycast 的生态系统，显示其在开发者工具领域的持续投入。

items.title_en: Nobody gets promoted for simplicity
items.title_zh: 没人因为简单而升职
items.summary_en: Another take on the same thesis, elaborating how teams often equate simplicity with risk, and why leadership should reward clean, maintainable systems for sustainable progress.
items.summary_zh: 对同一论题的另一种解读，阐述团队常把简单等同于风险，强调领导层应当奖励干净、可维护的系统，以实现可持续的进展。

items.title_en: Most-read tech publications have lost over half their Google traffic since 2024
items.title_zh: 自 2024 年以来，大多数科技出版物的 Google 流量下降超过一半
items.summary_en: Tech publications have lost over half of their Google traffic since 2024, signaling a seismic shift in how audiences discover content and the pressure on publishers to diversify referrals, subscription models, and direct visits. The trend underscores the importance of strong brand signals, newsletters, and alternative distribution channels.
items.summary_zh: 自 2024 年以来，主流科技媒体的 Google 流量下降超过一半，标志着受众发现内容方式的重大转变，也给出版商带来多元化流量来源、订阅模式和直接访问的压力。此趋势强调强化品牌信号、邮件通讯与其他分发渠道的重要性。

items.title_en: Does that use a lot of energy?
items.title_zh: 它耗能多吗？
items.summary_en: A data-heavy exploration of energy use across technologies or activities, helping readers compare environmental impact. It highlights energy intensity of common operations and emphasizes the need for efficient designs.
items.summary_zh: 对不同技术与活动的能源消耗进行数据驱动的对比，帮助读者评估环境影响。强调常见操作的能耗强度以及对高效设计的需求。

items.title_en: AMD will bring its “Ryzen AI” processors to standard desktop PCs for first time
items.title_zh: AMD 将把 Ryzen AI 处理器首次带入主流桌面 PC
items.summary_en: AMD will bring Ryzen AI CPUs to mainstream AM5 desktop PCs for the first time, introducing AI acceleration and upgraded graphics to consumer hardware. This move signals a broader industry push to bake AI capabilities into standard PCs, affecting software optimization and gaming workloads.
items.summary_zh: AMD 将首次把 Ryzen AI 处理器带入主流 AM5 桌面电脑，集成 AI 加速和改进的显卡性能到消费级硬件中。这一举措标志着厂商在消费级电脑中普遍嵌入 AI 能力的趋势，它将影响软件优化和游戏等工作负载的性能表现。

items.title_en: FLASH radiotherapy's bold approach to cancer treatment
items.title_zh: FLASH 放射治疗：癌症治疗的大胆新途径
items.summary_en: FLASH radiotherapy delivers ultra-high-dose-rate beams to tumors, potentially reducing damage to surrounding healthy tissue and enabling higher tumor doses. Early clinical work shows promise but requires new equipment, protocols, and careful dose tracking; if scalable, it could redefine radiation oncology.
items.summary_zh: FLASH 放射治疗以极高剂量率照射肿瘤，可能降低对周围健康组织的损伤并允许对肿瘤加大剂量。早期临床研究显示希望，但需新的设备、剂量学与操作流程；若普及，或将重新定义放射治疗领域。

items.title_en: Why XML tags are so fundamental to Claude
items.title_zh: 为什么 XML 标签对 Claude 十分关键
items.summary_en: XML tagging underpins Claude's data handling, influencing prompts, metadata annotation, and parsing strategies that improve model understanding and retrieval.
items.summary_zh: XML 标签在 Claude 的数据处理、提示设计与元数据标注中起到基础作用，有助于提升模型理解与检索能力。

items.title_en: BMW Group to deploy humanoid robots in production in Germany for the first time
items.title_zh: 宝马集团首次在德国生产线部署 humanoid 机器人
items.summary_en: BMW Group will deploy humanoid robots on its German production lines for the first time, marking a milestone in industrial automation. The move signals continued investment in robotics to boost consistency and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 宝马集团将在德国生产线上首次部署人体形机器人，标志着工业自动化的新里程碑。这一举措显示出在提升产线一致性与效率方面对机器人技术的持续投入。

items.title_en: You Just Reveived
items.title_zh: 你刚刚收到了
items.summary_en: Shares a short, witty note about something just received, inviting readers to pause and reflect on small moments that interrupt the workflow.
items.summary_zh: 发布了一条关于刚收到的东西的简短幽默笔记，邀请读者停下来思考那些打断日常节奏的小瞬间。

items.title_en: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 黄仁勋称英伟达正从 OpenAI 与 Anthropic 收缩关系
items.summary_en: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic, citing strategic alignment and concerns about giving away too much influence. The stance raises questions about ecosystem dependencies and future partnerships.
items.summary_zh: 黄仁勋表示英伟达正逐步收缩与 OpenAI、Anthropic 的合作，称战略取向与对过度影响的担忧是原因。这一态度引发对生态系统依赖和未来伙伴关系的讨论。

items.title_en: Microslop Manifesto
items.title_zh: Microslop 宣言
items.summary_en: A bold manifesto critiquing Microsoft's AI and platform strategy, calling out perceived harms or misaligned incentives.
items.summary_zh: 以激进笔触批评微软在 AI、云服务或垄断趋势方面的策略与影响，提出对行业生态的质疑与反思。

items.title_en: Google ends its 30 percent app store fee and welcomes third-party app stores
items.title_zh: Google 取消 30% 应用商店费 并欢迎第三方应用商店
items.summary_en: Google is dropping the 30% Play Store fee and signaling openness to third-party app stores, potentially reshaping Android app distribution and competition. The move could boost developer choice while raising questions about security and ecosystem fragmentation.
items.summary_zh: Google 取消 Play Store 的 30% 提成并表示欢迎第三方应用商店，这可能重新塑造 Android 应用分发与竞争格局。此举或提升开发者选择，同时也引发对安全性和生态系统碎片化的担忧。

items.title_en: Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts
items.title_zh: Show HN：Govbase—从法案原文到新闻偏见再到社交帖文的追踪
items.summary_en: Govbase traces a bill from its source text through media coverage and social discourse to reveal framing and bias, offering a transparent civics tool for researchers.
items.summary_zh: Govbase 通过追踪法案原文、新闻偏见和社交帖子，揭示信息如何被解读与操控，适合关心公民科技的开发者与研究者。

items.title_en: A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs
items.title_zh: 一个去除开源权重 LLM 审查的工具
items.summary_en: This tool removes safety constraints from open-weight LLMs, enabling unrestricted generation but raising serious safety and abuse concerns. It underscores the tension between openness and responsible deployment of powerful models.
items.summary_zh: 一个去除开源权重 LLM 审查的工具提高了生成自由度，但也带来严重安全与滥用担忧，凸显开放性与负责任部署之间的张力。

items.title_en: Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm
items.title_zh: 用 Rust 编写 Wasm 的笔记
items.summary_en: Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm cover practical tips such as using wasm-bindgen, memory management, and how to integrate with JavaScript ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 关于用 Rust 编写 Wasm 的笔记，涵盖 wasm-bindgen、内存管理以及与 JavaScript 生态整合的实用要点。

items.title_en: GitHub having issues [resolved]
items.title_zh: GitHub 出现故障（已解决）
items.summary_en: GitHub experienced incidents affecting service stability; the outage has been resolved, but serves as a reminder of how central code hosting is to developer workflows and the fragility of cloud services.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 一度出现服务故障，现已解决，但再次提醒开发者对代码托管平台的高度依赖及云服务的脆弱性。

items.title_en: AI is making junior devs useless
items.title_zh: AI 正让初级开发者变得无用
items.summary_en: The piece argues AI automation can erode opportunities for junior developers, while proponents push for reskilling and new roles focused on oversight, data, and system integration.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 自动化可能侵蚀初级开发者的机会，但也有人主张通过再培训与转向监督、数据与系统集成等新角色来适应。

items.title_en: Galileo's handwritten notes found in ancient astronomy text
items.title_zh: 在古代天文学文献中发现伽利略手写笔记
items.summary_en: A cache of Galileo's handwritten notes embedded in an old astronomy text offers new clues about early scientific practice. The find could refine our understanding of how scientists recorded observations and ideas.
items.summary_zh: 在一部古老天文文本中发现了伽利略的手写笔记，为理解早期科学实践提供了新线索。此发现或有助于修正科学家记录观测与想法的方式的认识。

items.title_en: Dulce et Decorum Est (1921)
items.title_zh: Dulce et Decorum Est（1921）
items.summary_en: Dulce et Decorum Est is a WWI poem by Wilfred Owen renowned for its anti-war imagery and stark critique of patriotic clichés.
items.summary_zh: 《Dulce et Decorum Est》是威尔弗雷德·奥文的著名一战诗作，以其反战意象和对爱国陈词的尖锐批评著称。

items.title_en: RE#: how we built the fastest regex engine in F#
items.title_zh: 在 F# 中打造最快正则引擎的经验
items.summary_en: An engineering note detailing techniques used to accelerate regex matching in F#, likely including automata optimization, caching, and compile-time improvements. The piece demonstrates how language-specific tooling can unlock significant gains for specialized text processing tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一份工程笔记介绍在 F# 中加速正则匹配所采用的技术，如自动机优化、多模式匹配和编译时改进等。结果表明，针对性工具在关键路径上往往能超越通用库的性能。

items.title_en: Tinnitus Is Connected to Sleep
items.title_zh: 耳鸣与睡眠相关
items.summary_en: New findings link tinnitus severity to sleep quality and circadian biology, suggesting improving sleep may ease tinnitus symptoms. The connection hints at broader brain-body regulation affecting perception.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现耳鸣与睡眠质量及昼夜节律有联系，改善睡眠可能缓解耳鸣症状。这一关联揭示了大脑与身体在感知体验上的更广泛调控。

items.title_en: US economy sheds 92,000 jobs in February in sharp slide
items.title_zh: 美国二月份失去 9.2 万工作岗位，经济放缓
items.summary_en: February payrolls show a sharp jobs drop, signaling a cooling labor market and potential shifts in consumer spending and Fed policy. Tech hiring and startup funding cycles may feel the ripple effects.
items.summary_zh: 二月份就业数据显示就业市场迅速收缩，消费者支出与美联储政策预期可能随之调整。科技行业的招聘节奏与初创融资也可能受波及。

items.title_en: QGIS 4.0
items.title_zh: QGIS 4.0 发布
items.summary_en: QGIS 4.0 lands with performance improvements, a refreshed UI, Python integration, and new data formats, strengthening its position as a leading open-source GIS tool.
items.summary_zh: QGIS 4.0 发布，带来性能提升、界面更新、Python 集成及新数据格式，进一步巩固其作为主流开源 GIS 工具的地位。

items.title_en: Mondrian Entered the Public Domain. The Estate Disagrees
items.title_zh: 蒙德里安进入公有领域，遗产方存在异议
items.summary_en: Mondrian's works have fallen into the public domain, but the estate challenges that status, highlighting tensions around copyright boundaries for classic art. The dispute illustrates how legal interpretations of public-domain timing and rights can complicate reuse and licensing for museums, educators, and tech platforms.
items.summary_zh: 蒙德里安的作品已进入公有领域，但遗产方对这一状态提出异议，凸显了经典艺术版权边界的紧张。此争议揭示了公有领域起始时间与权利界定在再利用、展览和数字化应用中的复杂性。

items.title_en: Noem Can't Explain Why She Hired 8-Day-Old Company for Ad Campaign
items.title_zh: 诺姆 无法解释为何为广告活动雇用一家8天前成立的新公司
items.summary_en: Kristi Noem is criticized for hiring a company only eight days old for a campaign, raising questions about vendor due diligence and payroll politics.
items.summary_zh: Noem 围绕其竞选活动雇佣一家成立仅8天的新公司引发质疑，凸显对供应商尽职调查和潜在利益冲突的关注。

items.title_en: Elevated Errors in Claude.ai
items.title_zh: Claude.ai 的错误率上升
items.summary_en: Claude.ai reports elevated errors on its status page, raising reliability concerns for users and prompting considerations of guardrails and monitoring improvements.
items.summary_zh: Claude.ai 的状态页面显示错误率上升，对依赖其 AI 助手的用户造成不确定性，催促改进容错与稳定性。

items.title_en: We might all be AI engineers now
items.title_zh: 我们现在可能都成了 AI 工程师
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI tooling has lowered the bar to building intelligent features, making more developers 'AI engineers' in practice. It highlights pragmatic approaches to AI integration and the evolving skillset needed.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 工具让更多开发者具备“AI 工程师”的能力，强调将 AI 能力融入日常开发的实际做法与所需技能演变。

items.title_en: Tove Jansson's criticized illustrations of The Hobbit (2023)
items.title_zh: 托芙·扬松对《霍比特人》插图的争议（2023）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at Tove Jansson's 2023 illustrations for The Hobbit, exploring how a different artistic sensibility interacts with Tolkien's world. canonical visuals.
items.summary_zh: 回顾托芙·扬松在 2023 年为《霍比特人》所绘插图，探讨不同艺术风格如何与托尔金的世界观产生互动。文章还讨论了插图与正典视觉之间的边界及公众的评判。

items.title_en: The next generations of Bubble Tea, Lip Gloss, and Bubbles are available now
items.title_zh: 下一代珍珠奶茶、唇彩与泡泡现已上市
items.summary_en: Charm.land announces the availability of the next generation of Bubble Tea, Lip Gloss, and Bubbles products, signaling new product iterations and branding experiments in consumer goods.
items.summary_zh: Charm.land 宣布下一代珍珠奶茶、唇彩与泡泡产品现已上市，展现消费品领域的新版本迭代与品牌实验。

items.title_en: You don't have to
items.title_zh: 你不必
items.summary_en: A concise piece urging readers to shed unnecessary complexity and choices, focusing on simplicity and signal over noise in tooling and workflow.
items.summary_zh: 简短而有力的观点，呼吁剥离不必要的复杂性与选择，聚焦工具与工作流中的简洁与高效。

items.title_en: Picking Up a Zillion Pieces of Litter
items.title_zh: 捡起无数垃圾碎片
items.summary_en: An essay about picking up litter and how small, continuous actions can improve communities and environments. It discusses practical approaches to cleanup and the motivation needed to sustain such civic efforts.
items.summary_zh: 本文讨论在日常生活中捡拾大量垃圾的行动，以及持续进行的小规模清洁如何改善社区与环境。提出切实可行的清洁策略，并强调公民参与的重要性。

items.title_en: My spicy take on vibe coding for PMs
items.title_zh: 我对面向 PM 的 vibe 编程的辣评
items.summary_en: Offers a contrarian view on vibe coding for product managers, arguing that intuition-driven approaches can be valuable but need guardrails and validation to avoid product risk.
items.summary_zh: 对面向产品经理的 vibe 编程提出反向观点，认为直觉驱动的方法确有价值，但需要设定边界与验证以避免产品风险。

items.title_en: Claude is an Electron App because we've lost native
items.title_zh: Claude 是 Electron 应用，因为我们已经失去了原生
items.summary_en: Claude UI reliance on Electron attributed to lack of native UI across platforms; the article argues about dwindling native UI support and the trade-offs of cross-platform web tech. It discusses performance and UX costs of Electron apps.
items.summary_zh: 文中将 Claude 的桌面客户端归因于 Electron，认为跨平台原生 UI 支持的减少使人们转向 Web 技术。讨论 Electron 应用对性能与用户体验的权衡，以及原生 UI 的重要性。

items.title_en: Father claims Google's AI product fuelled son's delusional spiral
items.title_zh: 父亲称谷歌的 AI 产品促使儿子产生妄想
items.summary_en: A father alleges an AI product from Google contributed to his son's delusions, sparking debate about AI safety, mental health, and the risks of misinterpretation of AI outputs.
items.summary_zh: 一名父亲指控谷歌的某款 AI 产品促使其儿子产生幻觉，促使人们关注 AI 安全、心理健康与对 AI 输出的误解风险。

items.title_en: Judge finalizes order for Greenpeace to pay $345M in ND oil pipeline case
items.title_zh: 法官最终裁定 Greenpeace 在 ND 石油管线案中赔付 3.45 亿美元
items.summary_en: A North Dakota ruling finalizes Greenpeace's liability for a significant payout over an oil pipeline dispute, underscoring the legal risks surrounding environmental activism and energy infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 在北达科他州相关案件中，法院最终裁定绿色和平组织需支付 3.45 亿美元赔款，凸显环境行动与大规模能源项目的法律博弈。

items.title_en: I resigned from OpenAI
items.title_zh: 我已从 OpenAI 辞职
items.summary_en: Former OpenAI employee reveals resignation, potentially sharing perspectives on the company culture, direction, or AI policy. The note underscores talent turnover in high-profile AI labs.
items.summary_zh: 前任 OpenAI 员工披露辞职，并可能分享对公司文化、发展路线或 AI 政策的看法，反映出顶尖 AI 实验室的人才流动现象。

items.title_en: A case for Go as the best language for AI agents
items.title_zh: Go 可能是构建 AI 代理的最佳语言
items.summary_en: Argues Go's performance, concurrency, and deployment advantages for building AI agents, challenging the Python dominance in agent tooling.
items.summary_zh: 提出用 Go 构建 AI 代理的论点，强调在性能、并发和部署方面对 Python/JS 的优势，可能影响团队对代理生态的选型。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 发布
items.summary_en: Apple's MacBook Neo expands the premium laptop lineup, intensifying competition with Windows devices and Chromebooks for portability-focused users.
items.summary_zh: 苹果的 MacBook Neo 扩展了高端笔记本阵容，在面向便携性的用户群体中加强了与 Windows 设备和 Chromebook 的竞争。

items.title_en: Show HN: Timber – Ollama for classical ML models, 336x faster than Python
items.title_zh: Show HN: Timber — Ollama 的经典 ML 模型，速度比 Python 快 336x
items.summary_en: Timber leverages Ollama to run classical ML models with dramatically faster performance than Python pipelines, illustrating a practical path to faster local inference.
items.summary_zh: Timber 基于 Ollama 的实现，能够以远超 Python 的速度运行经典机器学习模型，展示本地推理的高效路径。

items.title_en: AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines review
items.title_zh: AI 生成的艺术在最高法院拒绝复审后不能获得版权
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court declines to review whether AI-generated art can be copyrighted, effectively leaving the rule that AI-created works cannot be copyrighted in place. This decision shapes IP strategy for artists and platforms navigating AI-assisted workflows.
items.summary_zh: 最高法院拒绝就 AI 生成艺术的版权问题再审，维持现行规则：AI 创作的作品通常不能获得版权保护。这对艺术家与在 AI 辅助创作中运作的平台的知识产权策略具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Physicists developing a quantum computer that’s entirely open source
items.title_zh: 物理学家开发完全开源的量子计算机
items.summary_en: Researchers are building a quantum computer with open-source hardware and software, promoting reproducibility and community collaboration in quantum tech.
items.summary_zh: 研究者在量子计算领域打造完全开源的量子计算机，推动可重复性与社区协作的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建了一个实时 OSINT 仪表板，聚合 15 个全球信息源
items.summary_en: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard that ingests 15 live feeds and presents them with live updates, filters, and visualizations. It demonstrates how open-source tooling can empower rapid threat intelligence and media monitoring workflows.
items.summary_zh: 我构建了一个实时 OSINT 仪表板，接入 15 个全球信息源并提供实时更新、过滤与可视化。该项目展示了开源工具在威胁情报与媒体监控中的高效应用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Swarm – Program a colony of 200 ants using a custom assembly language
items.title_zh: Show HN：Swarm——用自定义汇编语言编程200只蚂蚁
items.summary_en: Swarm demonstrates programming a colony of 200 simulated ants using a custom assembly language, illustrating low-level control of a swarm and emergent behavior. It captures the playful yet serious research direction in distributed systems and agent-based simulations.
items.summary_zh: Swarm 展示用自定义汇编语言编程200只蚂蚁的群体，探索对群体行为的底层控制和分布式系统的研究方向。

items.title_en: Graphics Programming Resources
items.title_zh: 图形编程资源
items.summary_en: A curated list of tutorials, libraries, and references for graphics programming, from shading languages to GPU APIs. It's a handy quick-start and reference for developers entering or deepening a graphics-focused project.
items.summary_zh: 精选的图形编程教程、库和参考资料，涵盖着色语言到 GPU API 等主题，方便开发者快速入门或深化图形相关项目。

items.title_en: Ape Coding [fiction]
items.title_zh: Ape Coding [fiction]
items.summary_en: A humorous fictional piece imagining coding by apes or AI lore, using satire to reflect on biases and automation in software development.
items.summary_zh: 以幽默笔法描绘猿猴或 AI 传说中的编码情景，通过讽刺探讨软件开发中的偏见与自动化。

items.title_en: Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019)
items.title_zh: 你为什么调不好吉他？（2019）
