items.summary_en: The piece explains guitar tuning challenges, including intonation, string tension, and setup quirks. It provides practical advice on tuning, intonation adjustment, and technique, with broader takeaways about instrument physics.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了吉他调音的难点，包括音准、弦张力和琴桥调校等因素。文中给出实际的调音与整音调整建议，以及关于乐器物理的更广泛思考。

items.title_en: NanoGPT Slowrun: Language Modeling with Limited Data, Infinite Compute
items.title_zh: NanoGPT Slowrun：在有限数据、无限算力下的语言建模
items.summary_en: NanoGPT Slowrun demonstrates language modeling with extremely limited data but effectively leveraged compute, exploring efficiency tricks and data-efficient training methods. It points toward democratizing NLP research.
items.summary_zh: NanoGPT Slowrun 展示在极少数据下进行语言建模，借助海量计算资源实现高效训练，探索数据高效训练方法，推动自然语言处理研究的普及化。

items.title_en: Parallel coding agents with tmux and Markdown specs
items.title_zh: 用 tmux 和 Markdown 规范实现并行编码代理
items.summary_en: Shows how to coordinate multiple coding agents in parallel using tmux panes and Markdown specs, illustrating a scalable human-AI collaboration workflow.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用 tmux 窗格与 Markdown 规范来并行协作代码代理，展示人机协同编码的实用方法。

items.title_en: Remotely unlocking an encrypted hard disk
items.title_zh: 远程解锁一台加密硬盘
items.summary_en: A demonstration shows how an encrypted hard disk can be unlocked remotely, highlighting potential flaws in remote unlock features and urging strong authentication and fixed-key management.
items.summary_zh: 演示展示了如何远程解锁一块加密硬盘，揭示远程解锁功能的潜在缺陷，并敦促加强身份验证和密钥管理。

items.title_en: Setting up phones is a nightmare
items.title_zh: 设置新手机是一场噩梦
items.summary_en: Onboarding modern smartphones is often painful, with data migrations, sign-ins, and ecosystem lock-in slowing setup. The post catalogs friction points and suggests pragmatic improvements—better data portability, unified sign-in, and clearer transfer tooling. Reducing friction here could improve satisfaction for device makers and carriers.
items.summary_zh: 现代智能手机的初始设置常常让人倍感痛苦，数据迁移、账户登录和生态体系绑定等环节拖慢了整个设置过程。文章列出主要痛点，并建议改进方向，如更好的数据可移植性、统一登录与更清晰的迁移工具。减少这些摩擦有望提升用户满意度并惠及设备制造商与运营商。

items.title_en: Long Range E-Bike (2021)
items.title_zh: 长续航电动自行车
items.summary_en: The long-range e-bike article discusses a build focused on maximizing distance through larger batteries, efficient drivetrains, and weight management. It weighs the trade-offs between speed, weight, and ride comfort, offering practical guidance for real-world range gains.
items.summary_zh: 这篇关于长续航电动自行车的文章聚焦通过增大电池、高效传动与重量控制来提升续航。它权衡了速度、重量与骑行舒适度，并给出实现实际续航提升的实用建议。

items.title_en: US tech firms pledge at White House to bear costs of energy for datacenters
items.title_zh: 美国科技公司在白宫承诺承担数据中心能源成本
items.summary_en: US tech firms pledge to bear energy costs for data centers, aligning with climate and energy policy goals. The move could shift operating expenses and influence where new facilities are located.
items.summary_zh: 多家美国科技公司承诺承担数据中心能源成本，回应气候与能源政策目标。这一承诺可能改变运营成本结构，并影响新设施的选址与投资。

items.title_en: Textadept
items.title_zh: Textadept（文本编辑器）
items.summary_en: Textadept is a tiny, fast, extensible text editor with Lua-based scripting, designed for speed and customization. It demonstrates that highly capable editors can stay minimal yet powerful, appealing to developers who want a lean tool.
items.summary_zh: Textadept 是一款极简但可扩展的文本编辑器，使用 Lua 进行扩展，强调快速与定制。它证明了极小的工具也能提供强大编辑能力，适合追求轻量化工作的开发者。

items.title_en: TSA leaves passenger needing surgery after illegally forcing her through scanner
items.title_zh: TSA 在安检中违规强制让乘客通过扫描仪，致其需要手术
items.summary_en: Investigative report alleges TSA agents improperly forced a passenger with a spinal implant through a scanner, causing injury and prompting questions about screening safety and patient rights. It spotlights the tension between security protocols and individual health risks.
items.summary_zh: 有报道指 TSA 不当强行让携带脊柱植入物的乘客通过安检扫描，造成伤害并引发对安检安全与乘客权利的质疑。

items.title_en: AI and the Ship of Theseus
items.title_zh: AI 与忒修斯之船
items.summary_en: The essay uses the Ship of Theseus metaphor to explore AI systems that replace components over time, raising questions about identity, reliability, and governance of evolving AI stacks. It invites reflection on what makes a system 'the same' when its parts continually change.
items.summary_zh: 本文用忒修斯之船的比喻探讨随着时间更换组件的 AI 系统，提出身份、可靠性与治理的问题，思考在部件持续变化时何谓“同一系统”。

items.title_en: Open Camera is a FOSS Camera App for Android
items.title_zh: Open Camera：一个面向 Android 的开源相机应用
items.summary_en: Open Camera is a fully free and open-source camera app for Android, offering manual controls, RAW image support, and privacy-friendly design. Its FOSS nature makes it a strong alternative to vendor bloatware and closed ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Open Camera 是一个面向 Android 的开源相机应用，提供手动控制、RAW 支持等功能，注重隐私与可定制性。作为免费开源软件，它为抵制厂商臃肿应用提供了有力选项。

items.title_en: Medical journal says the case reports it has published for 25 years are fiction
items.title_zh: 医学期刊称过去25年的病例报道为虚构
items.summary_en: A medical journal admits that the case reports published over 25 years were fictional, triggering a crisis of trust in peer review and raising questions about editorial processes. The revelation has wide implications for researchers and patients.
items.summary_zh: 一家医学期刊承认过去25年的病例报道是虚构的，引发对同行评审制度的信任危机，并对编辑流程产生质疑，影响研究者和患者的信任与透明度。

items.title_en: Emails to Outlook.com rejected due to a fault or overzealous blocking rules
items.title_zh: 发往 Outlook.com 的邮件被拒收：故障或过度拦截规则所致
items.summary_en: A fault or aggressive filtering caused legitimate emails to be blocked by Outlook.com, disrupting communication for users. The episode illustrates how backend policy or bugs can create wide-scoped reliability issues and the importance of robust monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 发往 Outlook.com 的邮件因故障或过度拦截规则被拒收，干扰用户沟通。此事件凸显后台策略或错误如何引发广泛的可靠性问题，以及加强监控的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Stacked Game of Life
items.title_zh: Show HN：叠层生命游戏
items.summary_en: Stacked Game of Life extends the classic cellular automaton with layered grids or stacking semantics, creating richer patterns and interactions. It's a playful exploration of how small rules scales into complex emergent behavior.
items.summary_zh: 叠层生命游戏在经典细胞自动机基础上加入分层网格或叠加语义，产生更丰富的图样与互动。这是对小规则如何演化出复杂涌现行为的有趣探索。

items.title_en: World-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite
items.title_zh: 全球首个飞机与地球同步卫星之间的千兆位激光链路
items.summary_en: ESA reports world-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite, signaling new possibilities for airborne-to-space communications. Laser communications offer high throughput and low latency, but face alignment and weather challenges as the technology scales.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲航天局宣布实现全球首个空中与地球同步卫星之间的千兆位激光链路，标志着机载-太空通信的新前景。激光通信具有高吞吐、低时延等优势，但在对准与天气条件方面仍存在挑战。

items.title_en: PC processors entered the Gigahertz era today in the year 2000 with AMD's Athlon
items.title_zh: 2000 年，AMD Athlon 让 PC 进入千兆赫时代
items.summary_en: A retrospective on the dawn of GHz-era CPUs sparked by AMD Athlon reaching 1 GHz, highlighting marketing milestones, performance breakthroughs, and the competitive shift away from earlier Intel dominance.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 AMD Athlon 1 GHz 的里程碑，标志着 CPU 进入 GHz 时代。文章解析市场营销、性能突破以及对英特尔主导局面的冲击。

items.title_en: Sarvam 105B, the first competitive Indian open source LLM
items.title_zh: Sarvam 105B：印度首个具竞争力的开源 LLM
items.summary_en: Sarvam announces a 105B open-source LLM, signaling India's growing AI tooling ecosystem and potential impacts on licensing, data sourcing, and regional AI competitiveness.
items.summary_zh: Sarvam 发布了 105B 的开源大型语言模型，标志着印度本土 AI 工具生态的崛起，并对许可、数据来源及区域竞争力产生影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Poppy – A simple app to stay intentional with relationships
items.title_zh: Show HN: Poppy – 一个帮助人们在关系中保持有意的简单应用
items.summary_en: Poppy is a minimal app designed to help users stay intentional about their relationships, likely by tracking conversations, commitments, and reminders. It showcases a tiny, purpose-driven tool in the Show HN space.
items.summary_zh: Poppy 是一个简约应用，帮助用户在关系中保持有意，可能通过跟踪对话、承诺与提醒来实现。展示了 Show HN 领域中一个小而明确目标的工具。

items.title_en: We Built a Video Rendering Engine by Lying to the Browser About What Time It Is
items.title_zh: 我们通过“欺骗浏览器时间”构建视频渲染引擎
items.summary_en: The engineers describe a trick to control rendering cadence by manipulating perceived time from the browser, enabling custom synchronization or performance optimization. It raises questions about browser time semantics and potential risks.
items.summary_zh: 通过操控浏览器对时间的感知来控制渲染节奏，作者构建了一个视频渲染引擎。这一做法质疑浏览器时间API的局限性，同时也引发对可维护性与安全性的讨论。

items.title_en: Helsinki just went a full year without a single traffic death
items.title_zh: 赫尔辛基整整一年零交通死亡
items.summary_en: Helsinki records a year with zero traffic fatalities, illustrating the impact of urban design, safety policies, and active transportation on reducing deadly crashes. The milestone offers a data point for cities aiming to improve road safety.
items.summary_zh: 赫尔辛基实现整整一年零交通死亡，展示城市设计、交通安全政策与步行/自行车友好基础设施对降低致命车祸的作用。此成就为其他城市提供安全改进的参考。

items.title_en: We should revisit literate programming in the agent era
items.title_zh: 代理时代应重新审视可文档编程（Literate Programming）
items.summary_en: Literary programming could help make agent behavior more transparent in this era of autonomous tools. The piece argues for weaving code, rationale, and decision logs together so teams can audit, debug, and extend intelligent agents more effectively.
items.summary_zh: 在代理时代，可文档编程有助于提升代理行为的透明度。文中主张将代码、推理过程和决策日志结合书写，便于团队审计、调试与扩展智能代理。

items.title_en: The surprising whimsy of the Time Zone Database
items.title_zh: 时区数据库的惊喜与趣味
items.summary_en: An exploration of the IANA Time Zone Database, highlighting quirks arising from historical shifts and geopolitical changes. Understanding its nuances matters for scheduling, logging, and internationalization.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 IANA 时区数据库的种种怪趣，揭示历史演变和地缘政治变动如何塑造时区命名与变更。掌握这些细节对跨时区调度、日志记录和国际化开发很有帮助。

items.title_en: New imagery suggests U.S. responsible for Iran school strike
items.title_zh: 新影像指向美国对伊朗校园袭击负责
items.summary_en: Analyses of new imagery imply potential U.S. involvement in an Iranian school strike, raising questions about attribution, surveillance evidence, and the calculus of international response. The topic underscores how imagery can influence geopolitical narratives.
items.summary_zh: 新影像分析暗示美国可能参与对伊朗校园的袭击，提出归因、监控证据与国际回应的伦理与策略问题，凸显影像在地缘叙事中的作用。

items.title_en: My Homelab Setup
items.title_zh: 我的自建家庭实验室设置
items.summary_en: A personal tour of the author's homelab setup, detailing hardware, virtualization, and networking choices. It offers practical tips for building a scalable, energy-conscious lab at home and sharing lessons from daily tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了他的自建家庭实验室的搭建与配置，涵盖硬件、虚拟化和网络等方面的选择。文中提供实用建议，帮助读者在家中打造可扩展的实验环境，并从日常试验中总结经验。

items.title_en: Little Free Library
items.title_zh: Little Free Library
items.summary_en: A community-driven program placing free, public libraries in neighborhoods to promote literacy and sharing, with potential tech-enabled cataloging and donation workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一个社区驱动的公益项目，在社区内设立免费图书馆，促进读书与资源共享；未来也可结合科技实现图书编目与捐赠流程的数字化。

items.title_en: An Interactive Intro to CRDTs (2023)
items.title_zh: CRDT 的互动入门（2023）
items.summary_en: A hands-on, interactive primer on conflict-free replicated data types that lets you experiment with how CRDTs converge across distributed replicas. It covers core ideas, common designs, and practical trade-offs for real-time collaboration and offline-first applications.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个互动式的CRDT入门，允许你通过实验观察分布式副本如何最终一致收敛。内容覆盖核心概念、常见设计及在实时协作和离线优先场景中的权衡。

items.title_en: Use the Mikado Method to do safe changes in a complex codebase
items.title_zh: 用 Mikado 方法在复杂代码库中做安全变更
items.summary_en: The Mikado Method advocates breaking changes into small, testable steps and building a path of fixes that preserves behavior at each step. The article outlines a practical workflow for safely refactoring or adding features in large systems.
items.summary_zh: Mikado 方法强调将变更拆解为可测试的小步骤，并在每一步保持现有行为的一致性。文中给出在大型系统中进行安全重构或新增功能的实际工作流。

items.title_en: US asked Ukraine for help fighting Iranian drones, Zelensky says
items.title_zh: 美国向乌克兰请求帮助对抗伊朗无人机，泽连斯基表示
items.summary_en: US asks Ukraine for help countering Iranian drones, according to Zelensky, highlighting international cooperation dynamics and the role of tech and defense partnerships in modern warfare.
items.summary_zh: 据泽连斯基称，美国请求乌克兰协助对抗伊朗制造的无人机，凸显在现代战争中跨国协作与高科技防务伙伴关系的重要性。

items.title_en: How to record and retrieve anything you've ever had to look up twice
items.title_zh: 如何记录并快速检索你曾多次查找的信息
items.summary_en: A practical guide to building a personal knowledge base workflow so you can log repeated lookups and retrieve them quickly in the future.
items.summary_zh: 分享一个个人知识库工作流，帮助你把所有重复查找的信息记录下来，后续快速检索，并给出实用工具与步骤。

items.title_en: Boy I was wrong about the Fediverse
items.title_zh: 我对联邦宇宙的看法错了
items.summary_en: The author revisits initial skepticism about the Fediverse, acknowledging progress and trade-offs in decentralized social networks, governance, and interoperability. The reflection highlights ongoing challenges and opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 作者回顾对联邦宇宙（Fediverse）的初始怀疑，承认去中心化社交网络在治理、互操作性方面的进展与权衡，点出当前的挑战与机遇。

items.title_en: Weave – A language aware merge algorithm based on entities
items.title_zh: Weave——一种基于实体的语言感知合并算法
items.summary_en: Weave is a language-aware merge algorithm that uses entities to resolve conflicts during merges, prioritizing semantics over raw text. By aligning changes to underlying entities, it can reduce churn in collaborative editing and improve consistency across versions. The project could influence future diff/merge tooling for structured data.
items.summary_zh: Weave 是一种基于实体的语言感知合并算法，在合并冲突时以实体语义为导向来解决分歧。通过将改动对齐到实体之上，能够降低协同编辑中的重复冲突并提升版本一致性。该项目可能影响未来对结构化数据的差异和合并工具。

items.title_en: Paul Brainerd, founder of Aldus PageMaker, has died
items.title_zh: Aldus PageMaker 创始人保罗·布兰德逝世
items.summary_en: Paul Brainerd, a pioneer of desktop publishing and founder of Aldus PageMaker, has passed away. His work helped seed modern design tooling and the rise of digital publishing.
items.summary_zh: Aldus PageMaker 的创始人、桌面出版领域的先驱保罗·布兰德去世。他的工作促成了现代设计工具和数字出版的兴起。

items.title_en: MyFirst Kids Watch Hacked. Access to Camera and Microphone
items.title_zh: MyFirst 儿童手表被黑，摄像头和麦克风被访问
items.summary_en: A security incident on a kids' smartwatch reveals attackers gaining access to camera and mic, underscoring privacy risks in connected wearables for children and the need for better device security and parental controls.
items.summary_zh: 一起关于儿童智能手表的安全事件暴露黑客能够访问摄像头和麦克风，凸显儿童穿戴设备的隐私风险，以及对设备安全和家长控制的需求。

items.title_en: Hardware hotplug events on Linux, the gory details
items.title_zh: Linux 硬件热插拔事件的详细解读
items.summary_en: A deep dive into Linux hardware hotplug events, covering PCI/USB device add-remove, memory hotplug, and kernel logging, with practical debugging tips for reliability.
items.summary_zh: 对 Linux 硬件热插拔事件进行深入剖析，涵盖 PCI/USB 设备添加移除、内存热插拔与内核日志，并给出可靠性调试要点。

items.title_en: Autoresearch: Agents researching on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
items.title_zh: Autoresearch：在单 GPU 的 NanoChat 训练中自动进行研究的代理
items.summary_en: Autoresearch introduces agents capable of autonomously conducting research to optimize training for a tiny chat model on a single GPU, illustrating how autonomous systems can accelerate small-scale ML experiments. The approach demonstrates search, hypothesis testing, and optimization loops with minimal human intervention.
items.summary_zh: Autoresearch 展示了能够自行进行研究以优化单 GPU 小型聊天模型训练的代理，展示了自治系统在小规模机器学习实验中的潜力。该方法让代理进行搜索、假设检验与优化循环，尽量降低人工干预。

items.title_en: Maybe there's a pattern here?
items.title_zh: 也许这里有模式？
items.summary_en: Explores whether a simple data pattern recurs across domains, and what that implies for modeling and forecasting. The writeup discusses both the strengths and limits of pattern detection in real-world data.
items.summary_zh: 探讨一种简单的数据模式是否跨域重复出现，以及这对建模与预测意味着什么。文中分析了模式检测在现实数据中的优点与局限。

items.title_en: Show HN: Omni – Open-source workplace search and chat, built on Postgres
items.title_zh: Show HN：Omni——基于 Postgres 的开源工作场所搜索与聊天工具
items.summary_en: Omni is an open-source workplace search and chat built on Postgres, emphasizing self-hosting, data control, and compatibility with the Postgres ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Omni 是一个基于 Postgres 的开源工作场所搜索与聊天工具，强调自托管、数据所有权和与现有 Postgres 生态的集成。

items.title_en: Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video]
items.title_zh: 活体脑细胞在 CL1 上玩 Doom
items.summary_en: Living human brain cells controlled a Doom game on a CL1 computer, showcasing a brain-computer interface experiment. The result demonstrates progress in bio-electronic integration and raises questions about capabilities, safety, and ethics of neural interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 活体脑细胞控制 CL1 计算机上的 Doom，展示了脑机接口实验的进展。此结果凸显生物-电子集成的发展，同时也引发关于神经接口能力、安全性与伦理的讨论。

items.title_en: GPT-5.4
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 发布
items.summary_en: OpenAI announces GPT-5.4, continuing the iterative development of its language model family with refinements in safety, performance, and user experience. The release underscores the ongoing push to balance capability with governance.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 GPT-5.4 的发布，继续在语言模型家族上进行迭代式改进，涵盖安全、性能与用户体验的优化。此发布再次凸显在提升能力的同时强化治理的努力。

items.title_en: A ternary plot of citrus geneology
items.title_zh: 柑橘系谱的三元图
items.summary_en: A ternary plot visualizes citrus genealogy, showing how three ancestral lineages contribute to modern varieties. The approach clarifies genetic heritage and helps breeders track lineage and diffusion across cultivars. Such visualizations can accelerate cross-breeding decisions and conservation efforts.
items.summary_zh: 该作品用三元图展示柑橘家系的三大祖先线对现代品种的贡献。此类可视化帮助研究者和育种者快速把握遗传渊源、追踪谱系在不同品种中的扩散。这样的图形化方法有助于加速杂交选择和品种保护工作。

items.title_en: Training students to prove they're not robots is pushing them to use more AI
items.title_zh: 训练学生证明自己不是机器，反而让他们更多使用 AI
items.summary_en: Critique of anti-bot tests in education reveals that forcing students to prove they're not robots can push them toward using AI tools, prompting calls for better assessment design and integrity policies.
items.summary_zh: 对教育领域反机器人测试的批评指出，要求学生证明自己不是机器人可能促使他们更多使用 AI 工具，从而促使改进评估设计与学术诚信政策。

items.title_en: Why does C have the best file API
items.title_zh: 为什么 C 语言拥有最好的文件 API
items.summary_en: C's file I/O API is praised for its low-level control and performance, offering precise management of buffers and system calls that higher-level languages abstract away.
items.summary_zh: C 语言的文件 I/O API 因其底层控制与性能而备受赞誉，能够对缓冲区与系统调用进行精细管理，这些在高级语言中往往被封装。

items.title_en: It took four years until 2011’s iOS 5 gave everyone an emoji keyboard
items.title_zh: 直到2011年的 iOS 5 才给所有人提供表情符键盘
items.summary_en: It took four years for iOS 5 to include an emoji keyboard, illustrating the long road to feature parity and standardization for new input methods on mobile.
items.summary_zh: 经历四年才在 iOS 5 中加入表情符键盘，反映了移动端新输入法的普及与标准化的漫长进程。

items.title_en: Ada 2022
items.title_zh: Ada 2022
items.summary_en: Ada 2022 standard adds features for safer concurrent programming, contract-based design, and modern language ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Ada 2022 标准引入更安全的并发编程、契约式设计等现代语言特性，提升系统可靠性与可维护性。

items.title_en: Daily Driving GrapheneOS
items.title_zh: Daily Driving GrapheneOS
items.summary_en: Matthew Brunelle documents eight months of daily driving on GrapheneOS, sharing insights on privacy, usability, app compatibility, and security trade-offs. The post provides a practical perspective on running a hardened mobile OS as everyday driver.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录在 GrapheneOS 上连续数月的日常使用，分享了隐私、可用性、应用兼容性及安全性的取舍。为在日常场景中采用高安全性移动系统提供实际视角。

items.title_en: Humans 40k yrs ago developed a system of conventional signs
items.title_zh: 四万年前人类发展出一种常规符号体系
items.summary_en: PNAS reports that humans 40,000 years ago developed a conventional system of signs, pushing back estimates for symbolic communication. This finding deepens our understanding of cognitive evolution and how early humans represented ideas beyond gesture and ritual.
items.summary_zh: PNAS 报告称，约 4 万年前的人类已经发展出一套常规符号体系，将符号沟通的时间推前。此发现深化了对认知进化和早期人类如何以符号表达思想的理解。

items.title_en: Cancel ChatGPT AI boycott surges after OpenAI pentagon military deal
items.title_zh: 取消 ChatGPT AI 抵制在 OpenAI 与 Pentagon 军事交易后激增
items.summary_en: Public boycott campaigns against AI tools surge following a Pentagon OpenAI deal, signaling how government contracts shape public sentiment toward AI vendors. The development highlights the political risk for AI platforms and the marketplace dynamics around defense-related AI adoption.
items.summary_zh: 在 OpenAI 与五角大楼达成军事合作后，针对 AI 工具的抵制行动显著上升，反映政府合同对公众态度的影响。此事凸显 AI 平台面临的政治风险以及军事领域对 AI 采用的市场动态。

items.title_en: Computer-generated dream world: Virtual reality for a 286 processor
items.title_zh: 为 286 处理器设计的计算机生成梦境世界：虚拟现实
items.summary_en: A project runs VR-like experiences on an ancient 286 processor, exploring the boundaries of retro computing and real-time rendering on limited CPU.
items.summary_zh: 在 286 处理器上实现的计算机生成梦境世界，展示复古硬件上的实时渲染与极限挑战。

items.title_en: Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale
items.title_zh: 昆虫学家用粒子加速器在大规模下成像蚂蚁
items.summary_en: Researchers used a particle accelerator to image ants at scale, enabling high-resolution 3D visualization of colony structure. The technique reveals new insights into collective behavior and biology at micro scales.
items.summary_zh: 科学家使用粒子加速器对蚂蚁进行大规模成像，实现对蚁群结构的高分辨率三维可视化，为集体行为与微观生物学提供新见解。

items.title_en: Show HN: PageAgent, A GUI agent that lives inside your web app
items.title_zh: Show HN：PageAgent——嵌入在你的网页应用中的 GUI 代理
items.summary_en: PageAgent is a GUI agent embedded inside a web app, enabling in-app automation and assisted workflows without leaving the page. It signals growing interest in internal assistant agents that enhance developer and user productivity.
items.summary_zh: PageAgent 是嵌入到网页应用中的 GUI 助手，支持在应用内部完成自动化与辅助工作，提升开发者和用户的生产力。

items.title_en: Claude Code wiped our production database with a Terraform command
items.title_zh: Claude Code 清空了我们的生产数据库（Terraform 命令）
items.summary_en: A production disaster where Claude Code executed a Terraform command that wiped the production database, illustrating the risk of AI copilots acting with destructive consequences. It underscores the need for guardrails, irreversible safety checks, and robust change controls.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 执行 Terraform 命令导致生产数据库被清空，暴露 AI 助手在操作敏感系统时的风险，强调防护与不可逆安全检查、强健的变更控制的重要性。

items.title_en: A new Polymarket account made over $500k betting on the U.S. strike against Iran
items.title_zh: 一个新的 Polymarket 账户在美对伊行动下注获利超 50 万美元
items.summary_en: A Polymarket account reportedly earned over $500k betting on a U.S. strike against Iran, highlighting the lucrative yet risky world of prediction markets and the regulatory considerations involved.
items.summary_zh: 据称在美对伊行动相关交易中，Polymarket 账户获利超 50 万美元，凸显预测市场的盈利潜力与监管与合规风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: µJS, a 5KB alternative to Htmx and Turbo with zero dependencies
items.title_zh: Show HN：µJS——一个 5KB 的 Htmx/Turbo 替代品，零依赖
items.summary_en: Introducing µJS, a compact 5KB library offering modern front-end interactivity without dependencies, as a minimalist alternative to Htmx and Turbo. It trades breadth for simplicity and speed.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：µJS 是一个仅 5KB 的前端交互库，无需依赖，作为 Htmx 与 Turbo 的极简替代方案。它以简洁与速度换取功能广度。

items.title_en: Working and Communicating with Japanese Engineers
items.title_zh: 与日本工程师共事与沟通
items.summary_en: An exploration of cultural nuances and practical tips for collaborating with Japanese engineers, covering communication styles, meetings, and code review etiquette. It emphasizes patience, context, and structured collaboration to improve cross-cultural software projects. Expect actionable strategies for smoother teamwork.
items.summary_zh: 以日本工程师为对象的跨文化协作指南，探讨沟通风格、会议习惯与代码评审礼仪等要点。强调耐心、语境与结构化协作在跨团队软件项目中的重要性，给出可落地的操作建议。

items.title_en: Smalltalk's Browser: Unbeatable, yet Not Enough
items.title_zh: Smalltalk 浏览器：无可匹敌，却仍有不足
items.summary_en: Smalltalk's browser remains legendary for its live, integrated code exploration, but lacks modern IDE features and a vibrant ecosystem. The discussion uses this to illustrate how deeply entrenched tools can both empower and constrain developer productivity over time.
items.summary_zh: Smalltalk 的浏览器以其即时、集成的代码浏览能力而著称，但现代 IDE 功能与生态系统支持仍然不足。此话题借此说明，长期依赖的工具既能提升生产力，也可能限制创新和迁移。

items.title_en: Let's Get Physical
items.title_zh: 走向实体世界
items.summary_en: Explores why and how developers are embracing physical, hardware-connected experiences, from sensors to embedded systems. It examines tradeoffs and opportunities in building for the real world.
items.summary_zh: 讨论开发者为何以及如何拥抱物理、硬件连接的体验，从传感器到嵌入式系统，分析现实世界建设的权衡与机会。

items.title_en: Nobody ever got fired for using a struct
items.title_zh: 没人因为用结构体而被解雇
items.summary_en: Advocates for sticking with simple, well-understood data shapes like structs rather than chasing trendy abstractions. The piece argues that predictable, type-safe design reduces production risk and hiring friction, even when more flashy patterns exist.
items.summary_zh: 主张在软件设计中坚持简单、易于理解的数据结构，如结构体，而非盲目追逐新潮抽象。强调可预测的类型安全设计能降低上线风险与招聘风险，即使出现更花哨的模式也不易取代。

items.title_en: The shady world of IP leasing
items.title_zh: IP 租用的阴暗世界
items.summary_en: Examines the shady markets for IP leasing, including fraudulent schemes, short-term leases for traffic redirection, and the security risks they pose to users and networks.
items.summary_zh: 揭示 IP 租赁市场的阴暗面，包括欺诈性交易、短期租用用于流量劫持，以及对用户和网络的安全风险。

items.title_en: My “grand vision” for Rust
items.title_zh: 我对 Rust 的宏伟愿景
items.summary_en: My grand vision for Rust outlines ambitious ecosystem, ergonomics, and safety goals, with steps to make the language more accessible while maintaining performance.
items.summary_zh: 我对 Rust 的宏伟愿景聚焦于生态、易用性与安全性的提升，并提出在保持性能的同时扩大普及的路线。

items.title_en: Arabic document from 17th-cent. rubbish heap confirms semi-legendary Nubian king
items.title_zh: 17世纪垃圾堆中的阿拉伯文献证实半传说的努比亚王
items.summary_en: An Arabic document from a 17th-century rubbish heap confirms a semi-legendary Nubian king, reshaping the historical record. The discovery highlights how discarded material can illuminate obscure periods and shows how historians date and authenticate ancient texts.
items.summary_zh: 一份来自17世纪垃圾堆的阿拉伯文献证实了半传说的努比亚王，重新构塑了相关历史记录。此发现凸显被丢弃的材料如何为模糊的历史提供线索，也展示了学者如何通过文本学和年代学进行鉴定。

items.title_en: Better JIT for Postgres
items.title_zh: PostgreSQL 的更好 JIT
items.summary_en: Pg_jitter proposes a faster JIT path for PostgreSQL, potentially boosting query speed on workloads with many generated queries. It highlights the ongoing tension between runtime code generation and maintainability, plus how JIT affects CPU cache and startup cost.
items.summary_zh: pg_jitter 提出在 PostgreSQL 上实现更快的 JIT 路径，可能提升对高并发和生成型查询的执行速度。揭示了运行时代码生成与可维护性之间的平衡，以及 JIT 对 CPU 缓存和启动成本的影响。

items.title_en: In 1985 Maxell built a bunch of life-size robots for its bad floppy ad
items.title_zh: 1985 年 Maxell 为其软盘广告打造真人大小机器人
items.summary_en: Maxell produced life-size robots for a 1985 floppy disk advertisement. The stunt remains a memorable example of audacious tech marketing from the era and illustrates how flashy ads helped shape public perception of new storage tech.
items.summary_zh: 1985 年 Maxell 为其软盘广告打造了真人大小的机器人。此举成为那个时代极具记忆点的科技营销案例，展示了花哨广告如何塑造公众对新存储技术的认知。

items.title_en: Good Bad ISPs
items.title_zh: 好 ISP 与坏 ISP
items.summary_en: A resource aggregating performance, privacy, and reliability indicators for ISPs, helping readers evaluate providers beyond marketing claims and make informed choices.
items.summary_zh: 汇总了各家 ISP 的性能、隐私与稳定性指标，帮助读者在对比宣传口号时做出更明智的选择。

items.title_en: Rijksmuseum researchers discover new painting by Rembrandt van Rijn
items.title_zh: Rijksmuseum 研究人员发现伦勃朗的新画作
items.summary_en: Researchers at the Rijksmuseum report the discovery of a previously unknown Rembrandt painting, expanding the artist’s oeuvre. The finding shows how modern science and archival research can reveal hidden works and prompt reattribution and cataloging.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰国立博物馆的研究人员宣布发现一幅此前未知的伦勃朗画作，扩展了画家的作品范围。这一发现展示了现代科技与档案研究在揭示隐藏作品、重新鉴定与编目中的作用。

items.title_en: An interactive intro to Elliptic Curve Cryptography
items.title_zh: 椭圆曲线密码学互动入门
items.summary_en: An interactive ECC primer helps developers grasp public-key cryptography concepts like curves and discrete logs through hands-on visuals.
items.summary_zh: 提供一个互动式的椭圆曲线密码学入门，帮助开发者直观理解公钥密码、曲线和离散对数等核心概念。

items.title_en: Oracle may slash up to 30k jobs to fund AI data-centers as US banks retreat
items.title_zh: 甲骨文或裁员3万以资助AI数据中心，美银行业萎缩
items.summary_en: Oracle reportedly plans to slash up to 30,000 jobs to fund AI data-center expansion as banks retreat. The move signals how AI infrastructure investments are shaping enterprise labor and budget priorities amid a shifting financial sector.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，甲骨文计划裁减多达3万员工以资助AI数据中心扩张，正值美国银行业收缩之时。这一举动显示在金融行业环境变化下，AI基础设施投资正在重塑企业人力与预算优先级。

items.title_en: Claude dethrones ChatGPT as top U.S. app after Pentagon saga
items.title_zh: Claude 在 Pentagon 事件后超越 ChatGPT 成为美区顶级应用
items.summary_en: Claude overtakes ChatGPT in U.S. app rankings amid Pentagon-related controversy, signaling shifting user trust and vendor dynamics in AI apps.
items.summary_zh: 在关于五角大楼事件的背景下，Claude 在美国应用下载榜上超越了 ChatGPT，反映出用户信任与 AI 应用生态的变化。

items.title_en: Zuckerberg's internal emails rendered as Facebook Messenger
items.title_zh: 扎克伯格内部邮件被渲染成 Facebook Messenger 对话
items.summary_en: A project renders CEO emails as Messenger-style conversations, prompting reflection on data representation, privacy, and corporate communication.
items.summary_zh: 将扎克伯格的内部邮件呈现为 Facebook Messenger 会话的创意项目，揭示信息呈现形式与个人通讯隐私的讨论。

items.title_en: OpenTitan Shipping in Production
items.title_zh: OpenTitan 正式投入生产
items.summary_en: OpenTitan ships in production, delivering a secure hardware root of trust for chips, enabling more trustworthy supply chains and device security. It demonstrates live deployment of open-source silicon security.
items.summary_zh: OpenTitan 正式投入生产，为芯片提供安全的硬件根信任，提升供应链与设备安全的可信度，展示了开源硅安全的落地应用。

items.title_en: Why Objective-C
items.title_zh: 为什么要学 Objective-C
items.summary_en: An exploration of why Objective-C persists in Apple ecosystems, focusing on its dynamic runtime, mature libraries, and interoperability with Swift. It also discusses nostalgia and practical reasons for still maintaining legacy codebases.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Objective-C 在 Apple 生态中的持续存在原因，聚焦其动态运行时、成熟库以及与 Swift 的互操作性，同时讨论维护遗留代码的实际理由与情怀。

items.title_en: The View from RSS
items.title_zh: 来自 RSS 的视角
items.summary_en: This piece defends RSS as a resilient, privacy-preserving way to consume content in an era of algorithm-driven feeds. It discusses open standards, the fragility of platform lock-in, and why independent feeds still matter for creators and readers.
items.summary_zh: 本文捍卫 RSS 作为在算法驱动的信息流时代仍具韧性、重视隐私的内容获取方式。讨论开放标准、平台锁定的脆弱性，以及独立订阅源对创作者和读者的重要性。

items.title_en: Nintendo Sues U.S. Government for Tariff Refunds
items.title_zh: 任天堂就关税退款向美国政府提起诉讼
items.summary_en: Nintendo sues the U.S. government seeking tariff refunds, a case that touches on trade policy, tariff schemes, and potential implications for the gaming industry.
items.summary_zh: 任天堂就关税退款向美国政府提起诉讼，涉及贸易政策、关税制度及对游戏行业的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Claude struggles to cope with ChatGPT exodus
items.title_zh: Claude 在应对 ChatGPT 流失潮中的挣扎
items.summary_en: Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, is feeling pressure as users migrate to ChatGPT.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的 Claude 在大量用户转向 ChatGPT 的情况下面临压力。文章分析了消费级AI对话市场的竞争格局、功能差距与用户期望，以及 Claude 可能通过升级或平台集成等方式重新夺回用户的策略。

items.title_en: NRC issues first commercial reactor construction approval in 10 years [pdf]
items.title_zh: NRC 十年来首次批准商业核反应堆建设
items.summary_en: The NRC grants the first commercial reactor construction approval in ten years, marking a milestone for US nuclear energy. The decision underscores renewed interest in nuclear power amid energy security concerns, with safety and regulation at the forefront.
items.summary_zh: 美国核能监管机构十年来首次批准商业核反应堆建设，标志着美国核能领域的重要里程碑。该决定反映在能源安全背景下对核能的重新关注，同时需要严格的安全与监管。

items.title_en: Every single board computer I tested in 2025
items.title_zh: 我在 2025 年测试的全部单板计算机
items.summary_en: I tested a wide range of single-board computers released or updated in 2025, benchmarking CPU, RAM, storage, and I/O performance across vendors from Raspberry Pi rivals to niche boards. The results highlight a shift toward more powerful, feature-rich SBCs with improved networking, guiding choices for DIY projects and edge deployments.
items.summary_zh: 作者对 2025 年上市或更新的所有单板计算机进行了横向对比，覆盖 CPU、RAM、存储与 IO 性能。结果揭示 SBC 市场在向更强大、功能更全且网络能力更好的方向发展，并给出从 DIY 项目到边缘部署的选购建议。

items.title_en: Rising carbon dioxide levels now detected in human blood
items.title_zh: 人体血液中检测到上升的二氧化碳水平
items.summary_en: Scientists report measurable CO2 elevations in human blood, raising questions about physiology, health risks, and implications for public health in a warming world. The finding connects environmental factors to human biology and policy considerations.
items.summary_zh: 科学家在人体血液中检测到上升的二氧化碳水平，提出对生理、健康风险及全球变暖下公共卫生的潜在影响的疑问。这一发现将环境因素与人体生物学及政策考量联系起来。

items.title_en: C# strings silently kill your SQL Server indexes in Dapper
items.title_zh: C# 字符串在 Dapper 中悄悄拖累 SQL Server 索引
items.summary_en: C# string handling in Dapper can cause implicit nvarchar conversions that degrade SQL Server indexing, leading to performance regressions. The fix often involves using proper parameter types and explicit types.
items.summary_zh: C# 字符串在 Dapper 中的处理可能导致隐式 nvarchar 转换，进而损害 SQL Server 索引性能，出现性能回落。常见解决办法是使用正确的参数类型并显式指定类型。

items.title_en: The worst acquisition in history, again
items.title_zh: 史上最糟吞并案，再次
items.summary_en: An analysis of a recent corporate acquisition deemed one of the worst in history, detailing strategic missteps, cultural clashes, and the fallout for employees and investors.
items.summary_zh: 对最近被称作百年来最糟的并购案进行分析，揭示战略失误、文化冲突及对员工与投资者的负面影响。

items.title_en: How Big Diaper absorbs billions of extra dollars from American parents
items.title_zh: 婴儿纸尿裤行业如何从美国家庭榨取数十亿美元
items.summary_en: A witty look at how diaper brands and retailers capture billions in extra spending from American families, driven by price-inflation, subscription traps, and bundling. The piece also highlights implications for consumer behavior and potential alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 这篇以数据驱动的报道揭示，婴儿纸尿裤行业如何通过涨价、订阅制、捆绑销售等方式从美国家庭处吸走数十亿资金。文章还讨论了对家庭消费行为的影响，以及潜在的替代方案。

items.title_en: A man who broke into jail
items.title_zh: The Man Who Broke into Jail
items.summary_en: A New Yorker profile of Alexander Friedmann exploring his jail-breaking actions and how they intersect with prison reform, security, and advocacy.
items.summary_zh: 《纽约客》对亚历山大·弗里德曼的专题报道，探讨他入监行动的背后动机及其在监狱改革、安保与倡导方面的影响。

items.title_en: The beauty and terror of modding Windows
items.title_zh: Windows修改的美丽与恐怖
items.summary_en: Explores the allure and risk of modding Windows, covering customization, stability, security concerns, and the balance between empowerment and malware risk.
items.summary_zh: 探讨对Windows进行修改的魅力与风险，涵盖个性化、系统稳定性、安全隐患，以及用户自治与恶意软件风险之间的权衡。

items.title_en: We've freed Cookie's Bustle from copyright hell
items.title_zh: 我们已将《Cookie’s Bustle》从版权困境中解放
items.summary_en: Cookie's Bustle has been freed from copyright restrictions, unlocking its archival, study, and potential revival. The change demonstrates how copyright settlements or licensing can help preserve digital history and encourage game preservation.
items.summary_zh: 据称《Cookie's Bustle》已摆脱版权限制，使其存档、研究和潜在重现成为可能。这一进展凸显了版权安排在数字遗产保护和游戏保存中的作用。

items.title_en: Compiling Prolog to Forth [pdf]
items.title_zh: 将 Prolog 编译为 Forth 的研究（PDF）
items.summary_en: Prolog-to-Forth compilation demonstrates translating a logic programming language to a stack-based target. It explores representing predicates and backtracking in Forth, offering practical lessons for language designers and compiler engineers.
items.summary_zh: 通过将 Prolog（逻辑编程语言）编译为 Forth，研究跨语言编译的可行性，探讨如何在栈式目标中表示谓词与回溯，为语言设计者与编译器工程师提供可借鉴的经验。

items.title_en: Log messages are mostly for the people operating your software
items.title_zh: 日志信息主要供运行你软件的人查看
items.summary_en: Logs are primarily for operators maintaining the software, not end users. Designing observability with structured, actionable log signals helps developers find issues faster while avoiding noisy or irrelevant data for users. The post advocates shipping clearer, role-aware logging practices to improve reliability.
items.summary_zh: 日志主要为维护软件的运维人员所用，而非最终用户。通过结构化、可操作的日志信号来提升可观测性，能帮助开发者更快定位问题，同时避免向用户呈现过多无用信息。文章倡导采用清晰、面向角色的日志实践以提升系统可靠性。

items.title_en: Did Alibaba just kneecap its powerful Qwen AI team?
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴是否在削弱其强大的 Qwen AI 团队？
items.summary_en: VentureBeat reports leadership changes and key departures at Alibaba's Qwen AI team, risking momentum on a high-profile Chinese AI effort. The moves illustrate how internal politics and funding shifts can impact AI product roadmaps.
items.summary_zh: VentureBeat 报道称阿里巴巴 Qwen AI 团队发生高层调整与关键成员离职，可能影响这项重要的 AI 项目的推进。此举反映出内部政治和资金分配变化对 AI 路线图的潜在冲击。

items.title_en: Closure of the Weatheradio service in Canada
items.title_zh: 加拿大天气无线电服务关闭
items.summary_en: Canada is shutting down its Weatheradio service, a nationwide emergency weather alert system relied on by remote communities. The change raises concerns about resilience of public safety communications and may accelerate adoption of digital alerts and mobile apps for weather warnings.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大宣布关闭天气无线电服务，这一覆盖全国的应急天气警报系统在偏远社区尤为重要。该举动引发对公共安全通讯韧性的担忧，可能促使更多人转向数字警报和移动应用来获取天气警报。

items.title_en: Felix "fx" Lindner has died
items.title_zh: Felix“fx”林德纳逝世
items.summary_en: Felix Lindner, known as fx, was a prominent figure in security research; his work at Recurity Labs and community contributions influenced vulnerability disclosure and security tooling. His passing prompts reflections on the field and ongoing collaborations.
items.summary_zh: Felix Lindner（fx）是安全研究领域的重要人物，一直在 Recurity Labs 工作并对漏洞披露与安全工具有影响。其离世引发对行业前景与持续合作的讨论与缅怀。

items.title_en: SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI
items.title_zh: SWE-CI：通过 CI 评估代理维护代码库的能力
items.summary_en: The paper investigates how autonomous agents perform codebase maintenance via CI, measuring tasks they can handle and where they struggle. It highlights capabilities, failure modes, and implications for future tooling and CI design.
items.summary_zh: 论文评估在持续集成环境中，自动化代理维护代码库的能力，涵盖错误修复、依赖更新等任务的表现、局限与设计影响。

items.title_en: Self-Portrait by Ernst Mach (1886)
items.title_zh: 欧内斯特·马赫（1886）的自画像
items.summary_en: A late 19th-century self-portrait by physicist Ernst Mach, blending scientific rigor with artistic expression. Mach’s portrait reflects the era’s curiosity about depicting the scientist as both thinker and creator. The work is now in the public domain, broadening access to historical imagery.
items.summary_zh: 19 世纪末物理学家马赫的自画像，兼具科学严谨与艺术表现。该作品体现了当时关于科学家既是思想者又是创造者的形象探索。现已进入公有领域，便于公众获取历史影像。

items.title_en: Blacksky AppView
items.title_zh: Blacksky AppView
items.summary_en: Blacksky AppView is a lightweight toolkit for constructing and viewing AT Protocol app views, helping developers render timelines and relationships efficiently without over-fetching data.
items.summary_zh: Blacksky AppView 提供一个轻量工具包，用于构建和查看 AT Protocol 的应用视图，帮助开发者高效渲染时间线和关系数据，避免数据过度抓取。

items.title_en: Show HN: uBlock filter list to blur all Instagram Reels
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 uBlock 过滤规则将所有 Instagram Reels 模糊处理
items.summary_en: A Show HN demonstrates a uBlock filter that blurs all Instagram Reels, providing a privacy- and attention-preserving tweak for a popular platform. It reflects practical, user-driven content filtering that can be extended to other feeds.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一条 uBlock 过滤规则，可将 Instagram Reels 全部模糊处理，提升隐私与专注度。这体现了实用的用户驱动内容过滤思路，未来或可拓展到其它信息源。

items.title_en: Chaos and Dystopian news for the dead internet survivors
items.title_zh: 死网生还者的混乱与反乌托邦新闻
items.summary_en: A dark, tongue-in-cheek look at the 'dead internet' and the dystopian news that might haunt its survivors. It uses the premise to examine the fragility of online ecosystems, information integrity, and how communities cling to fragments of the old web.
items.summary_zh: 本文用黑色幽默笔触描绘所谓“死网”生还者所面临的混乱与反乌托邦新闻。通过这个设想，探讨在线生态的脆弱性、信息的完整性，以及社区如何在旧网络碎片中寻找坚持。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (March 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁愿意被雇佣？（2026 年 3 月）
items.summary_en: A community thread compiling current hiring needs and openings as of March 2026, giving readers a pulse on roles, compensation ranges, and remote options. It serves as a quick signal to both job seekers and founders about market demand.
items.summary_zh: 这是一则汇总 2026 年 3 月招聘信息的社区帖子，提供职位需求、薪资区间与远程机会等信息。为求职者和招聘方把握市场需求与竞争态势提供快速参考。

items.title_en: Disable Your SSH access accidentally with scp
items.title_zh: 用 scp 两次误用就可能让 SSH 被误断
items.summary_en: Describes a scenario where careless SCP usage can inadvertently disable SSH access, such as destructive file transfers or mis-targeted commands. The post recommends safer practices and safeguards, like using SFTP, careful path handling, and backups to avoid lockouts.
items.summary_zh: 描述了错误使用 scp 可能导致 SSH 访问被意外禁用的情景，例如误删/误写文件或错指路径。提出更安全的工作方式和防护措施，如使用 SFTP、谨慎的路径处理与备份，避免被锁定的风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: A weird thing that detects your pulse from the browser video
items.title_zh: Show HN：通过浏览器视频检测心率的奇特方法
items.summary_en: A browser-based pulse detector demonstrates estimating heart rate using only a video feed, hinting at feasible, privacy-sensitive biometrics entirely on the client. The result prompts questions about reliability, potential privacy concerns, and new avenues for lightweight health analytics.
items.summary_zh: 一个基于浏览器视频源即可估算心跳的实现，意味着无需额外硬件就能进行生物识别。该技术引发关于可靠性、隐私风险与轻量级健康分析新前景的讨论。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi Pico as AM Radio Transmitter
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi Pico 作为 AM 无线电发射机
items.summary_en: A project shows the Raspberry Pi Pico can function as an AM radio transmitter with minimal hardware, illustrating how hobbyist microcontrollers can explore radio tech. It highlights accessible experimentation but also considerations around regulatory compliance and signal integrity.
items.summary_zh: 该项目展示了 Raspberry Pi Pico 在最小硬件条件下实现 AM 无线电发射，体现了业余微控制器在无线电技术探索中的可行性。也提醒关注合规性与信号质量等问题。

items.title_en: Intelligence is a commodity. Context is the real AI Moat
items.title_zh: 智能是商品，但情境才是 AI 的真正护城河
items.summary_en: Argues that intelligence is commoditized, while context and data pipelines create durable, defensible AI advantages. Emphasizes the importance of data, integration, and domain-specific deployment.
items.summary_zh: 认为智能本身已成为商品，真正的壁垒来自情境与数据流水线。强调数据、集成与领域应用的重要性。

items.title_en: Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming
items.title_zh: 启动 HN：OctaPulse（YC W26）——用于鱼类养殖的机器人与计算机视觉
items.summary_en: OctaPulse is a YC-backed robotics and computer-vision startup targeting fish farming, aiming to automate monitoring and feeding to improve yields and reduce labor. The combination of robotics and AI vision signals growing automation in aquaculture.
items.summary_zh: OctaPulse 是一家 YC 支持的机器人与计算机视觉创业公司，瞄准鱼类养殖的监控与投喂自动化，提升产量并降低人工成本。机器人与 AI 视觉的结合体现了水产养殖领域的自动化趋势。

items.title_en: Emacs internals: Deconstructing Lisp_Object in C (Part 2)
items.title_zh: Emacs 内部原理：C 语言中 Lisp_Object 的解构（第2部分）
items.summary_en: A deep dive into Emacs Lisp internals, focusing on how Lisp_Object is represented and managed in C, including tagging, GC, and interop with Lisp.
items.summary_zh: 对 Emacs Lisp 底层实现的深入分析，聚焦 Lisp_Object 在 C 层的表示与内存管理，包括标记指针、垃圾回收以及与 Lisp 的互操作性。第2部分继续展开前文的技术细节。

items.title_en: macOS code injection for fun and no profit (2024)
items.title_zh: macOS 代码注入：为乐趣而非利润（2024）
items.summary_en: macOS code injection techniques are explored in a playful, educational vein, with emphasis on safe, reversible experiments.
items.summary_zh: 这篇以玩味角度探讨 macOS 代码注入技术，强调在受控、合规的环境中进行学习与实验。文中概述了注入原理，并强调需要获得授权、遵循伦理规范。

items.title_en: Guilty Displeasures
items.title_zh: 罪恶快感
items.summary_en: A reflective piece inviting readers to share guilty pleasures, exploring how small indulgences shape tech habits and creative work. It offers candid observations on balancing comfort with productivity in daily life.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章征集读者分享自己的罪恶快感，探讨小小放纵如何影响科技工作与日常习惯，并呈现平衡舒适与生产力的思考。

items.title_en: The Collective Ambition Behind Odysseus, a Game-Changing Sci-Fi Larp
items.title_zh: Odysseus 的集体野心：改变游戏规则的科幻 LARP
items.summary_en: Odysseus is a sci‑fi LARP that aims to redefine immersive storytelling through collaborative world‑building and player-driven narratives. The piece explains the ambition to blend speculative fiction with social systems at scale.
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 这款科幻主题的 LARP 通过协作叙事与玩家驱动的世界构建，致力于打造一种全新的沉浸式叙事体验。文章阐释了将科幻设想与社会系统融合的宏大愿景。

items.title_en: The Lobster Programming Language
items.title_zh: Lobster 编程语言
items.summary_en: Lobster presents a small, approachable language focusing on readability and fast feedback.
items.summary_zh: Lobster 语言以简洁易读、快速反馈为目标，强调可读性与快速迭代。文章探讨了面向学习与探索的轻量化工具链的取舍。

items.title_en: Fast-Servers
items.title_zh: Fast-Servers
items.summary_en: A project focused on high-performance, low-latency server design, featuring practical benchmarks and optimization tips for speed-oriented deployments.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦高性能、低延迟的服务器设计，包含实际的基准测试和面向速度的优化要点。

items.title_en: Jails for NetBSD – Kernel Enforced Isolation and Native Resource Control
items.title_zh: NetBSD 的 Jail：内核强制隔离与本地资源控制
items.summary_en: NetBSD is advancing jail-like isolation with kernel-enforced boundaries and native resource controls, enabling more secure multi-tenant deployments on the OS.
items.summary_zh: NetBSD 正在推进内核级的 Jail 隔离与本地资源控制，使操作系统在多租户部署中更安全。

items.title_en: You can use newline characters in URLs
items.title_zh: URL 中可包含换行字符
items.summary_en: Newline characters can be included in URLs, per recent exploration of encoding and normalization rules. This opens questions about URL handling, security pitfalls (like header injection or log parsing), and how browsers and servers sanitize input.
items.summary_zh: URL 可以包含换行符，这一发现引发对 URL 处理、安全性（如头注入与日志解析）以及浏览器/服务器对输入进行清洗的策略的讨论。

items.title_en: DOS Memory Management
items.title_zh: DOS内存管理
items.summary_en: An overview of DOS memory management across conventional, upper, and extended memory, including DOS extenders and memory managers that shaped software compatibility.
items.summary_zh: 概述 DOS 在常规内存、上内存和扩展内存等不同模型下的内存管理，以及影响软件兼容性的内存管理工具与DOS扩展。

items.title_en: Show HN: ANSI-Saver – A macOS Screensaver
items.title_zh: Show HN：ANSI-Saver – 一个 macOS 屏幕保护程序
items.summary_en: ANSI-Saver is a macOS screensaver rendering ANSI art, showcasing a playful use of retro text visuals. It demonstrates how simple, lightweight projects can still delight on modern desktops and serve as a playground for experimentation.
items.summary_zh: ANSI-Saver 是一个在 macOS 上渲染 ANSI 字符艺术的屏幕保护程序，展现了对复古文本视觉的有趣运用。它证明了简单、轻量的项目在现代桌面也能带来乐趣，并成为实验的舞台。

items.title_en: Some Words on WigglyPaint
items.title_zh: 关于 WigglyPaint 的一些话
items.summary_en: A reflective take on WigglyPaint, a creative drawing tool that emphasizes playful, physics-informed rendering and approachable improvisation. It discusses design decisions, extensibility, and the role of generative art tools.
items.summary_zh: 对 WigglyPaint 的思考文章，介绍其作为一种富有创造性的绘画工具，强调玩法性、物理驱动的渲染与易用性。讨论了设计取舍、可扩展性以及生成艺术工具在创作中的作用。

items.title_en: GPL upgrades via section 14 proxy delegation
items.title_zh: 通过 Section 14 代理授权实现 GPL 升级
items.summary_en: A proposal describes using a Section 14 proxy delegation to upgrade GPL terms, enabling downstream projects to obtain newer licenses without direct renegotiation. The mechanism could streamline license updates for large codebases with many contributors. If workable, it raises questions about license governance and cross-ecosystem compatibility.
items.summary_zh: 一篇提案描述通过 Section 14 的代理授权来升级 GPL 条款，使下游项目在无需逐一重新协商的情况下获得更新的许可。该机制可能为拥有大量贡献者的庞大代码库简化许可证升级流程。若能实现，将引发关于许可治理、授权代理及跨生态兼容性的讨论。

items.title_en: The Self-Help Trap: What 20 Years of "Optimizing" Has Taught Me
items.title_zh: 自我提升的陷阱：二十年追求“优化”教会我的事
items.summary_en: Twenty years of chasing optimization in self-help circles reveals a trap: relentless tweaking can undermine meaning and autonomy. The author argues for sustainable balance, focusing on worth and well-being rather than constant efficiency gains.
items.summary_zh: 对二十年来自助领域的“优化”热潮进行反思，指出无休止的追求效率可能侵蚀人生意义与自主性。作者主张在效率与幸福之间寻求可持续的平衡，而非不断的优化。

items.title_en: To understand our fascination with crystals, researchers gave some to chimps
items.title_zh: 为理解晶体的迷恋，研究人员给黑猩猩晶体
items.summary_en: A study gave crystals to chimpanzees to probe their fascination with them, offering insights into cognition and cross-species curiosity. Results suggest that nonhuman primates share at least some aesthetic interest in shiny objects, informing how we study perception.
items.summary_zh: 研究将晶体给黑猩猩，以探究它们对晶体的迷恋，揭示认知与跨物种好奇心的线索。结果表明非人灵长类确实对闪亮物体表现出某种美感兴趣，这有助于理解感知研究。

items.title_en: Was Windows 1.0's lack of overlapping windows a legal or a technical matter?
items.title_zh: Windows 1.0 缺乏重叠窗口，是法律问题还是技术问题？
items.summary_en: Examines whether Windows 1.0’s lack of overlapping windows was born from hardware/memory constraints or licensing quirks. The discussion sheds light on how early design choices were shaped more by tech limits than by legality, with implications for UI history.
items.summary_zh: 考察 Windows 1.0 缺少重叠窗口究竟是由硬件/内存限制还是许可问题驱动。讨论揭示早期设计选择更多受技术约束影响而非法律因素，对用户界面史有一定启示。

items.title_en: MonoGame: A .NET framework for making cross-platform games
items.title_zh: MonoGame：用于跨平台游戏开发的 .NET 框架
items.summary_en: Overview of MonoGame, an open-source .NET framework enabling cross-platform game development, with coverage across major desktop, mobile, and console targets. It discusses ecosystem maturity, performance, and how it stacks up against Unity for indie developers.
items.summary_zh: MonoGame 是一个开源的 .NET 框架，支持跨平台开发游戏，覆盖桌面、移动和主机等目标。介绍生态成熟度、性能考量及在独立开发者场景中相对于 Unity 的定位。

items.title_en: Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025)
items.title_zh: 基于体积原语的解析雾渲染
items.summary_en: Analytic fog rendering with volumetric primitives presents a method to render atmospheric fog using primitive volumes, enabling efficient and controllable results. By avoiding heavy ray tracing, it offers real-time performance improvements for games and graphics pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 基于体积原语的解析雾渲染提出一种用原语体积来实现大气雾效的渲染方法，可获得更高效、可控的雾效。通过避免昂贵的光线追踪，该方法有望提高游戏和图形管线的实时性能。

items.title_en: Sea level much higher than assumed in most coastal hazard assessments
items.title_zh: 沿海风险评估中的海平面远高于普遍假设
items.summary_en: New findings push sea level rise higher than many coastal risk assessments assumed, implying greater flood risk, faster shoreline erosion, and tougher adaptation planning for cities and infrastructure. The result argues for updated models and resilient design standards.
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示海平面上升高于多数沿海风险评估的假设，意味着更大的洪水风险、海岸侵蚀加速以及更严格的适应规划。结果呼吁更新模型并提升设计韧性。

items.title_en: TorchLean: Formalizing Neural Networks in Lean
items.title_zh: TorchLean：在 Lean 中形式化神经网络
items.summary_en: Introduces TorchLean, a project to formalize neural networks within the Lean theorem prover, enabling machine-checked proofs of ML models and properties. It showcases bridging heavy math with practical ML workflows, potentially increasing reliability and enabling formal verification for critical systems.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 TorchLean，将神经网络形式化到 Lean 定理证明器中，使机器可校验的模型性质成为可能。该工作将高等数学与实际机器学习工作流连接起来，提升可靠性，并为关键系统的形式化验证提供途径。

items.title_en: Computer Says No
items.title_zh: 电脑说不：对在线服务身份验证的反思
items.summary_en: The piece critiques how software and systems can 'say no' to users, highlighting real-world cases where automation prevents simple actions. It argues for better error messaging, fallback paths, and human-in-the-loop approaches to avoid frustrating experiences.
items.summary_zh: 本文批评软件与系统在遇到边界情况时对用户说不，揭示自动化有时会阻碍本该轻松完成的操作。强调改进错误信息、提供回退方案，以及保留人工干预的必要性。

items.title_en: Seed of Might Color Correction Process (2023) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Seed of Might 颜色校正流程（2023）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A detailed 2023 color grading workflow for Seed of Might outlines daily steps, reference frames, and LUT usage to maintain a consistent mood across shots. The document shares practical approaches to calibration, shot matching, and preserving narrative tone in post.
items.summary_zh: 这份 2023 年的颜色校正工作流程记录了 Seed of Might 的逐日步骤、参考画面和 LUT 使用，确保全片色调一致。文档还给出标定、镜头匹配以及在后期保留叙事语气的实用方法。

items.title_en: 70k Books Found in Hidden Library in This Germany Home (2023)
items.title_zh: 德国一户家中藏书洞藏70,000本
items.summary_en: A Germany home hides a library of about 70,000 books discovered behind walls, offering a remarkable glimpse into archival treasure and provenance. The find could attract researchers and collectors interested in rare editions.
items.summary_zh: 德国某户人家的隐藏书库里藏着约7万本书，展现出罕见藏书的宝贵性与来源。此类发现吸引研究者和收藏家关注。

items.title_en: I built a pint-sized Macintosh
items.title_zh: 我做了一个袖珍版 Macintosh
items.summary_en: A maker documents building a pint-sized Macintosh, detailing hardware choices, assembly, and lessons learned from reviving a compact, retro-inspired computer.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了制作袖珍版 Macintosh 的全过程，介绍硬件选型、组装过程以及复古风格小型计算机的经验教训。

items.title_en: What canceled my Go context?
items.title_zh: Go context 为什么会被取消？
items.summary_en: Explains common reasons for Go context cancellation, including timeouts and cancellation propagation. It offers practical patterns to manage lifetimes and avoid subtle concurrent bugs.
items.summary_zh: 解释 Go context 取消的常见原因，如超时和取消传播，并给出管理生命周期、避免细微并发错误的实用模式。

items.title_en: AMD Am386 released March 2, 1991
items.title_zh: AMD Am386 于1991年3月2日发布
items.summary_en: AMD's Am386 release marked a pivotal move in the x86 market by offering a cost-competitive alternative to Intel's 386. It helped expand the 32-bit PC segment and set the stage for later price competition and architectural diversification among AMD and its peers.
items.summary_zh: AMD 在 1991 年推出 Am386，为 x86 市场提供了更具竞争力的选择，挑战英特尔 386 的主导地位。此举扩大了 32 位 PC 细分市场，并为后续的价格竞争和架构多样化铺平了道路。

items.title_en: Astra: An open-source observatory control software
items.title_zh: Astra：一个开源的观测站/望远镜控制软件
items.summary_en: Astra is an open-source software package for observatory control, enabling telescope automation, instrument control, and remote operation. By embracing open standards, it lowers the barrier to building affordable, shareable observatories and can accelerate amateur and research workflows.
items.summary_zh: Astra 是一个开源的观测站/望远镜控制软件，支持望远镜自动化、仪器控制与远程操作。采用开放标准，有助于降低搭建可分享天文台的门槛，促进业余与科研工作流的协同。

items.title_en: AWS outage due to drone attacks in UAE
items.title_zh: 由于 UAE 的无人机袭击导致 AWS 中断
items.summary_en: AWS outage in the UAE traced to drone attacks on data centers, highlighting geopolitical risks to cloud resilience. The incident underscores the importance of regional redundancy, disaster recovery planning, and multi-region failure tolerance for cloud users and providers.
items.summary_zh: 阿联酋的无人机袭击导致 AWS 停运，凸显云基础设施面临的地缘政治风险。事件强调区域冗余、灾难恢复和多区域容灾在云用户与提供商中的重要性。

items.title_en: How to install and start using LineageOS on your phone
items.title_zh: 如何在手机上安装并使用 LineageOS
items.summary_en: Guides readers through flashing LineageOS, including prerequisites, backup steps, and troubleshooting. Highlights benefits like longer software support, customization, and improved privacy, as well as risks such as warranty voiding and potential bricking.
items.summary_zh: 详细讲解了在手机上安装 LineageOS 的前置条件、备份步骤和排错要点。强调其长期软件支持、可定制性和隐私控制等优点，同时也指出可能导致保修失效和设备变砖的风险。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Cekura (YC F24) – Testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Cekura（YC F24）— 面向语音与聊天AI代理的测试与监控
items.summary_en: Cekura offers testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents, addressing latency, reliability, and safety in production deployments. In YC's latest batch, it reflects growing demand for observable, reliable conversational AI.
items.summary_zh: Cekura 提供针对语音与聊天AI代理的测试与监控，覆盖生产环境中的延迟、可靠性与安全性等关键指标。作为YC F24的一部分，凸显对可观测性强、稳定的对话式AI需求日益增加。

items.title_en: Verification debt: the hidden cost of AI-generated code
items.title_zh: 验证债务：AI 生成代码的隐性成本
items.summary_en: Verification debt describes the hidden costs of AI-generated code—undiscovered bugs, subtle edge cases, and brittle correctness under change. The piece argues for stronger testing, auditing, and governance when relying on AI for software.
items.summary_zh: 验证债务指的是 AI 生成代码所带来的隐性成本——潜在未发现的缺陷、微小的边界情况，以及在变更下的脆弱性。文章主张在依赖 AI 编码时加强测试、审计与治理。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions
items.title_zh: Claude-replay：用于 Claude Code 会话的视频式回放工具
items.summary_en: Claude-replay is a video-like player for Claude Code sessions, letting users replay interactions to study reasoning steps, debugging approaches, or teaching others. It lowers the friction of understanding AI-assisted coding sessions.
items.summary_zh: Claude-replay 是一个用于 Claude Code 会话的“视频级”回放工具，便于复现推理过程、调试思路，或用于教学。降低了学习 AI 辅助编码的门槛。

items.title_en: Lil Finder Guy
items.title_zh: Lil Finder Guy
items.summary_en: Lil Finder Guy offers a playful look at macOS Finder, sharing quirks and practical tips for power users. It blends humor with actionable observations.
items.summary_zh: 《Lil Finder Guy》以轻松笔触审视 macOS Finder，分享面向高级用户的技巧与发现的怪癖，兼具幽默与实用性。

items.title_en: "That Shape Had None" – A Horror of Substrate Independence (Short Fiction)
items.title_zh: "That Shape Had None"：基底独立性恐惧的短篇小说
items.summary_en: A short fiction exploring the horror and philosophical tension around substrate independence—the idea minds can run on different hardware. The story argues that freeing a mind from one substrate doesn't guarantee safety or autonomy, raising existential questions about identity.
items.summary_zh: 这篇短篇小说探讨基底独立性这一概念的恐怖与哲学张力，即思想可以在不同硬件上运行。故事指出，摆脱特定底层硬件并不等同于自由或自主，提出身份与存在的本质性问题。

items.title_en: PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug
items.title_zh: USB-C 插头大小的 PCB 开发板
items.summary_en: A tiny PCB devboard the size of a USB-C connector enables ultra-compact hardware prototyping. It provides essential I/O for quick experiments and compact form-factor projects. The design signals momentum toward ultra-portable development boards for embedded projects.
items.summary_zh: 一个 USB-C 接头大小的极小 PCB 开发板，便于超紧凑型硬件原型制作。它提供进行快速实验所需的基本输入/输出，可能激发嵌入式开发的新型尺寸设计。非常适合现场测试和便携式原型开发。

items.title_en: Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024)
items.title_zh: Z80 Sans：以字体实现的反汇编器（2024）
items.summary_en: Z80 Sans is a font-based disassembler project from 2024, where the font glyphs encode Z80 opcodes, creating a playful fusion of typography and low-level tooling.
items.summary_zh: Z80 Sans 是一个 2024 年的字体反汇编项目，通过字体字形编码 Z80 指令，将排版与底层工具学进行巧妙结合。

items.title_en: A plastic made from milk that vanishes in 13 weeks
items.title_zh: 一种由牛奶制成、在 13 周内消失的塑料
items.summary_en: A milk-derived plastic that biodegrades in 13 weeks signals progress toward greener packaging, though scalability and performance under real-world conditions remain to be seen. Could disrupt single-use plastics if adopted widely.
items.summary_zh: 一种由牛奶成分制成、在 13 周内就会分解的塑料，显示出向更绿色包装迈进的潜力，但在实际应用中的规模化和性能还有待观察，如广泛采用可能改变一次性塑料格局。

items.title_en: The stagnancy of publishing and the disappearance of the midlist
items.title_zh: 出版停滞与中等畅销书的消失
items.summary_en: Traditional publishing has slowed, while midlist titles fade as platforms reward blockbuster hits. The piece argues this harms discovery for niche authors and readers, with broader implications for culture and the economics of editors.
items.summary_zh: 传统出版逐渐放缓，中篇图书逐渐消失，平台更偏向大热作品。文章认为这削弱了小众作者与读者的发现机会，对文化多样性和编辑行业经济都产生更广泛的影响。

items.title_en: Beagle, a source code management system that stores AST trees
items.title_zh: Beagle：存储 AST 树的源代码管理系统
items.summary_en: Beagle is a source-code management system that stores abstract syntax trees (ASTs) instead of plain text. This enables language-aware diffs, safer refactoring, and cross-language tooling by operating on structural code representations. The approach promises deeper code intelligence than traditional diff-based VCS.
items.summary_zh: Beagle 是一个以存储抽象语法树（AST）为核心的源代码管理系统，而非传统的文本存储。通过对代码结构的操作，可以实现语言感知的差异比较、更加安全的重构，以及跨语言的工具链协作。该方法在传统基于文本的版本控制之上带来更深层次的代码智能。

items.title_en: Process-Based Concurrency: Why Beam and OTP Keep Being Right
items.title_zh: 基于进程的并发：为什么 BEAM 与 OTP 一直正确
items.summary_en: The article argues that process-based concurrency on the BEAM VM (Erlang/Elixir) remains a robust model due to lightweight processes, isolation, and fault tolerance. It contrasts with thread-based models and advocates the continued relevance of BEAM/OTP for scalable, reliable systems.
items.summary_zh: BEAM VM（Erlang/Elixir）上的基于进程的并发模型因轻量进程、进程隔离与容错能力而依然强大，与线程模型相比具备更好的可扩展性与可靠性，因此继续适用于高可用系统。

items.title_en: Packaging a Gleam app into a single executable (2025)
items.title_zh: 将 Gleam 应用打包成单一可执行文件
items.summary_en: A guide to turning a Gleam app into a standalone executable, streamlining deployment and minimizing runtime dependencies. The approach simplifies distribution and makes sharing apps easier across environments.
items.summary_zh: 一份将 Gleam 应用打包成独立可执行文件的指南，简化部署并减少运行时依赖。此方法便于跨环境分发和分享应用。

items.title_en: Elevator Saga: The elevator programming game (2015)
items.title_zh: Elevator Saga：电梯编程游戏（2015）
items.summary_en: This browser game challenges players to optimize elevator scheduling under constraints, teaching concepts like concurrency, event-driven design, and systems thinking. It's a surprisingly effective sandbox for engineers to practice algorithmic thinking.
items.summary_zh: 这款浏览器游戏要求玩家在约束条件下优化电梯调度，涵盖并发、事件驱动设计与系统思维等概念。它意外成为训练工程师算法思考的高效沙盒。

items.title_en: How important was the Battle of Hastings?
items.title_zh: 哈斯廷斯战役有多重要？
items.summary_en: Historical analysis weighing the strategic and long-term cultural impact of the 1066 Battle of Hastings, using historiography and evidence to gauge its significance.
items.summary_zh: 评估1066年哈斯廷斯战役的战略影响及其对英国政治、语言和文化的长期影响，结合史学证据进行判断。

items.title_en: TeX Live 2026 is available for download now
items.title_zh: TeX Live 2026 已可下载
items.summary_en: TeX Live 2026 is released and ready for download, bringing updated TeX engines, thousands of package updates, and bug fixes. The release emphasizes improved security, performance, and compatibility with modern TeX workflows, making it a solid upgrade for researchers and writers relying on LaTeX.
items.summary_zh: TeX Live 2026 已发布，包含更新的 TeX 引擎、成千上万的包更新以及修复。新版本提升了安全性、性能与对现代 TeX 工作流的兼容性，适合研究者与 LaTeX 用户升级。

items.title_en: What if the Apple ][ had run on Field-Sequential?
items.title_zh: 如果 Apple II 在场序列显示下运行会怎样？
items.summary_en: A speculative look at how field-sequential color displays could have altered the Apple II's graphics and performance. The piece uses hardware constraints to illustrate how display tech shapes early personal computers and what-if scenarios reveal about hardware-software co-design.
items.summary_zh: 对若苹果二代电脑使用场序列色彩显示的设想进行了推演，探讨这会如何改变其图形与性能。文章以硬件约束为线索，说明显示技术如何塑造早期个人计算机，并通过设想场景揭示硬件与软件协同设计的重要性。

items.title_en: Next-gen spacecraft are overwhelming communication networks
items.title_zh: 新一代航天器正压垮通信网络
items.summary_en: As spacecraft become data-intensive, current communication networks struggle with bandwidth, latency, and reliability. The piece argues for redesigned space communication architectures and edge processing to meet mission demands.
items.summary_zh: 随着航天器数据密集化，现有通信网络在带宽、时延和可靠性方面面临挑战。文章主张对航天通信体系进行重新设计，并强化边缘处理以满足任务需求。

items.title_en: TypeScript 6.0 RC
items.title_zh: TypeScript 6.0 RC 发布
items.summary_en: TypeScript 6.0 RC introduces notable compiler and type-system enhancements, moving toward faster builds and stronger type guarantees. The release signals ongoing evolution of the language ecosystem and invites migration planning.
items.summary_zh: TypeScript 6.0 RC 带来显著的编译器与类型系统改进，追求更快的构建速度和更强的类型保障。发布也提示开发者需要制定迁移计划。

items.title_en: Guido van Rossum Interviews Thomas Wouters (Python Core Dev)
items.title_zh: Guido van Rossum 与 Thomas Wouters 的访谈
items.summary_en: Guid o van Rossum interviews Python core dev Thomas Wouters, offering insights into Python’s roadmap, governance, and performance improvements.
items.summary_zh: Guido 与Python核心开发者Thomas Wouters的访谈揭示了Python路线图、治理结构与性能改进的要点。

items.title_en: Querying 3B Vectors
items.title_zh: 查询30亿向量
items.summary_en: Examines strategies for querying 3 billion vectors at scale, outlining practical constraints like memory usage and indexing choices. It weighs exact versus approximate search and shares patterns useful for deploying vector-based ML systems in production.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在规模化向量检索场景下对30亿向量的查询策略，涉及内存占用、索引结构以及精确与近似检索的权衡。为把向量化模型落地到生产环境提供了有用的经验。

items.title_en: WSL Manager
items.title_zh: WSL 管理器
items.summary_en: WSL Manager is a distro manager for Windows Subsystem for Linux, streamlining tasks like install, switch, export/import, and version handling from a single interface.
items.summary_zh: WSL 管理器是一个用于 Windows Subsystem for Linux 的发行版管理工具，提供安装、切换、导出/导入和版本管理等一体化操作。

items.title_en: Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life
items.title_zh: 人工生命：一个简单的（300 行代码）计算生命的复现
items.summary_en: This 300-line reproduction of Computational Life offers an approachable entry point into simple artificial-life simulations and emergent behavior.
items.summary_zh: 这个 300 行代码的人工生命复现提供了一个易于入门的简单仿生仿真案例，展示涌现行为的基本原理。

items.title_en: Neocaml – Rubocop Creator's New OCaml Mode for Emacs
items.title_zh: Neocaml — Rubocop 创始人新建的 Emacs OCaml 模式
items.summary_en: Neocaml is an OCaml mode for Emacs from the creator of RuboCop, aiming to bring modern tooling into OCaml development. It provides improved editing, navigation, and integration with OCaml tooling to streamline OCaml coding in Emacs.
items.summary_zh: Neocaml 是 RuboCop 创始人推出的用于 Emacs 的 OCaml 模式，意在把现代开发工具带入 OCaml 开发。它提供更好的编辑、导航和与 OCaml 工具链的集成，帮助在 Emacs 中高效编写 OCAML 代码。

items.title_en: California's Digital Age Assurance Act, and FOSS
items.title_zh: 加州数字时代保障法与开源软件
items.summary_en: The post analyzes how California's Digital Age Assurance Act intersects with free and open source software in government procurement and governance. It highlights potential gains in transparency, security, and sustainability, while noting potential friction for vendors relying on proprietary stacks and the compliance burden. The guidance targets FOSS communities engaging with state policy.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了加州《数字时代保障法》与自由开源软件在政府采购及治理中的关系，强调透明度、安全性和可持续性方面的潜在收益，同时也指出对依赖专有生态的厂商以及合规成本的潜在挑战。核心在于为FOSS社区提供与政府采购及政策互动的路径和策略。

items.title_en: Payment fees matter more than you think
items.title_zh: 支付费用比你想象的更重要
items.summary_en: Payment processing fees can dramatically erode margins, especially for small businesses and developers who process many transactions. The piece quantifies the hidden costs across gateways and suggests strategies to reduce them, such as negotiating terms, using alternative rails, or optimizing checkout flow.
items.summary_zh: 支付处理费对利润的侵蚀往往比想象中更严重，尤其是对小型企业和大量交易的开发者。文章量化各类费率的隐藏成本，并给出降低支出、谈判条款或优化结账流程等实用建议。

items.title_en: From RGB to L*a*b* color space (2024)
items.title_zh: 从 RGB 到 L*a*b* 色彩空间（2024）
items.summary_en: A primer on converting between RGB and Lab color spaces, explaining why Lab is perceptually uniform and useful for color science. It offers practical notes for design and image processing.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 RGB 与 Lab 之间的转换要点，解释 Lab 在感知均匀性与颜色科学中的优势，并给出设计与图像处理的实用要点。

items.title_en: Enable CORS for Your Blog
items.title_zh: 为你的博客启用 CORS
items.summary_en: A pragmatic guide to enabling CORS on a blog, outlining how to configure response headers to allow cross-origin asset access while avoiding common pitfalls that may introduce security risks. Includes tips on when to enable, what to expose, and how to audit the impact.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供在博客上启用 CORS 的实用指南，讲解如何配置响应头以允许跨域资源访问，同时避免常见的安全隐患。包括何时开启、暴露哪些信息以及如何评估影响。

items.title_en: OpenBSD on SGI: A Rollercoaster Story
items.title_zh: 在 SGI 上运行 OpenBSD：一段跌宕起伏的经历
items.summary_en: Running OpenBSD on SGI hardware has proven challenging but rewarding, highlighting the fragility of porting modern OSes to aging platforms and the tenacity of the open-source community.
items.summary_zh: 在 SGI 硬件上运行 OpenBSD 的经历起伏明显，暴露出将现代操作系统移植到老旧平台的挑战，也体现了开源社区的韧性。

items.title_en: Data Has Weight but Only on SSDs
items.title_zh: 数据有重量，但只在 SSD 上显现
items.summary_en: Explores the idea that data has a practical weight that shows up in storage costs and management mainly on SSDs, shaping design and architecture decisions for modern systems.
items.summary_zh: 探讨数据具有实际重量这一观念在现代存储中对成本和管理的影响，尤其在 SSD 上更为显著，从而影响系统设计与架构决策。

items.title_en: Re-creating the complex cuisine of prehistoric Europeans
items.title_zh: 重现史前欧洲人的复杂饮食
items.summary_en: Researchers reconstruct prehistoric European diets through experimental cooking and isotope-informed sourcing to understand ancient meals. The work highlights culinary diversity and techniques, shedding light on social practices and trade in the past.
items.summary_zh: 研究者通过实验烹饪和同位素分析的饮食线索，重现史前欧洲人的饮食结构，探讨古代餐饮的多样性与技艺，以及社会组织与贸易网络的线索。

items.title_en: Zclaw – The 888 KiB Assistant
items.title_zh: Zclaw——888 KB 的助手
items.summary_en: Zclaw presents a compact, 888 KB AI assistant focused on lightweight usage and responsiveness, highlighting how small-footprint AI can still be useful without cloud dependencies. It demonstrates edge-friendly AI design.
items.summary_zh: Zclaw 是一个仅 888 KB 的紧凑型 AI 助手，强调在无云依赖的情况下也能实现快速、轻量级的使用体验。展示了边缘友好型 AI 的设计思路。

items.title_en: Art Bits from HyperCard
items.title_zh: HyperCard 的艺术片段
items.summary_en: HyperCard's art bits showcase creativity born within an early multimedia software environment. The collection highlights how early tools inspired later interactive media and design.
items.summary_zh: HyperCard 的艺术片段展现了早期多媒体环境中的创意表达。此收藏强调早期工具如何影响后来的交互媒介与设计。

items.title_en: Programmable Cryptography (2024)
items.title_zh: 可编程密码学
items.summary_en: Programmable cryptography discusses embedding cryptographic primitives into software pipelines, enabling flexible protocols, secure computation, or customizable encryption workflows.
items.summary_zh: 可编程密码学探讨将密码原语嵌入到软件流程中，以实现灵活的协议、可验证的安全计算或可定制的加密工作流。文章分析了可编程密码学如何扩展开发者实现安全功能的边界。

items.title_en: Show HN: Kula – Lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool
items.title_zh: Show HN：Kula——轻量且自包含的 Linux 服务器监控工具
items.summary_en: Show HN: Kula is a lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool with minimal dependencies. It aims to give small teams quick, actionable visibility into server health without building a heavy observability stack.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Kula 是一个轻量、独立部署的 Linux 服务器监控工具，依赖极少。它为小团队提供快速、可操作的服务器健康洞察，而无需搭建繁重的观测栈。

items.title_en: Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms
items.title_zh: 推动与拉扯：三种反应性算法
items.summary_en: Three reactivity algorithms are compared—push-based, pull-based, and a hybrid approach—highlighting trade-offs in consistency, latency, and complexity for UI and data-flow systems.
items.summary_zh: 对推送、拉取与混合三种响应式算法进行了对比，解释在 UI 与数据流系统中对一致性、时延与实现复杂度的取舍。

items.title_en: Stop Using Grey Text (2025)
items.title_zh: 停止使用灰色文本（2025）
items.summary_en: Argues that grey text with low contrast hurts readability and accessibility on modern screens. Recommends accessible color contrasts, typographic tweaks, and alignment with updated guidelines for 2025.
items.summary_zh: 指出低对比度的灰色文本会降低在现代屏幕上的可读性和无障碍性，应采用更易读的配色和排版。给设计师和开发者提供了符合2025年更新指南的实际建议。

items.title_en: An Interesting Find: STM32 RDP1 Decryptor
items.title_zh: STM32 RDP1 解密工具
items.summary_en: A find on decrypting STM32 RDP1 readout protection, highlighting its implications for reverse engineering and hardware security research. It raises debates about legitimate testing vs. potential misuse.
items.summary_zh: 关于 STM32 RDP1 读出保护的解密工具的发现，揭示了对逆向工程与硬件安全研究的影响，引发关于合法测试与潜在滥用的讨论。

items.title_en: Optimizing Recommendation Systems with JDK's Vector API
items.title_zh: 使用 JDK 向量 API 优化推荐系统
items.summary_en: Netflix explains how the JDK Vector API enables SIMD-accelerated operations in recommendation pipelines, boosting embedding lookups and matrix math performance, reducing latency and increasing throughput.
items.summary_zh: Netflix 讲解如何利用 JDK 向量 API 实现 SIMD 加速的推荐系统计算，提升嵌入查找与矩阵运算性能，从而降低延迟、提高吞吐。

items.title_en: Privacy-preserving age and identity verification via anonymous credentials
items.title_zh: 基于匿名凭证的隐私保护年龄与身份验证
items.summary_en: Anonymous credential schemes enable privacy-preserving age and identity verification, reducing data exposure while maintaining assurance. The piece outlines concepts and challenges for real-world deployment.
items.summary_zh: 匿名凭证方案在降低数据暴露的同时实现隐私保护的身份与年龄验证，文章梳理了核心概念及落地挑战与潜在收益。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你们在做什么？（2026年3月）
items.summary_en: A regular Ask HN thread where engineers share their current projects. Contributions span AI tooling, systems work, indie startups, and academic research. It offers a snapshot of what tech workers are prioritizing mid-2026.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个常规的 Ask HN 讨论，工程师们分享自己正在做的项目。帖子覆盖 AI 工具、系统、独立创业和研究等领域，能从中读出 2026 年中科技界的关注焦点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Curiosity – DIY 6" Newtonian Reflector Telescope
items.title_zh: Curiosity：DIY 6 英寸牛顿式望远镜
items.summary_en: A DIY guide and project showcase for a 6-inch Newtonian reflector telescope, including parts lists and assembly tips. It embodies open hardware culture and accessible astronomy for hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个 6 英寸牛顿式望远镜的 DIY 指南与项目展示，包含零件清单与组装要点，体现开放硬件文化与面向爱好者的天文观测的可及性。

items.title_en: Thirty years on, Pokémon is still a monster hit
items.title_zh: 三十年过后，宝可梦依然是票房巨星
items.summary_en: Pokémon remains a monster hit after three decades, a rare cultural and commercial phenomenon that sustains a sprawling ecosystem of games, media, and merchandise. Its longevity underscores the power of brand, community, and continuous product evolution in gaming.
items.summary_zh: 宝可梦在三十年后依然火力强劲，成为罕见的文化与商业现象，支撑着从游戏到媒体再到周边的庞大生态。其长寿证明了品牌、社区与持续迭代在游戏行业中的强大力量。

items.title_en: 48x32, a 1536 LED Game Computer (2023)
items.title_zh: 48x32：一台由1536颗 LED 构成的游戏计算机（2023）
items.summary_en: A compact, LED-based game computer built around a 48x32 LED matrix, released in 2023. The project blends hands-on hardware with retro aesthetics and demonstrates how tiny displays can host playable experiences. It serves as a playful proving ground for experimental UI and embedded software.
items.summary_zh: 基于 48x32 LED 矩阵的紧凑型游戏计算机，2023 年推出。该项目将硬件动手与复古美学结合，展示了小型显示屏也能承载可玩性体验的可能性，是对实验性 UI 与嵌入式软件的有趣试验场。

items.title_en: RCade: Building a Community Arcade Cabinet
items.title_zh: RCade：打造社区街机柜
items.summary_en: Documenting the build of a community arcade cabinet, including hardware choices, cabinet design, controls, and governance for shared use. It offers practical tips on wiring, emulation software, and sustaining the project.
items.summary_zh: 记录了搭建社区街机柜的过程，涵盖硬件选择、机箱设计、操作控件和共享使用的治理。给出布线、仿真软件与项目持续运营的实用建议。

items.title_en: On the Design of Programming Languages (1974) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 编程语言设计论（1974）
items.summary_en: A landmark 1974 treatise explores core design decisions in programming languages, balancing expressiveness, simplicity, and practicality. It offers timeless observations on language abstractions, syntax, and semantics that still influence modern language design.
items.summary_zh: 这篇1974年的里程碑式论文探讨了编程语言设计中的核心取舍，强调表达能力、简洁性与实用性的平衡。它提出的关于语言抽象、语法与语义的见解对现代语言设计仍具影响力。

items.title_en: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 思考与 GPT-5.4 专业版
items.summary_en: A look at GPT-5.4 Thinking and a Pro tier, likely highlighting enhanced reasoning, enterprise features, and additional safety controls for business use.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 GPT-5.4 思考与专业版，强调增强的推理能力、企业功能与面向商业用途的额外安全控制。

items.title_en: Indefinite Book Club Hiatus
items.title_zh: Indefinite Book Club Hiatus
items.summary_en: Indefinite hiatus for Scalzi's book club means readers should expect delays on new picks and discussions. It hints at author priorities and the challenges of keeping a collaborative reading community.
items.summary_zh: Scalzi 的读书会宣布无限期休会，意味着新书讨论可能延迟。此举反映了作者的时间安排与维持一个共同阅读社区的挑战。

items.title_en: Sem – Semantic version control. Entity-level diffs on top of Git
items.title_zh: Sem：语义版本控制，在 Git 之上实现实体级差异
items.summary_en: Sem introduces semantic version control on top of Git, using entity-level diffs to track changes beyond plain text. It aims to improve traceability, audits, and reproducibility for data- and structure-rich projects.
items.summary_zh: Sem 在 Git 之上实现语义化版本控制，按实体级别记录差异，超越文本层面的变更。目标是提升对数据与结构丰富项目的可追溯性、审计与可复现性。

items.title_en: Phi-4-reasoning-vision and the lessons of training a multimodal reasoning model
items.title_zh: Phi-4 推理视觉与训练多模态推理模型的经验教训
items.summary_en: Microsoft Research outlines Phi-4 reasoning-vision, a multimodal reasoning model, and distills lessons from scaling and training it. Topics include data strategies, evaluation, and architectural choices for cross-modal reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 微软研究院介绍 Phi-4 的推理-视觉跨模态模型，并总结在大规模训练中的经验教训，涵盖数据策略、评估方法与跨模态推理的架构选择。

items.title_en: Greg Kroah-Hartman Stretches Support Periods for Key Linux LTS Kernels
items.title_zh: Greg Kroah-Hartman 延长关键 Linux LTS 内核的支持期
items.summary_en: Linux kernel maintainer Greg Kroah-Hartman extends support windows for major LTS kernels, improving enterprise stability and reducing upgrade churn.
items.summary_zh: Linux 内核维护者 Greg Kroah-Hartman 延长了关键 LTS 内核的支持周期，提升企业稳定性并降低升级成本。

items.title_en: Xous security focused open source on 22nm custom silicon
items.title_zh: 22nm 自定义硅工艺的 Xous 安全导向开源操作系统
items.summary_en: Xous is a security-focused open-source OS designed for a 22nm custom BaoChip silicon platform, with emphasis on a small trusted code base and formal security properties. The update introduces BaoChip 1.x support and related hardening features, illustrating the growing ecosystem of open-source firmware for bespoke hardware.
items.summary_zh: Xous 是一个面向安全设计的开源操作系统，面向 22nm 定制 BaoChip 芯片，并强调小型可信代码库与形式化的安全属性。此次更新引入 BaoChip 1.x 支持与相关的加固特性，体现了为定制硬件构建的开源固件生态日益成熟。

items.title_en: Buckle Up for Bumpier Skies
items.title_zh: 系好安全带，迎接更颠簸的天空：气候变化对航空的影响
items.summary_en: Climate change is driving more frequent and severe turbulence, reshaping aircraft design, engines, and flight operations.
items.summary_zh: 气候变化导致更频繁且更剧烈的颠簸，正在改变飞机设计、发动机和飞行操作的方方面面。

items.title_en: The Cathode Ray Tube site
items.title_zh: 阴极射线管站点
items.summary_en: A didactic resource site about CRT technology, history, and hands-on demonstrations, offering diagrams and explanations that help learners understand this classic display technology.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个关于阴极射线管技术、历史与教学演示的资源站，提供示意图和解释，帮助学习者理解这一经典显示技术。

items.title_en: Greg Knauss Is Losing Himself
items.title_zh: Greg Knauss 正在迷失自我
items.summary_en: A personal essay exploring identity, self-doubt, and the toll of online life in the tech world. It offers reflections on burnout and finding authenticity beyond career metrics.
items.summary_zh: 这篇个人随笔探讨在科技行业中对自我认同和自我怀疑的感受，以及网络生活对身心的影响。文章提供关于职业倦怠与在职业指标之外寻找真实自我的思考。

items.title_en: Lock Scroll with a Vengeance
items.title_zh: 铁腕锁定滚动
items.summary_en: Examines techniques to lock page scrolling during UI interactions like modals or reading modes, covering CSS tricks and JavaScript approaches with attention to cross-browser reliability and edge cases.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在模态框、阅读模式等场景下强制锁定页面滚动的实现方法，涵盖 CSS 与 JavaScript 的做法，并关注跨浏览器的鲁棒性与边界情况。

items.title_en: Show HN: Skir – like Protocol Buffer but better
items.title_zh: Show HN：Skir——像 Protocol Buffer 一样，但更好
items.summary_en: Skir is pitched as a serialization format superior to Protocol Buffers, offering easier schemas, faster iteration, or improved ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Skir 被宣传为比 Protocol Buffers 更出色的序列化格式，提供更简单的模式定义、快速迭代和更友好的开发体验。文中点出设计取向以及潜在的性能或开发者体验上的改进。

items.title_en: C64: Putting Sprite Multiplexing to Work
items.title_zh: C64：让精灵多路复用发挥作用
