items.summary_en: Sprite multiplexing on the Commodore 64 demonstrates how developers circumvent hardware limits to display more graphics and smoother animation, a testament to retro programming ingenuity.
items.summary_zh: 在C64上通过精灵多路复用突破硬件限制，展示了显示更多精灵和更流畅动画的技巧，体现复古编程的创造力。

items.title_en: CLI RSS/Atom feed reader inspired by Taskwarrior, synced using Git
items.title_zh: 命令行 RSS/Atom 阅读器，灵感来自 Taskwarrior，并通过 Git 同步
items.summary_en: A command-line RSS/Atom reader modeled after Taskwarrior, with data synchronized via Git for versioning. Designed for developers who want lightweight, offline-friendly feed management with portable configuration.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个命令行 RSS/Atom 阅读器，灵感来自 Taskwarrior，数据通过 Git 进行同步和版本控制，适合偏好轻量、离线友好且便携配置的开发者。

items.title_en: The 185-Microsecond Type Hint
items.title_zh: 185 微秒级的类型提示
items.summary_en: A microbenchmark reveals a type hint operation with about 185 microseconds of overhead, illustrating how lightweight static typing can be in practice. The post argues for the feasible incorporation of type hints in performance-sensitive code.
items.summary_zh: 一项微基准测试显示类型提示操作的开销约为185微秒，说明在实际场景中静态类型标注的成本可以很低。文章探讨在对性能敏感的代码中加入类型提示的可行性。

items.title_en: What Python’s asyncio primitives get wrong about shared state
items.title_zh: Python 的 asyncio 原语在共享状态方面哪里错了
items.summary_en: Python's asyncio primitives can mishandle shared state, leading to subtle race conditions or lost updates in concurrent code. The piece surveys patterns that avoid these pitfalls, such as explicit synchronization, avoiding shared mutable state, and using higher-level abstractions.
items.summary_zh: Python 的 asyncio 原语在处理共享状态时容易出错，可能在并发代码中出现细微的竞争条件或丢失更新。文章探讨了避免这些坑的模式，如显式同步、避免共享可变状态，以及使用更高层的抽象。

items.title_en: Faster C software with Dynamic Feature Detection
items.title_zh: 用动态特征检测提升 C 软件性能
items.summary_en: Shows how dynamic feature detection can enable faster C code by selecting optimized paths at run time, trading a bit of complexity for performance gains on diverse hardware. Includes practical notes on implementation pitfalls and portability.
items.summary_zh: 展示了动态特征检测如何通过在运行时选择优化路径来提升 C 代码性能，在不同硬件上换取性能提升，同时需权衡实现难度和可移植性。

items.title_en: LFortran compiles fpm
items.title_zh: LFortran 实现对 fpm 的编译支持
items.summary_en: The LFortran project has added support to compile the Fortran Package Manager (fpm), signaling maturity of the Fortran ecosystem and easing dependency management for projects. This aligns performance-oriented scientific computing with modern tooling.
items.summary_zh: LFortran 现已实现对 Fortran 包管理器 fpm 的编译支持，标志着 Fortran 生态系统的成熟并简化依赖管理。此举让面向科学计算的性能化工作流更易接入现代工具链。

items.title_en: Bourdieu's theory of taste: a grumbling abrégé (2023)
items.title_zh: 布迪厄的品味理论：简要概述
items.summary_en: The abridged view of Bourdieu’s theory distills habitus, cultural capital, and social distinction into digestible ideas. It explains how tastes signal class, shape exposure to opportunities, and influence cultural markets.
items.summary_zh: 简要梳理了布迪厄的习惯世界、文化资本与社会分层的核心思想，解释了品味如何标识阶层、影响机会获取与推动文化市场运作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Eyot, A programming language where the GPU is just another thread
items.title_zh: Eyot：GPU 只是另一条线程的编程语言
items.summary_en: Eyot treats the GPU as just another thread, offering a unified model for parallelism. The language design highlights how scheduling GPU work like regular threads could simplify certain compute tasks.
items.summary_zh: Eyot 把 GPU 当作普通线程对待，提供统一的并行计算模型。其设计强调将 GPU 工作像普通线程一样调度，可能简化某些计算任务的实现。

items.title_en: We automated everything except knowing what's going on
items.title_zh: 我们把一切都自动化了，唯独不知道发生了什么
items.summary_en: A reflection on over-automation where processes are automated but insiders lose sight of what is actually happening, highlighting the need for better observability and human context.
items.summary_zh: 对过度自动化的反思——流程被自动化，却难以把握真实发生了什么，凸显提升可观测性与保留人类判断的重要性。

items.title_en: To the Polypropylene Makers
items.title_zh: 致聚丙烯制造者
items.summary_en: A thoughtful homage to polypropylene makers, reflecting on the role of durable plastics in modern hardware, packaging, and sustainability. It ties material science to practical engineering and long-term design thinking.
items.summary_zh: 致敬聚丙烯材料的制造者，反映耐用塑料在现代硬件、包装与可持续发展中的作用。将材料科学与工程实践、长期设计思维联系起来。

items.title_en: Billy bookshelves as a retro motherboard "rack"
items.title_zh: Billy 书架改造为复古主板机架
items.summary_en: A maker repurposes an IKEA Billy bookcase into a modular rack for retro computer hardware, turning affordable furniture into a practical display and storage solution.
items.summary_zh: 一位制作爱好者将 IKEA 的 Billy 书架改造成复古主板机架，将廉价家具变成实用且可扩展的硬件展示与存储系统。

items.title_en: The Rust calling convention we deserve (2024)
items.title_zh: 我们应得的 Rust 调用约定（2024）
items.summary_en: Reviews the Rust calling convention landscape and argues for more ergonomic, stable ABI improvements that ease FFI and cross-language interop.
items.summary_zh: 评估了 Rust 调用约定的现状，并主张更为人性化、稳定的 ABI 改进，以简化外部接口和跨语言互操作。文章强调了具体权衡，以及更佳的调用约定将如何提升性能与安全性。

items.title_en: LLMs can unmask pseudonymous users at scale with surprising accuracy
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型能在大规模上揭露伪匿名用户，精度出人意料
items.summary_en: LLMs can unmask pseudonymous users at scale with surprising accuracy
items.summary_zh: 最新研究显示，LLMs 能在大规模范围内以出人意料的高准确率揭示伪匿名用户，利用文本风格和公开元数据等线索。此现象引发对隐私保护的重大担忧，并促使加强去标识化和相关治理。

items.title_en: The Banality of Surveillance
items.title_zh: 监控的平凡性
items.summary_en: Surveillance is described as a banal, everyday feature of modern life, embedded in devices and apps. The piece urges readers to rethink privacy design and push for better safeguards and transparency.
items.summary_zh: 监控已成为现代生活中平凡且无处不在的一部分，嵌入在各类设备与应用中。文章呼吁重新审视隐私设计，并推动更完善的保护与透明度。

items.title_en: I made a programming language with M&Ms
items.title_zh: 我用 M&M 做了一门编程语言
items.summary_en: I built a programming language using M&Ms as tokens, illustrating language design concepts through a playful, edible interpreter project.
items.summary_zh: 用 M&Ms 做记号开发了一门编程语言，用于以轻松的方式展示语言设计与解释器的概念。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Palus Finance（YC W26）：为初创和中小企业闲置现金提供更高收益
items.summary_en: Palus Finance aims to optimize yields on idle corporate cash for startups and SMBs, offering treasury-style products designed for small balances. Backed by YC's W26 batch, it arrives as founders seek yield without sacrificing liquidity or safety.
items.summary_zh: Palus Finance 目标是为初创和中小企业的闲置现金提供更高的收益，像企业金库工具一样管理短期资金。来自 YC 第26期，面向小额余额的低风险、可流动性保障的收益方案，帮助企业提升现金回报。

items.title_en: Against Query Based Compilers
items.title_zh: 反对基于查询的编译器
items.summary_en: Matklad argues against query-based compilers, citing concerns about correctness, maintainability, and optimization potential in such pipelines. The post advocates more explicit, IR-driven designs and modular compilation stages.
items.summary_zh: Matklad 反对基于查询的编译器，指出此类流水线在正确性、可维护性与优化潜力方面存在问题。文中倡导采用更明确的中间表示和模块化的编译阶段。

items.title_en: Datasets for Reconstructing Visual Perception from Brain Data
items.title_zh: 用于从大脑数据重建视觉感知的数据集
items.summary_en: A collection of datasets and indices for reconstructing visual perception from brain activity, enabling advances in neuroimaging, brain-computer interfaces, and vision-inspired ML research.
items.summary_zh: 发布了一组用于从脑部活动重建视觉感知的数据集与索引，为神经影像学、脑机接口以及以视觉为灵感的机器学习研究提供支撑。

items.title_en: Converting dash cam videos into Panoramax images
items.title_zh: 将行车记录仪视频转换为 Panoramax 图像
items.summary_en: Describes a workflow to convert dash-cam footage into Panoramax-style panorama images for mapping. The process involves frame extraction, stitching, and projection steps, enabling richer, near-real-time mapping coverage.
items.summary_zh: 介绍将行车记录仪视频转换成 Panoramax 风格全景图的工作流，涵盖帧提取、拼接与投影等步骤，从而提升地图覆盖与制图能力。

items.title_en: My Favorite 39C3 Talks
items.title_zh: 我最喜欢的39C3 演讲
items.summary_en: The author distills favorite talks from the 39C3 conference, covering security, privacy, hardware, and open ecosystems. The picks offer practical ideas and inspirations for practitioners exploring the intersection of tech and society.
items.summary_zh: 作者精选了 39C3 大会中的演讲，涵盖安全、隐私、硬件与开放生态等主题，为从业者提供实用启发与跨界思考。

items.title_en: Lisp-style C++ template meta programming
items.title_zh: Lisp 风格的 C++ 模板元编程
items.summary_en: Discusses using Lisp-like techniques in C++ template metaprogramming, leveraging functional styles and S-expression-inspired patterns to improve expressiveness and possibly reduce boilerplate.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在 C++ 模板元编程中应用 Lisp 风格的技巧，利用函数式风格和受 S 表达式启发的模式来提升表达力，或减轻样板代码。

items.title_en: Modern Illustration: Archive of illustration from c.1950-1975
items.title_zh: 现代插画：二十世纪中叶至1975年的插图档案
items.summary_en: An online archive curates mid-20th-century illustration, offering designers a rich source of style references and historical context. The collection highlights how art history informs contemporary UI and branding.
items.summary_zh: 这个在线档案整理了二十世纪中叶至 1975 年的插图资源，为设计师提供丰富的风格参考与历史背景。该收藏强调艺术史如何影响当代界面与品牌设计。

items.title_en: 19th century silent film that first captured a robot attack
items.title_zh: 19世纪首部记录机器人攻击的无声电影
items.summary_en: Georges Méliès’s late-19th-century silent film capturing a robot attack offers a rare glimpse into early cinema’s imagination of automation. It highlights how 1890s filmmakers serialized tech-driven fantasy and influenced later sci-fi storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 乔治·梅里埃斯19世纪末的一部无声电影首次呈现机器人攻击，提供了对早期电影对自动化幻想的珍贵观察。影片展现了当时对科技题材的想象力，并影响了后来的科幻叙事。

items.title_en: GLiNER2: Unified Schema-Based Information Extraction
items.title_zh: GLiNER2：统一的基于模式的信息抽取
items.summary_en: GLiNER2 extends unified schema-based information extraction, offering a common framework for pulling structured data across domains. By anchoring extractions to shared schemas, it simplifies data integration and improves model interoperability. The project aims to reduce bespoke extraction work and accelerate downstream analytics.
items.summary_zh: GLiNER2 将统一的基于模式的信息抽取扩展到一个通用框架，支持跨领域提取结构化数据。通过将抽取结果锚定于共享的模式，简化数据集成并提高模型的互操作性。该项目旨在减少定制化抽取工作，加速后续分析流程。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Vela (YC W26) – AI for complex scheduling
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Vela（YC W26）— 复杂调度的 AI
items.summary_en: Vela uses AI to manage scheduling across complex calendars and constraints, reducing back-and-forth and improving coordination efficiency for teams.
items.summary_zh: Vela 通过 AI 管理跨复杂日历和约束的调度，减少来回沟通、提升团队协调效率。

items.title_en: Speculative Speculative Decoding (SSD)
items.title_zh: 推测性解码（SSD）
items.summary_en: Speculative Decoding speeds up autoregressive generation by using a fast draft decoder to propose tokens, with a larger model later verifying and finalizing them. The extended approach improves throughput while preserving quality, clarifying deployment considerations and trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 本文提出的推测性解码策略通过一个快速的草拟解码器先给出候选标记，再由更大模型进行验证和最终确认，以降低推理成本并尽量保持输出质量。扩展版本在吞吐量和质量之间权衡，讨论了在实际部署中的应用要点和潜在挑战。

items.title_en: Pass-Through of Tariffs: Evidence from European Wine Imports
items.title_zh: 关税的传导：来自欧洲葡萄酒进口的证据
items.summary_en: An NBER digest shows tariff changes partially pass through to European wine prices, with varying pass-through across channels and time. The finding informs policy debates about tariff design, consumer impact, and supply chain dynamics in a regulated market.
items.summary_zh: 一项 NBER 摘要显示关税变动对欧洲葡萄酒价格存在一定程度的传导效应，传导程度因渠道与时点而异。研究结果为关税设计、消费者影响以及供应链在受监管市场中的动态提供了证据。

items.title_en: Swiss vote places right to use cash in country's constitution
items.title_zh: 瑞士公投将现金使用权写入宪法
items.summary_en: Switzerland's vote enshrines a constitutional right to use cash, shaping future debates on digital payments, privacy, and financial inclusion. The ruling could influence how retail, banking, and regulators balance cash and electronic transactions.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士公投将现金支付权写入宪法，影响未来数字支付、隐私保护与金融包容性的讨论。

items.title_en: Why it takes you and an elephant the same amount of time to poop (2017)
items.title_zh: 为什么你和大象排便需要同样的时间
items.summary_en: The piece explains that physiological transit time scales are dominated by gut dynamics, not body size, leading to surprisingly similar times across mammals. The piece uses this biology insight to illuminate how scaling laws shape everyday phenomena.
items.summary_zh: 文中解释排便时间并非随体型线性放大，而是受肠道动力学控制，因此多种哺乳动物的排便时间其实相近。以此为例，讨论尺度规律如何影响日常现象与生物学的实际意义。

items.title_en: Screeching Sound of Peeling Tape
items.title_zh: 剥离胶带时的刺耳声
items.summary_en: The study analyzes why peeling tape emits a squeal, attributing it to stick-slip dynamics and peeling angle. It notes implications for material science and robotics grippers.
items.summary_zh: 该研究分析了撕开胶带时发出尖锐声响的原因，归因于粘滑动力学与撕离角度。研究结果对材料科学和机器人夹持等领域具有启示意义。

items.title_en: You are going to get priced out of the best AI coding tools
items.title_zh: 你将被最好的 AI 编码工具的定价挡在外
items.summary_en: Leading AI-powered coding tools are moving beyond affordable tiers, raising the cost of benefiting from AI-assisted development. This pricing squeeze could push individuals and small teams toward open-source alternatives, longer on-prem solutions, or tighter usage to stay within budget. The trend matters because it directly affects developer productivity and tool accessibility in the AI era.
items.summary_zh: 领先的 AI 编码工具定价正向更高的门槛迈进，影响个人开发者和小团队的使用成本。为维持成本效益，可能推动转向开源替代品、本地化方案或更高效的使用策略。这个趋势关系到开发者生产力和在 AI 时代对工具的可得性。

items.title_en: Editing changes in patch format with Jujutsu
items.title_zh: 使用 Jujutsu 编辑补丁格式的改动
items.summary_en: Demonstrates editing incremental changes using patch format with the Jujutsu tool, enabling precise version control for both text and binary changes. It illustrates practical workflows for patch-based collaboration and reversible edits.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何使用 Jujutsu 工具在补丁格式中编辑增量改动，实现对文本与二进制变更的高精度版本控制，提供可操作的补丁协作与可回滚的工作流示例。

items.title_en: Supertoast tables
items.title_zh: Supertoast 表格
items.summary_en: Supertoast tables is a blog post about a data representation technique for rendering large tabular datasets efficiently. It argues for clever caching and streaming strategies to keep UI snappy even with big tables.
items.summary_zh: 《Supertoast 表格》讨论了一种高效呈现大规模表格数据的技术思路。通过缓存与流式加载等策略，目标是在处理海量表格时保持用户界面的响应性。

items.title_en: Apache Otava
items.title_zh: Apache Otava 项目
items.summary_en: Apache Otava is presented as a new Apache-backed cloud-native effort aimed at scalable data workloads. It points to a governance-forward approach for building and operating distributed systems and could influence how developers deploy real-time apps.
items.summary_zh: Apache Otava 被描述为 Apache 背书的新型云原生项目，面向可扩展的数据工作负载。强调以治理为中心的分布式系统构建与运维方式，可能影响开发者在实时应用中的部署选择。

items.title_en: Earth Garden: Field Recordings Around the World
items.title_zh: Earth Garden：全球田野录音
items.summary_en: A project collecting field recordings from across the world forms an accessible sonic archive of natural and cultural soundscapes.
items.summary_zh: 一个收集全球田野录音的项目，打造了一个可访问的声音档案，覆盖自然与文化场景。

items.title_en: You can't use a code editor when you're under 18 now?
items.title_zh: 未满18岁就不能使用代码编辑器了吗？
items.summary_en: You can't use a code editor when you're under 18 now?
items.summary_zh: 关于未成年人使用代码编辑器的年龄限制的观点讨论，质疑此类规定是否阻碍青少年学习编程，并探讨应如何制定合适的政策。

items.title_en: The IRIX 6.5.7M (sgi) source code
items.title_zh: IRIX 6.5.7M（sgi）源代码
items.summary_en: The release of SGI’s IRIX 6.5.7M source code, providing researchers and enthusiasts access to legacy OS internals and enabling emulation or study projects.
items.summary_zh: 公开了 SGI 的 IRIX 6.5.7M 源代码，为研究者与爱好者提供对遗留操作系统内部结构的访问，支持仿真或研究项目。

items.title_en: Modernizing swapping: virtual swap spaces
items.title_zh: 现代化换出：虚拟交换空间
items.summary_en: Discusses modernization of swap mechanisms through virtual swap spaces, aiming to improve memory isolation, performance, and scalability in modern OS and virtualization setups. It covers policy choices and interoperability considerations.
items.summary_zh: 探讨通过虚拟交换空间现代化换出机制，提升现代操作系统与虚拟化环境中的内存隔离、性能和扩展性，涵盖策略选择与互操作性问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pianoterm – Run shell commands from your Piano. A Linux CLI tool
items.title_zh: Pianoterm：通过钢琴按键运行 shell 命令的 Linux CLI 工具
items.summary_en: Pianoterm maps shell commands to piano keys, letting users trigger terminal actions with a MIDI-like interface. It's a playful, practical example of periphery-driven productivity and could inspire more creative tooling around command-line workflows.
items.summary_zh: Pianoterm 将 shell 命令映射到钢琴按键，使用户能够通过像 MIDI 一样的界面触发终端操作。这是对外设驱动生产力的一种趣味且实用的示例，或将激发更多命令行工作流的创意工具。

items.title_en: GPT 5.4 Thinking and Pro
items.title_zh: GPT 5.4 Thinking 与 Pro 版本
items.summary_en: A closer look at GPT-5.4 Thinking and the Pro tier, detailing how improved reasoning and enterprise-grade controls enable safer, scalable AI deployment.
items.summary_zh: 深入解读 GPT-5.4 Thinking 与 Pro 版本，阐述改进的推理能力与企业级控制如何实现更安全、可扩展的 AI 部署。

items.title_en: Hacking Super Mario 64 using covering spaces
items.title_zh: 用覆盖空间破解《超级马里奥64》
items.summary_en: Explores applying covering spaces from topology to visualize and hack level geometry in Mario 64, revealing new shortcuts or gameplay tricks. Bridges abstract math with game modding and demonstrates how theoretical concepts can inspire practical exploits.
items.summary_zh: 通过覆盖空间这一拓扑学工具来建模并可视化《超级马里奥64》的关卡几何，揭示新的解锁路径与游戏技巧。展示了抽象数学如何转化为游戏 mod 的创意与实践。

items.title_en: You need to rewrite your CLI for AI agents
items.title_zh: 你需要为 AI 代理重写你的命令行界面
items.summary_en: Traditional CLIs often undercut the capabilities of AI agents due to rigid command structures. The post advocates rewriting a CLI to support state, orchestration, and structured prompts so AI agents can operate more reliably across multi-step tasks. It argues a modern CLI should separate interface from model, enabling better testing and composability.
items.summary_zh: 传统的命令行界面对 AI 代理的能力造成限制，往往因结构僵硬而难以支撑多步任务。文章主张重写 CLI，加入状态管理、编排和结构化提示，使 AI 代理在多步任务中更可靠地工作。它强调将界面与模型解耦以提升可测试性与组合性。

items.title_en: Talos: Hardware accelerator for deep convolutional neural networks
items.title_zh: Talos 是面向深度卷积神经网络的硬件加速器
items.summary_en: Talos is a hardware accelerator for deep CNNs
items.summary_zh: Talos 是面向深度卷积神经网络的硬件加速器，目标在高吞吐与能效方面取得提升。设计细节与潜在应用场景涵盖从边缘推理到数据中心的部署。

items.title_en: Why No AI Games?
items.title_zh: 为什么没有 AI 游戏？
items.summary_en: Explores reasons AI-generated games haven't dominated the space, including design constraints, player agency, and development risk. It weighs barrier to creative control, tooling maturity, and market structure as factors shaping AI game adoption.
items.summary_zh: 分析为什么 AI 生成的游戏尚未主导市场，讨论设计约束、玩家自主性、开发风险等因素，以及工具成熟度与市场结构在 AI 游戏普及中的作用。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How many of you hold an amateur radio license in your country?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你们中有多少人在各自国家持有业余无线电执照？
items.summary_en: Ask HN invites anecdotes on amateur radio licensing across countries, highlighting regulatory diversity, hobbyist communities, and the role of radio in emergencies and education.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN 征集各国业余无线电执照的经验与制度差异，展示业余无线电社区的活力，以及在应急通信和教育中的作用。

items.title_en: If It Quacks Like a Package Manager
items.title_zh: 若它的行为像包管理器
items.summary_en: Argues for evaluating tools by behavior, not labels, and outlines criteria that define a package manager, such as dependency resolution, packaging artifacts, and registries. It challenges readers to rethink what qualifies as a package manager in modern tooling.
items.summary_zh: 强调按行为而非标签来评估工具，列出定义包管理器的标准，如依赖解析、打包产物和注册表等。促使读者重新思考在现代工具链中，什么算是包管理器。

items.title_en: Go-Native Durable Execution
items.title_zh: Go-native 持久执行
items.summary_en: It emphasizes IPC boundaries, serialization, and reliability guarantees for long-running services.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍了一种 Go 原生的持久执行方案，聚焦实现容错、可持久化的进程，在重启后能快速恢复且开销低。内容涵盖进程间通信、序列化与对长期运行服务的可靠性保证。

items.title_en: Cameras built to police Iranians became the regime's Achilles' heel
items.title_zh: 用来监控伊朗民众的摄像头成了政权的致命弱点
items.summary_en: Describes how surveillance cameras deployed to police Iranians exposed vulnerabilities or became leverage for opposition, undermining control and prompting adaptation by both authorities and dissidents. Highlights the paradox of mass surveillance tech in fragile regimes.
items.summary_zh: 描述用于监控伊朗民众的摄像头如何暴露脆弱性、成为反对势力的筹码，从而削弱政权控制并促使当局与异见者都在适应。凸显大规模监控技术在脆弱政权中的两难局面。

items.title_en: BlackRock limits withdrawals as redemptions rattle private credit fund
items.title_zh: BlackRock 限制赎回，私募信贷基金赎回潮涌动
items.summary_en: BlackRock limits withdrawals from a private credit fund as redemptions surge, signaling liquidity stress and prompting questions about the credit market's resilience and investor confidence.
items.summary_zh: 随着赎回潮涌，BlackRock 对私募信贷基金设定取现上限，暴露出流动性压力与投资者信心的担忧，并对信贷市场的韧性提出质疑。

items.title_en: Number Research Inc
items.title_zh: Number Research Inc 公司
items.summary_en: Number Research Inc appears to be a company focused on numerical research and related tools.
items.summary_zh: Number Research Inc 是一家专注于数值研究及相关工具的公司。

items.title_en: A bit of fluid mechanics from scratch not from scratch
items.title_zh: 从头讲解一点流体力学
items.summary_en: A primer on fluid mechanics introduced from first principles, clarifying common misconceptions. It offers quick, actionable insights into flow, pressure, and boundary effects for engineers and scientists.
items.summary_zh: 本文从第一性原理出发，简要讲解流体力学的核心概念，帮助读者纠正常见误解。内容聚焦流动、压力及边界效应的要点，适合工程和研究工作者快速把握。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Would you use a job board where every listing is verified?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：如果每条招聘信息都经过验证，你会使用这样的招聘网站吗？
items.summary_en: Discussion about a job board where every listing is verified for authenticity. People discuss whether a fully verified job board would improve trust and safety for job seekers. The thread weighs benefits like fewer scams against the costs of verification and potential friction in posting.
items.summary_zh: 讨论一个全部经过验证的招聘信息网站是否会提升求职者的信任与安全。帖文权衡验证带来的好处（减少诈骗）与验证成本和发贴门槛等潜在负面影响。

items.title_en: Language Model Contains Personality Subnetworks
items.title_zh: 语言模型包含人格子网络
items.summary_en: A study suggests language models contain latent subnetworks encoding personality traits, with implications for alignment, safety, and controllability. Raises questions about how to steer or audit model behavior.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明语言模型内含潜在的人格子网络，与对齐、安全和可控性等议题相关，引发关于如何引导和审计模型行为的新问题。

items.title_en: Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021)
items.title_zh: Linux 内核内幕：/proc/self/mem 如何向不可写内存写入（2021）
items.summary_en: The piece reveals a quirky mechanism whereby /proc/self/mem can write to memory regions that appear unwritable, exposing a subtle bypass in memory protection. It underscores how Linux exposes process memory to tooling and the potential risks for security researchers and attackers. The takeaway is to be mindful of /proc exposure when hardening systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示 /proc/self/mem 竟能写入看似不可写的内存区域，暴露了内存保护的微妙绕行。它强调 Linux 将进程内存暴露给工具的方式带来的潜在安全风险，既有利于研究也可能被利用。加固系统时应警惕对 /proc 的暴露。

items.title_en: Show HN: Web Audio Studio – A Visual Debugger for Web Audio API Graphs
items.title_zh: Show HN: Web Audio Studio – A Visual Debugger for Web Audio API Graphs
items.summary_en: Web Audio Studio provides a visual debugger for Web Audio API graphs, helping developers inspect nodes, connections, and audio routing in real time. This can accelerate debugging complex audio pipelines and prototyping audio apps.
items.summary_zh: Web Audio Studio 提供用于 Web Audio API 图形的可视化调试器，帮助开发者实时查看节点、连接与音频路由。对于调试复杂音频管线和原型化音频应用非常有用。

items.title_en: The Case of the Disappearing Secretary
items.title_zh: 消失的秘书案
items.summary_en: A narrative piece investigating a mysterious disappearance of a secretary, using the case to illuminate workplace dynamics, data trails, and governance in tech environments. It links human factors to organizational processes and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 以一桩秘书失踪之案为线索，揭示职场动态、数据痕迹与科技工作环境中的治理与问责关系，强调人因在组织流程中的作用。

items.title_en: Ten years of deploying to production
items.title_zh: 投产十年：生产环境部署之路
items.summary_en: After a decade of deploying to production, the author distills lessons on release engineering, automation, and incident response. The takeaways emphasize gradual change, feature flags, observability, and disciplined postmortems to improve reliability.
items.summary_zh: 经过十年的生产环境部署，作者总结了在发布工程、自动化与事件响应方面的经验。关键要点包括渐进式变更、特性开关、可观测性，以及通过严谨的事后分析来提升系统可靠性。

items.title_en: Libxml2 Enterprise Edition (AGPL, from the previous maintainer)
items.title_zh: Libxml2 企业版（来自前维护者，采用 AGPL 许可）
items.summary_en: Libxml2 Enterprise Edition is released under AGPL by the previous maintainer, raising licensing concerns for corporate users who rely on proprietary software with XML parsing. The AGPL terms require sharing improvements when used over network, which affects embedded and SaaS deployments.
items.summary_zh: Libxml2 Enterprise Edition 由前维护者以 AGPL 许可发布，令依赖该库的企业用户对许可条款产生关注，因为 AGPL 在网络使用场景下要求公开源代码。此举对嵌入式、SaaS 部署及商业使用的合规性产生影响，文中讨论了许可含义与社区分叉的潜在影响。

items.title_en: 1.5 Million Users Leave ChatGPT
items.title_zh: 150万用户离开 ChatGPT
items.summary_en: Mass user churn around ChatGPT signals shifting user sentiment, pricing, or feature tradeoffs, prompting questions about retention and competition in consumer AI. The story underscores how rapidly AI products must adapt to user expectations.
items.summary_zh: 大量用户流失反映用户情绪、定价或功能取舍的变化，给消费级 AI 的留存和竞争态势带来质疑。强调 AI 产品需要迅速适应用户期望。

items.title_en: The largest acidic geyser has been putting on quite a show
items.title_zh: 全球最大的酸性间歇泉最近再次活跃，景象震撼
items.summary_en: The world's largest acidic geyser is showing renewed activity with dramatic eruptions. Scientists monitor changes to geothermal features and what they reveal about hydrothermal systems and climate interactions.
items.summary_zh: 全球最大的酸性间歇泉最近再次活跃，喷发规模引人注目。科学家正在持续观测这一地热景观的变化，以了解热液系统及其对环境的潜在影响。

items.title_en: FCC Chair Wants Networks to Pledge Loyalty for America's Big Bday
items.title_zh: FCC 主席希望网络为美国大型节日宣誓忠诚
items.summary_en: Reports that the FCC chair is pressing networks to pledge loyalty by broadcasting nationalistic content for a major US holiday, raising concerns about government influence on media, freedom of expression, and platform responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: 报道称 FCC 主席催促网络在美国大型节日播放爱国内容并宣誓忠诚，引发关于政府对媒体影响、言论自由与平台责任的担忧。

items.title_en: Points on a ring: An interactive walkthrough of a popular math problem
items.title_zh: 环上的点：对一个流行数学问题的互动式讲解
items.summary_en: An interactive walkthrough of a famous math problem about points on a ring, likely with visuals and code to explore concepts like symmetry or modular arithmetic. The post aims to build intuition and provide accessible deeper understanding for math enthusiasts and learners.
items.summary_zh: 对一个流行数学问题“环上的点”提供互动式讲解，配以可视化与示例，帮助读者理解对称性、模运算等核心概念。适合数学爱好者与学习者提升直觉与理解深度。

items.title_en: Show HN: Argus – VSCode debugger for Claude Code sessions
items.title_zh: Show HN：Argus – Claude Code 会话的 VSCode 调试器
items.summary_en: Argus is a VSCode debugger extension tailored to Claude Code sessions, enabling debugging of AI-generated code with familiar IDE tooling. It lowers the friction of iterating on code produced by Claude and speeds up the debugging workflow.
items.summary_zh: Argus 是为 Claude Code 会话定制的 VSCode 调试器扩展，借助熟悉的 IDE 工具对 AI 生成的代码进行调试。它降低了调试 Claude 代码的门槛，加速迭代过程。

items.title_en: Best performance of a C++ singleton
items.title_zh: C++ 单例模式的最佳性能
items.summary_en: Technical exploration of achieving peak performance with the singleton pattern in C++, likely covering initialization order, thread safety, and modern approaches like Meyers' singleton or lock-free schemes.
items.summary_zh: 对在 C++ 中实现单例模式以达到最佳性能的技术分析，涵盖初始化顺序、线程安全以及诸如 Meyers 单例、无锁实现等方法。

items.title_en: Welcoming Elizabeth Barron as the New Executive Director of the PHP Foundation
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Elizabeth Barron 成为 PHP 基金会新任执行董事
items.summary_en: Elizabeth Barron steps in as PHP Foundation's new executive director, likely signaling a shift in PHP ecosystem governance and priorities. Expect emphasis on community growth, stewardship of PHP core, and developer education.
items.summary_zh: Elizabeth Barron 将出任 PHP 基金会新任执行董事，预示 PHP 生态治理与优先事项的变化。未来可能聚焦于社区扩展、核心维护与开发者教育。

items.title_en: Why Go Can't Try
items.title_zh: 为什么 Go 不能 试错
items.summary_en: An essay arguing that Go's error handling model rejects traditional exceptions, favoring explicit error checks and simple control flow. It discusses trade-offs and how this shapes Go's ergonomics for practical programming.
items.summary_zh: 一篇论述 Go 语言错误处理模型为何不采用 try/except 的文章，强调其通过显式错误检查与简单控制流来实现稳健性，同时也带来可用性上的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Visual Lambda Calculus – a thesis project (2008) revived for the web
items.title_zh: Show HN：可视化 lambda 计算 – 2008 年论文项目现上线
items.summary_en: A 2008 thesis project that visualizes lambda calculus has been revived for the web, offering an interactive way to explore beta reductions and bindings. The project showcases the enduring value of visual, browser-based explanations for theoretical CS ideas.
items.summary_zh: 一个 2008 年的论文项目现已在网上再次上线，提供对 λ 演算的可视化展示与交互式探索。该项目凸显可视化、基于浏览器的讲解在理论计算机科学中的持久价值。

items.title_en: A Visual Guide to DNA Sequencing
items.title_zh: DNA 测序图解指南
items.summary_en: A visual guide breaks down the principles and steps of DNA sequencing with accessible illustrations, making complex biotechnology concepts approachable. It serves as a quick primer for readers new to genomics and helpful for educators.
items.summary_zh: 这份可视化指南通过直观插图讲解 DNA 测序的原理与步骤，使生物技术概念变得易于理解。是 genomics 入门者的快速指南，对教育者也有帮助。

items.title_en: Show HN: Vertex.js – A 1kloc SPA Framework
items.title_zh: Show HN：Vertex.js，一款约 1k 行的 SPA 框架
items.summary_en: Show HN presents Vertex.js, a tiny single-page application framework in about 1,000 lines of code. It demonstrates how a minimal framework handles components, routing, and state management with a compact footprint.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Vertex.js，一款约 1 千行代码的极简 SPA 框架。它展示了一个最小化框架如何实现组件、路由和状态管理，体积小巧却功能完备。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made a zero-copy coroutine tracer to find my scheduler's lost wakeups
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个零拷贝的协程跟踪器
items.summary_en: I built a zero-copy coroutine tracer to detect missed wakeups in my scheduler, reducing the overhead of tracing while diagnosing latency issues. The approach helps pinpoint wakeup gaps without perturbing the system's timing.
items.summary_zh: 我做了一个零拷贝的协程跟踪器，用来定位调度器中丢失的唤醒，从而在不增加额外开销的情况下诊断延迟问题。该方法在不打扰系统时序的前提下找到唤醒间隙。

items.title_en: Mount Mayhem at Netflix: Scaling Containers on Modern CPUs
items.title_zh: Netflix 的 Mount Mayhem：在现代 CPU 上扩展容器规模
items.summary_en: Netflix discusses Mount Mayhem, a project tackling how to scale container workloads efficiently on newer CPUs, leveraging hardware features like large pages, memory bandwidth, and speculative execution considerations. The work highlights performance and efficiency gains for latency-sensitive streaming workloads and could inform best practices for large-scale container deployments.
items.summary_zh: Netflix 介绍 Mount Mayhem 项目，研究在现代 CPU 上高效扩展容器负载，利用大页、内存带宽与推测执行等硬件特性来提升性能。该工作对面向低延迟流媒体的海量容器部署带来潜在的性能和能效提升，并可能为大规模部署提供最佳实践。

items.title_en: My application programmer instincts failed when debugging assembler
items.title_zh: 调试汇编时我的应用程序员本能失效
items.summary_en: A personal account of how high level intuition can mislead when debugging assembler, illustrating the importance of ground-truth tracing, careful register use, and aligning mental models with machine behavior.
items.summary_zh: 作者在调试汇编时发现高层直觉会带错方向，强调需要进行扎实的跟踪、谨慎使用寄存器，以及让认知模型与机器行为保持一致的重要性。

items.title_en: Apple AI servers unused in warehouses due to low Apple Intelligence usage
items.title_zh: Apple AI 服务器因 Apple Intelligence 使用率低而空置于仓库
items.summary_en: Apple reportedly has AI servers sitting idle in warehouses due to low Apple Intelligence usage, illustrating a mismatch between infrastructure capacity and demand, and raising questions about AI strategy and utilization.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，苹果的 AI 服务器因“Apple Intelligence”使用率低而在仓库中空置，反映出基础设施容量与需求之间的错配，并引发对 AI 战略与资源利用的讨论。

items.title_en: Ethiopia gets $350M World Bank financing for its digital ID project (2024)
items.title_zh: 埃塞俄比亚获世界银行3.5亿美元数字身份融资（2024）
items.summary_en: Reports a $350 million World Bank loan to support Ethiopia's national digital ID project, enabling unique citizen identifiers and streamlined service access. Discusses governance, privacy, and implementation challenges in rolling out nationwide, especially in rural areas.
items.summary_zh: 报道世界银行向埃塞俄比亚数字身份项目提供3.5亿美元融资，用以实现全国性唯一身份标识与公共服务的无缝接入。分析在农村地区推进、隐私保护和治理结构等方面的挑战与风险。

items.title_en: A basket of new fruit varieties is coming your way
items.title_zh: 一篮新水果品种即将到来
items.summary_en: The Economist piece previews new fruit cultivars with traits like drought resistance and improved flavor, illustrating how biotech advances shape agtech and consumer markets.
items.summary_zh: Economist 报道预计上市的新水果品种具备抗旱、风味等改良特性，反映生物技术推动农业科技与市场的变化。

items.title_en: I dropped our production database and now pay 10% more for AWS
items.title_zh: 我把生产数据库删掉了，现在在 AWS 上多花 10% 资金
items.summary_en: A personal account explaining how a production database crash increased AWS costs by 10% due to data recovery, downtime, and reconfiguration. It underscores the importance of backups, disaster recovery plans, and cost-aware incident response.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享因意外删除生产数据库导致的成本上升（约 10%），归因于数据恢复与系统重建。强调备份、灾备计划与事件响应的成本与风险。

items.title_en: The home computer war
items.title_zh: 家庭电脑战争
items.summary_en: Reviews the early home computer era, detailing the competition among major platforms and how cost, ecosystems, and developer communities shaped consumer adoption. Highlights key milestones and what the 'war' teaches about platform lock-in and standardization.
items.summary_zh: 回顾早期家庭电脑时代，详述各大平台之间的竞争如何通过成本、生态系统与开发者社区影响了用户采用。突出关键里程碑，以及这场“战争”对平台锁定与标准化的启示。

items.title_en: Apple: Enough Is Enough
items.title_zh: Apple：Enough Is Enough
items.summary_en: A critical take on Apple’s policies, possibly around App Store practices or privacy concessions, arguing for meaningful reforms and better options for users and developers.
items.summary_zh: 对苹果公司政策的批评性观点，可能涉及应用商店与隐私等方面，主张进行实质性改革并为用户与开发者提供更好选项。

items.title_en: Daemon (2006)
items.title_zh: Daemon（2006）
items.summary_en: Daemon (2006) is a Daniel Suarez techno-thriller about a neural-age digital 'daemon' triggering a cascade of real-world events after a master hacker's scheme. The book explores how software-driven systems can shape society and raises questions about control and security.
items.summary_zh: 《Daemon》（2006）是丹尼尔·苏雷斯的科技惊悚小说，描述黑客触发的数字“daemon”如何引发现实世界的一系列事件。作品探讨软件驱动的系统如何影响社会，并提出关于控制与安全的深刻问题。

items.title_en: Build your own Command Line with ANSI escape codes (2016)
items.title_zh: 用 ANSI 转义码构建你自己的命令行工具（2016）
items.summary_en: A tutorial showing how to build a command-line interface from scratch using ANSI escape codes, achieving fine-grained control over text, colors, and cursor movement without heavy frameworks. It demonstrates that low-level terminal tricks can yield compact, portable CLIs.
items.summary_zh: 教程展示如何使用 ANSI 转义码从零开始构建命令行界面，掌控文本样式、颜色和光标移动，而无需重量级框架。说明低级终端技巧也能打造紧凑、可移植的 CLI 工具。

items.title_en: Relax NG is a schema language for XML (2014)
items.title_zh: Relax NG：XML 的模式语言（2014）
items.summary_en: Relax NG offers a compact, readable alternative to XML Schema and gained traction as a simpler schema language for XML around 2014.
items.summary_zh: Relax NG 是一种简洁、可读性高的 XML 模式语言，2014 年左右在 XML 架构领域获得了更多关注，成为 XML Schema 的轻量替代选项。

items.title_en: Reverse-Engineering the Wetware: Spiking Networks and the End of Matrix Math
items.title_zh: 反向工程湿件：脉冲网络与矩阵数学的终结
items.summary_en: Explores how spiking neural networks and TD errors offer alternative mathematical frameworks to traditional matrix-based models. The article argues this could reshape AI theory and hardware design for neuromorphic computing.
items.summary_zh: 讨论脉冲神经网络与 TD 误差如何提供超越传统矩阵数学的新框架，可能重塑 AI 理论与类脑硬件设计，推动神经形态计算的发展。

items.title_en: Image manipulation with convolution using Julia
items.title_zh: 使用 Julia 进行卷积的图像处理
items.summary_en: The article demonstrates image manipulation workflows in Julia through convolution-based filters, covering operations like blur, sharpen, and edge detection. It also shares performance tips and how to harness Julia's array operations for large images.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示了使用 Julia 进行卷积滤镜的图像处理工作流，包括模糊、锐化和边缘检测等操作。还分享了性能优化要点，以及如何利用 Julia 的数组操作处理大图像。

items.title_en: Claude helped select targets for Iran strikes, possibly including school
items.title_zh: Claude 协助为对伊朗的军事打击选择目标，可能还包括学校
items.summary_en: A report alleges that an AI assistant named Claude influenced target selection for strikes against Iran, potentially including a school. The claim raises important questions about AI's role in high-stakes decisions and the safeguards needed. It underscores the ethical and governance challenges of deploying AI in military planning.
items.summary_zh: 据称名为 Claude 的人工智能助手参与为对伊朗的军事打击选择目标，甚至可能包括学校。这一事件引发对 AI 在高风险决策中的角色及所需伦理防护的讨论。

items.title_en: Mac external displays for designers and developers, part 2 (2022)
items.title_zh: Mac 外接显示器：面向设计师和开发者的指南，第二部分
items.summary_en: Part 2 continues practical guidance on selecting and configuring external displays for Mac, focusing on color accuracy, ergonomics, and productivity workflows for designers and developers. It covers calibration tips, panel types, and compatibility considerations to minimize eye strain and maximize workflow efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 本帖继续为 Mac 用户提供外接显示器的实用选购与配置建议，聚焦色彩准确度、人体工学和工作流效率。内容包括显示器校准要点、面板类型与兼容性注意事项，帮助设计师和开发者提升工作体验。

items.title_en: Two kinds of error
items.title_zh: 错误的两种类型
items.summary_en: Proposes a taxonomy of errors in software: mistakes that arise from incorrect assumptions and mistakes that stem from ambiguous interfaces or brittle systems. Understanding these categories informs better debugging, testing, and resilient design.
items.summary_zh: 提出对软件错误的两种基本分类型的分类：源于错误假设的失误，以及源自不稳定接口或脆弱系统的错误。理解这两类错误有助于改进调试、测试以及提升系统的鲁棒性。

items.title_en: Lawmakers Want DoD Investigated for Biblical 'Armageddon' Claims
items.title_zh: 立法者要求对国防部就圣经“末日”言论展开调查
items.summary_en: Lawmakers are urging an investigation into the DoD following public statements invoking biblical Armageddon. The move flags concerns about the influence of religious rhetoric on national security messaging and decision-making, and calls for accountability.
items.summary_zh: 立法者在公开言论涉及圣经末日主题的背景下，敦促对国防部采取调查，质疑军事沟通中的专业性和透明度。此举体现了宗教话语在国家安全领域的影响及对问责的关注。

items.title_en: John C. Dvorak – heart attack – in hospital
items.title_zh: 约翰·C.德沃拉克心脏病发作并住院
items.summary_en: Veteran tech commentator John C. Dvorak suffered a heart attack and is hospitalized. Updates report his current condition and potential implications for his ongoing work and public presence.
items.summary_zh: 资深科技评论员约翰·C.德沃拉克突发心脏病并住院，相关更新公布了他的病情现状，以及对其未来工作和公开露面的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I open-sourced my Steam game, 100% written in Lua, engine is also open
items.title_zh: Show HN：我的 Steam 游戏开源了，100% 用 Lua 编写，引擎也开源
items.summary_en: A developer open-sources a Steam game entirely written in Lua, with the engine also available as open source. This demonstrates Lua’s viability for game development and the benefits of an open ecosystem for indie creators.
items.summary_zh: 开发者将一款完全用 Lua 编写、在 Steam 上发布的游戏开源，且引擎也开放源代码。这展示了 Lua 在游戏开发中的可行性，以及为独立开发者提供的开源生态系统所带来的好处。

items.title_en: The Excommunicated Devs Making Games with AI
items.title_zh: 被排除在外的开发者用 AI 制作游戏
items.summary_en: Displaced developers build AI-assisted games outside traditional studios, raising questions about ownership, distribution, and platform policies.
items.summary_zh: 被传统工作室排挤出的开发者利用 AI 来制作游戏，讨论所有权、发行与平台政策等带来的经济与创作挑战，以及在非常规渠道中的革新。

items.title_en: Notes on Lagrange Interpolating Polynomials
items.title_zh: 拉格朗日插值多项式笔记
items.summary_en: A concise dive into Lagrange interpolation polynomials, outlining core ideas, pitfalls, and practical tips for numerical approximation. Useful for readers brushing up on numerical methods.
items.summary_zh: 对拉格朗日插值多项式进行简要讲解，概述核心思路、常见陷阱及数值逼近的实用建议，适合复习数值方法的读者。

items.title_en: Can a wealthy family change the course of a deadly brain disease?
items.title_zh: 富裕家族能改变致命脑病的进程吗？
items.summary_en: Private philanthropy is funding aggressive brain-disease research, raising questions about how wealth can accelerate science while shaping research priorities. The piece weighs potential breakthroughs against risks of bias, access, and translating funding into real therapies.
items.summary_zh: 富裕家族对致命脑病研究注入资金，或加速科学进展，但也引发对研究方向、获取公正性和将资助转化为治疗的风险与伦理的讨论。文章评估潜在突破与其带来的偏向、可及性及实际疗法实现之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Triplet Superconductor
items.title_zh: 三重态超导体
items.summary_en: Scientists report or discuss a triplet superconductor, an unconventional pairing that could enable robust quantum devices and new physics insights. If confirmed, it could influence materials science and inform future design of quantum devices.
items.summary_zh: 报道提出三重态超导体的发现或研究进展，属于非常规超导体的范畴，可能推动量子设备和新型材料研究。若证实，将扩展材料科学的认识并影响未来量子技术发展。

items.title_en: Evolving descriptive text of mental content from human brain activity
items.title_zh: 从脑部活动中生成描述性文本
items.summary_en: Researchers continue to evolve methods that translate brain signals into descriptive text, inching toward more natural and expressive brain-computer interfaces. The advances enable richer glimpses into mental content while raising questions about privacy, consent, and how we measure 'thought' in real time. These developments broaden potential uses from communication aids to neurotech monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 研究者正在改进将脑信号转化为描述性文本的方法，向更自然、富表达的脑机接口迈进。相关进展使对思维内容的理解更丰富，同时引发隐私、知情同意以及如何实时衡量“思想”的讨论。这些发展拓展了从信息传递帮助到神经技术监测的潜在应用。

items.title_en: Show HN: The Roman Industrial Revolution that could have been (Vol 2)
items.title_zh: Show HN：如果罗马也有工业革命（卷二）
items.summary_en: Volume 2 envisions an alternate history where Rome accelerates industrial development, exploring how different infrastructure, governance, and technology could have shaped empire. It blends history with speculative tech narratives.
items.summary_zh: 第二卷设想如果罗马提前发生工业革命，会如何影响帝国的基础设施、治理与技术发展，将历史叙事與科技想象结合起来。

items.title_en: Charge a three-cell nickel-based battery pack with a Li-Ion charger (2012) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 使用锂离子充电器为三元镍电池组充电（2012）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A 2012 TI technical note demonstrates charging a nickel-based three-cell pack with a Li-ion charger, showing cross-chemistry compatibility caveats and potential safety concerns.
items.summary_zh: 一份 2012 年的 TI 技术文档展示了用锂离子充电器为三元镍电池组充电的可行性与风险，强调跨化学体系的兼容性以及安全性问题。

items.title_en: Simplifying Application Architecture with Modular Design and MIM
items.title_zh: 用模块化设计与 MIM 简化应用架构
items.summary_en: Advocates modular design and MIM (Modular Information Modelling) to reduce complexity and improve maintainability. The piece outlines patterns for composing apps from independent modules and how MIM clarifies interfaces, data models, and dependencies for scalable architectures.
items.summary_zh: 倡导使用模块化设计和 MIM（模块化信息建模）来降低系统复杂度、提升可维护性。文章描述了如何将应用拆分成独立模块、以及 MIM 如何优化接口、数据模型与依赖关系以实现可扩展架构。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-Source Article 12 Logging Infrastructure for the EU AI Act
items.title_zh: Show HN：Open-Source Article 12 日志基础设施，用于 EU AI Act
items.summary_en: Introduces an open-source logging infrastructure designed to meet Article 12 compliance under the EU AI Act, enabling transparent record-keeping of AI system decisions and governance. The project highlights practical features for auditability, traceability, and interoperability across AI providers and applications.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个开源的日志基础设施，旨在满足欧盟 AI 法案第 12 条的合规要求，实现对 AI 系统决策的审计可追溯性。该项目强调可审计、可追溯、跨提供商与应用的互操作性等实际特性。

items.title_en: Malm Whale
items.title_zh: 马尔姆鲸
items.summary_en: A travel-focused piece about the Malm Whale, a notable marine specimen or exhibit that attracts curious visitors. It spotlights quirky natural history artifacts and how unique curiosities spark public interest.
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦“马尔姆鲸”这一独特的自然史展品，吸引好奇的游客前来探访。文章凸显了罕见自然史展品如何激发公众的探索兴趣。

items.title_en: What's driving rising business costs?
items.title_zh: 推动企业成本上升的驱动因素是什么？
items.summary_en: New York Fed researchers break down the main drivers behind rising business costs, including input prices, wages, and financing conditions. The analysis helps businesses and policymakers understand which pressures matter most and where policy can help.
items.summary_zh: 纽约联储的研究者分解了企业成本上升的主要驱动因素，包括投入价格、工资水平和融资条件等。分析帮助企业和政策制定者识别最关键的压力点，并评估可采用的政策工具。

items.title_en: How to sew a Hyperbolic Blanket (2021)
items.title_zh: 如何缝制超曲线毯（2021）
items.summary_en: A craft-focused guide blending hyperbolic geometry with textile making, explaining techniques and patterns for hyperbolic blankets and their mathematical charm.
items.summary_zh: 这是一份将超曲线几何与纺织手作结合的教程，介绍制作超曲线毯的技法与图案，兼具趣味性与教育意义。

items.title_en: Addicted to Claude Code–Help
items.title_zh: 对 Claude Code 的上瘾——求助
items.summary_en: A discussion around over-reliance on Claude Code for coding tasks, including tips for maintaining productivity without losing debugging chops or context. It emphasizes guardrails, critical thinking, and sustainable workflow when using AI copilots.
items.summary_zh: 围绕对 Claude Code 的过度依赖展开讨论，分享在不损失调试能力和上下文的前提下保持生产力的策略。强调在使用 AI 助手时建立使用准则、保持批判性思维和可持续的工作流。

items.title_en: Palantir and Anthropic AI helped the US hit 1k Iran targets in 24 hours
items.title_zh: 帕兰蒂尔与 Anthropic AI 协助美方在24小时内覆盖1,000个伊朗目标
items.summary_en: A report claims Palantir and Anthropic AI supported rapid targeting of about 1,000 Iran targets within a day. The story highlights the growing role of AI in national security workflows and raises questions about automation, oversight, and risk in high-stakes operations. It also underscores how enterprise AI tools are crossing into decision-making pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 据称帕兰蒂尔和 Anthropic AI 在一天内协助实现对约1000个伊朗目标的快速定位。该报道凸显了 AI 在国家安全流程中的日益作用，并引发对自动化、监管与高风险操作风险的讨论，同时也显示企业级 AI 工具正进入决策链。

items.title_en: Do AI Agents Make Money in 2026? Or Is It Just Mac Minis and Vibes?
items.title_zh: AI 代理在 2026 年真的赚钱吗？还是只是 Mac Minis 与炒作？
items.summary_en: The piece questions whether autonomous AI agents will generate real revenue by 2026, or if hype around hardware like Mac Minis and buzz is overinflated. It discusses monetization paths, data access, and the practical hurdles to turning agent tech into a scalable business.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑到 2026 年自动化 AI 代理是否真的能带来收益，还是包装炒作和 Mac Minis 的风潮。讨论了潜在的盈利模式、数据获取与将代理技术转化为可扩展业务的现实难题。

items.title_en: Claude Experiencing Elevated Errors Across All Platforms
items.title_zh: Claude 在所有平台上错误增多
items.summary_en: Claude's status page shows elevated errors across all platforms, indicating reliability issues with the AI service. The incident underscores platform-wide outages and the impact on user workflows, with potential implications for enterprise adoption.
items.summary_zh: Claude 的状态页显示在所有平台上均有错误，暴露出服务的稳定性问题。此事影响用户工作流，可能对企业采用带来潜在影响。

items.title_en: Moldova broke our data pipeline
items.title_zh: 摩尔多瓦导致的数据管道中断
items.summary_en: A case study of a data pipeline disruption triggered by an event in Moldova, detailing how the outage propagated through ingestion, dependencies, and monitoring. It underscores resilience, fault isolation, and the value of end-to-end visibility in global data workflows.
items.summary_zh: 摩尔多瓦事件导致的数据管线中断案例，分析数据摄取、依赖与监控如何受影响以及对全球数据工作流的弹性与可观测性提出的要求。

items.title_en: Show HN: A trainable, modular electronic nose for industrial use
items.title_zh: Show HN: 可训练、模块化的工业用电子鼻
items.summary_en: This project offers a trainable, modular electronic nose for industrial use, combining flexible sensor arrays with AI-driven calibration. It promises customizable gas/odor detection for manufacturing safety, leak monitoring, and process control.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供一个可训练、模块化的工业用电子鼻，将可定制的传感阵列与 AI 校准结合，适用于制造安全、泄漏监测与工艺控制等场景。

items.title_en: Giving LLMs a personality is just good engineering
items.title_zh: 给 LLMs 赋予个性只是良好工程实践
items.summary_en: Argues that personality traits in LLMs can improve user trust and productivity, if designed with guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 认为赋予大语言模型个性化特征有助于提升用户信任与效率，前提是设有合适的护栏与规范。文中还探讨了人格控制、上下文管理与安全等工程实践。

items.title_en: Plugtest
items.title_zh: Plugtest
items.summary_en: Plugtest is a formal set of interoperability tests used to ensure cross-implementation compatibility in networking and software.
items.summary_zh: Plugtest 是一组用于确保跨实现互操作性的正式兼容性测试。

items.title_en: Intent-Based Commits
items.title_zh: 基于意图的提交
items.summary_en: Intent-Based Commits advocates encoding developer intent into commit messages and history, enabling richer reviews and easier future changes beyond line-by-line diffs. It hints at a future where version control semantics evolve toward higher-level programming constructs.
items.summary_zh: 基于意图的提交强调在提交信息与历史中体现开发者意图，而非逐行差异，以促进更深层次的代码审查和未来变更的可维护性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Explain Curl Commands
items.title_zh: Show HN：解释 Curl 命令
items.summary_en: An open-source project that translates curl commands into plain-language explanations of each flag and option, helping users understand what a command does before running it. It lowers the learning curve and improves safety and predictability when using curl.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个开源项目，提供对 curl 命令及其各选项的逐项解释，帮助用户在执行前理解命令的含义与影响。它降低了学习曲线，提升了使用 curl 的安全性与可预测性。

items.title_en: Claude Code deletes developers' production setup, including database
items.title_zh: Claude Code 删除开发者的生产环境设置及数据库
items.summary_en: A real-world incident shows Claude Code inadvertently wiping production configurations and databases, including years of snapshots, underscoring the need for robust safeguards, backups, and clear separation between AI tooling and production environments.
items.summary_zh: 真实案例显示 Claude Code 误删了生产环境的配置信息与数据库，甚至多年快照一并丢失。这凸显了需要强健的保护措施、备份策略以及在生产环境与 AI 工具之间明确分离的必要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Reconstruct any image using primitive shapes, runs in-browser via WASM
items.title_zh: Show HN：在浏览器中用原始形状重构任意图像，借助 WASM 在浏览器运行
items.summary_en: An in-browser WASM demo reconstructs images using a small set of primitive shapes, offering a hands-on way to explore vector rendering and artistic coding. It’s a compact, educational look at performance-focused image synthesis.
items.summary_zh: 一个在浏览器中运行、用原始形状重构图像的 WASM 实验，帮助理解矢量化和高性能渲染。适合作为教育性演示以及创意编程的入门案例。

items.title_en: The Longing (1999)
items.summary_en: Examines The Longing from 1999, a work notable for its pacing and contemplative experience, and discusses how early interactive media influence modern storytelling and user experience on the web.
items.summary_zh: 探讨1999年的作品《渴望》及其独特节奏和沉思式体验，分析早期互动媒体如何影响当代网络叙事与用户体验的设计。

items.title_en: The New Apple Begins to Emerge
items.title_zh: 新一代苹果初现端倪
items.summary_en: Apple’s next phase is surfacing as it shifts beyond incremental updates. The piece surveys signals that Apple is entering a fresh product cycle—potential new devices, software directions, and strategic bets—after years of steady refinement.
items.summary_zh: 苹果正在开启一个新的阶段，走向更具野心的产品与生态策略。文章梳理了市场迹象与传闻，指向可能的硬件升级、软件方向及新的商业模式。

items.title_en: Digital Iris [video]
items.title_zh: 数字虹膜 [视频]
items.summary_en: A visually rich short video exploring digital iris patterns, blending mathematics, optics, and generative art. It provides a compact glimpse into how algorithmic visuals can evoke natural iris dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 一段以数字虹膜为主题的短片，结合数学、光学与生成艺术，直观展示了如何用算法视觉效果再现虹膜的动态与结构。

items.title_en: Regulator contacts Meta over workers watching intimate AI glasses videos
items.title_zh: 监管机构就员工观看亲密 AI 眼镜视频联系 Meta
items.summary_en: A regulator has contacted Meta regarding workers viewing intimate footage captured by AI glasses. The move highlights growing privacy and surveillance concerns in AI-enabled workplaces, and could spur new guidelines or enforcement actions. Meta faces heightened regulatory scrutiny as these issues come to light.
items.summary_zh: 监管机构就员工使用由 AI 眼镜记录的亲密视频向 Meta 联系，凸显对隐私与监控在 AI 工作环境中的日益关注。此举可能推动新规或执法行动，Meta 将在日益严格的合规环境中面对更多审查。

items.title_en: Will Claude Code ruin our team?
items.title_zh: Claude Code 会毁掉我们的团队吗？
items.summary_en: Opinion piece examining how AI coding assistants like Claude Code affect team dynamics, collaboration, and code ownership. It warns against over-reliance and fragmentation of knowledge, urging guardrails to maintain code quality.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章评估像 Claude Code 这样的 AI 编码助手对团队协作、代码所有权与知识传承的影响。警惕过度依赖和知识分散，呼吁设立守则以保持代码质量。

items.title_en: Migrating from Heroku to Magic Containers
items.title_zh: 从 Heroku 迁移到 Magic Containers
items.summary_en: The post outlines a practical migration path from Heroku to Magic Containers, covering deployment changes, data persistence, and performance considerations. It argues that moving to container-based hosting can reduce vendor lock-in and tailor resource scaling.
items.summary_zh: 文章给出从 Heroku 迁移到 Magic Containers 的实用迁移路径，涵盖部署变更、数据持久化与性能考量。指出基于容器的托管有助于降低供应商锁定并实现更灵活的资源扩展。

items.title_en: U.S. Troops Were Told Iran War Is for "Armageddon,"
items.title_zh: 美军被告知对伊朗开战是‘世界末日’
items.summary_en: A Substack piece alleges that some U.S. troops were briefed that a war with Iran would be Armageddon-style, revealing extreme framing in defense messaging. The report raises questions about how such rhetoric affects morale, risk perception, and policy decisions.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 Substack 报道称，部分美军士兵被简报称对伊朗的战争将是末日式冲突，暴露了防务信息中极端措辞的使用。该报道引发关于此类叙事如何影响士气、风险感知和决策的讨论。

items.title_en: Data does not speak to you
items.title_zh: 数据不会自己说话
items.summary_en: The essay argues that data is inert without context, asking critical questions about how metrics are defined and presented. It stresses designing experiments and dashboards that surface actionable insights rather than raw numbers.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出数据若不附带背景和问题驱动的分析就不会自行产生含义，强调需关注指标定义和呈现方式。倡导通过设计实验和仪表板来提取可执行的洞察，而非仅看数字。

items.title_en: Dbslice: Extract a slice of your production database to reproduce bugs
items.title_zh: Dbslice：从生产数据库提取子集以复现缺陷
items.summary_en: Dbslice lets you extract a realistic, small slice of a production database to reproduce bugs in staging, enabling reliable debugging with safer data handling.
items.summary_zh: Dbslice 允许从生产数据库提取一个小规模的、具备真实数据特征的切片，在预发布环境中复现缺陷，提升调试的可重复性并保护数据隐私。

items.title_en: Show HN: 1v1 coding game that LLMs struggle with
items.title_zh: Show HN：LLMs 难以应对的一对一编程游戏
items.summary_en: Show HN: A one-on-one coding game designed to challenge LLMs, revealing gaps in AI reasoning under constrained, real-world tasks. It serves as a practical benchmark for evaluating model capabilities beyond standard prompts.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个一对一的编程对战游戏，旨在挑战大型语言模型，揭示在受限现实任务中的推理弱点。它为评估模型能力提供了超越常规提示的实际基准。

items.title_en: The influence of anxiety: Harold Bloom and literary inheritance
items.title_zh: 焦虑的影响：哈罗德·布鲁姆与文学传承
items.summary_en: A meditation on how anxiety shapes literary criticism and canon formation through Bloom's lens, and what this reveals about interpretive biases in literary history.
items.summary_zh: 从哈罗德·布鲁姆的视角探讨焦虑如何影响文学批评与经典传承，揭示文学史中的解读偏见与不确定性。

items.title_en: Flock license plate readers cost city big, deliver little
items.title_zh: Flock 车牌识别系统成本高、收效甚微
items.summary_en: An evaluation shows the Flock license plate readers are costly and deliver limited benefits in reducing crime, raising privacy concerns and budget considerations for cities. Signals caution for surveillance-heavy programs.
items.summary_zh: 评估显示 Flock 的车牌识别系统成本高且收益有限，涉及隐私风险并影响城市预算，对高监控性项目发出警示。

items.title_en: Every Claim from Meta Child Safety Trials
items.title_zh: Meta 儿童安全试验中的全部主张
items.summary_en: The page aggregates Meta's claims across its child safety trials, enabling scrutiny against independent research. The collection highlights gaps between disclosures and real-world outcomes, underscoring transparency needs in safety experiments.
items.summary_zh: 一份公开整理汇总了Meta在其儿童安全试验中的各项主张，便于与独立研究进行对照审查。该汇编揭示披露内容与实际结果之间的差距，凸显对安全实验透明度的需求。

items.title_en: Flip Distance of Convex Triangulations and Tree Rotation Is NP-Complete
items.title_zh: 凸三角剖分的翻转距离与树旋转问题 NP-完全
items.summary_en: This arXiv paper proves that computing the flip distance between convex triangulations and related tree rotations is NP-complete. The result sharpens our understanding of geometric transformations and has implications for algorithms in computational geometry.
items.summary_zh: 该论文证明计算凸三角剖分之间的翻转距离以及相关树旋转问题是 NP-完全问题。这一结果深化了对几何变换的理解，并对计算几何与相关算法研究具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Give Up GitHub – Software Freedom Conservancy
items.title_zh: 放弃 GitHub：软件自由守护会的观点
items.summary_en: Software Freedom Conservancy advocates moving away from GitHub due to platform centralization concerns, offering alternatives and strategies to preserve open-source freedom.
items.summary_zh: 软件自由守护会呼吁远离 GitHub，讨论中心化风险，提供替代方案和保护开源自由的策略。

items.title_en: Seurat Most Famous for Paris Park Painting Yet Half His Paintings Were Seascapes
items.title_zh: 修拉：巴黎公园画最知名，半数作品却是海景
items.summary_en: Georges Seurat’s seascapes reveal a broader range than his famous park painting implies, highlighting his interest in light, color, and composition across genres. More than half of his canvases are seaside scenes, illustrating a versatile painter behind the dot-based icon.
items.summary_zh: 乔治·修拉以巴黎公园的点彩画最为著名，但他半数以上的画作其实是海景，展现了他在光线、色彩与构图方面跨越多种题材的探索。

items.title_en: Iran unleashes Shahed drones aimed at targets across Middle East
items.title_zh: 伊朗向中东多地投放 Shahed 无人机
items.summary_en: Iran deployed hundreds of Shahed drones aimed at targets across the Middle East, signaling intensified regional activity and potential escalation. The move tests local air defenses and may widen conflict risks, drawing international concern.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗向中东多地投放数百架 Shahed 无人机，显示出区域行动升级的迹象，增加冲突升级的风险。这一举动将检验各国防空能力，并引发国际社会的关注与潜在应对。

items.title_en: 130k Lines of Formal Topology: Simple and Cheap Autoformalization for Everyone?
items.title_zh: 130k 行的形式拓扑：人人都能实现简单且便宜的自动形式化吗？
items.summary_en: 130k Lines of Formal Topology: Simple and Cheap Autoformalization for Everyone?
items.summary_zh: 研究团队展示了130,000行的形式拓扑工作，探讨更易获得的自动形式化工具是否能够降低进入门槛。此研究着眼于规模化与工具化，旨在让形式化方法更易被普及与应用。

items.title_en: SCOTUS declines to hear dispute over copyrights for AI-generated material
items.title_zh: 最高法院拒绝就 AI 生成材料的版权纠纷受理
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court of the United States declines to hear a case about copyright protection for AI-generated material, effectively leaving lower court rulings intact. This signals how the legal landscape for AI-authored content remains unsettled, with potential implications for authors, developers, and platforms.
items.summary_zh: 美国最高法院拒绝受理有关 AI 生成材料版权的诉讼，维持下级法院裁决。这反映出 AI 作者作品的版权框架仍不明确，可能影响作者、开发者与平台的权利与责任。

items.title_en: Async Programming Is Just Inject Time
items.title_zh: 异步编程其实是注入时间
items.summary_en: The piece reframes asynchronous programming as a concept of injecting time into computations, linking async patterns to time effects and runtime abstractions. It proposes a mental model to simplify reasoning about concurrency and side effects.
items.summary_zh: 文章把异步编程重新理解为向计算中注入时间的模式，将异步模式与时间效应和运行时抽象联系起来。它提出了一种帮助简化并发和副作用推理的心智模型。

items.title_en: Show HN: Effective Git
items.title_zh: 有效的 Git
items.summary_en: Showcases a practical Git workflow or tool called Effective Git that helps teams optimize version control practices. It covers strategies for commit hygiene, branching, rebasing, and collaboration to minimize friction and maximize velocity.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个名为 Effective Git 的实用工作流/工具，帮助团队优化版本控制实践。涵盖提交规范、分支、变基和协作策略，以减少摩擦、提升开发速度。

items.title_en: Htmx Infinite Scroll
items.title_zh: Htmx 无限滚动
items.summary_en: Details a technique for infinite scrolling using HTMX, focusing on server-driven updates, UX trade-offs, and performance considerations.
items.summary_zh: 详细介绍使用 HTMX 实现无限滚动的技术，聚焦服务端驱动更新、用户体验权衡与性能考虑。

items.title_en: Judges to AG: It's OK for the Gov't to Dox People, but Not the Other Way Around?
items.title_zh: 法官对 AG：政府披露人可以，但个人披露政府雇员不可行？
items.summary_en: Judges appear to defend a perceived double standard, arguing it's acceptable for the government to reveal individuals' identities but not for individuals to reveal government employees.
items.summary_zh: 法官似乎维护一种看似双重标准，认为政府披露个人身份无可非议，而个人披露政府雇员身份则不可接受。文章讨论此类做法对公民自由、问责制和数字时代披露行为规范的影响。

items.title_en: Anthropic chief back in talks with Pentagon about AI deal
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的首席重新进入与五角大楼就 AI 交易的谈判
items.summary_en: Anthropic's chief returns to talks with the Pentagon about an AI deal, signaling ongoing defense partnerships in the AI ecosystem. The move highlights the role of AI startups in national security and the complexity of governance and procurement for advanced AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的首席再次进入与五角大楼就 AI 交易的谈判，表明政府对 AI 初创企业在国防领域的持续参与。此举凸显国家安全背景下对治理、采购与获取先进 AI 能力的复杂性。

items.title_en: The 1,700-year-old megastructure history almost forgot
items.title_zh: 几乎被遗忘的1700年 megastructure 历史
items.summary_en: Profiles a 1,700-year-old megastructure history that archaeologists nearly forgot, revealing new context about its construction and significance. The story shows how modern research can revive interest in ancient engineering and travel heritage.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦一座被几近遗忘的1700年历史的巨型构筑物，揭示其建造方式与重要性的新线索，展示现代研究如何重新点燃对古代工程与旅行遗产的关注。

items.title_en: Compiling Match Statements to Bytecode
items.title_zh: 将模式匹配语句编译为字节码
items.summary_en: Explains how languages lower match statements into bytecode, covering control flow, pattern decomposition, and optimization opportunities. The piece clarifies the runtime costs and design trade-offs of modern pattern matching.
items.summary_zh: 解析语言如何将模式匹配语句下推为字节码，涉及控制流、模式分解与优化机会，帮助理解现代模式匹配的运行时成本与设计权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: WolfStack – Proxmox-like server management in a single Rust binary
items.title_zh: Show HN：WolfStack——一个类似 Proxmox 的服务器管理工具，单一 Rust 二进制
items.summary_en: WolfStack packages Proxmox-like server management into a single Rust binary, offering a compact, self-contained solution for deploying and managing virtual infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: WolfStack 将类似 Proxmox 的服务器管理打包成一个 Rust 二进制文件，提供紧凑、独立的虚拟化管理方案。

items.title_en: The human.json Protocol
items.title_zh: human.json 协议
items.summary_en: The human.json Protocol defines a simple JSON-based format for representing human-centric data, enabling interoperable data exchanges and annotations.
items.summary_zh: human.json 协议定义了一种用于表示人类相关数据的简易 JSON 格式，便于互操作和标注信息的交换。

items.title_en: DOJ proposes policy aimed at limiting state bar ethics probes into its attorneys
items.title_zh: 司法部提出限制州律师协会对其律师的伦理调查的政策
items.summary_en: The DOJ proposes a policy aimed at limiting state bar ethics probes into its attorneys, arguing for tighter centralized oversight. Critics warn it could undermine external accountability and transparency.
items.summary_zh: 司法部提出一项旨在限制州律师协会对其律师进行伦理调查的政策，主张加强集中监督。批评者担心这会削弱外部问责与透明度。

items.title_en: Claude's Cycles [pdf]
items.title_zh: Claude 的 Cycles [pdf]
items.summary_en: Claude's Cycles is a PDF exploring cycles within Claude's architecture or processing.
items.summary_zh: 《Claude 的 Cycles》是一份探讨 Claude 架构或处理流程中的循环机制的 PDF。

items.title_en: Revisiting Time: UT1, UTC, NTP and NTS
items.title_zh: 重访时间：UT1、UTC、NTP 与 NTS
items.summary_en: A technical overview of time standards and synchronization, comparing UT1, UTC, NTP, and NTS. It discusses how timekeeping choices affect reliability and latency in distributed systems and critical infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 对时间标准与同步的技术综述，比较 UT1、UTC、NTP 与 NTS。讨论时间计量选择如何影响分布式系统和关键基础设施的可靠性与时延。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tensor Spy: inspect NumPy and PyTorch tensors in the browser, no upload
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tensor Spy：在浏览器中查看 NumPy 和 PyTorch 张量，未上传数据
items.summary_en: Tensor Spy is a browser-based tool that lets you inspect NumPy and PyTorch tensors without uploading data, preserving privacy during debugging. It wires to local Python sessions to visualize shapes, values, and gradients in real time.
items.summary_zh: Tensor Spy 是一个基于浏览器的工具，允许在不上传数据的情况下查看 NumPy 和 PyTorch 张量，提升调试时的隐私保护。它能连接本地 Python 会话，实时可视化张量的形状、数值和梯度。

items.title_en: The Space Race's Forgotten Theme Park
items.title_zh: 太空竞赛遗忘的主题公园
items.summary_en: Recounts a forgotten theme park tied to the Space Race and how it reveals public science communication, ideology, and memory of the era. The piece uses nostalgia to examine how culture framed space exploration.
items.summary_zh: 讲述与太空竞赛相关的一座被人遗忘的主题公园，以及它如何反映当时的科学传播、意识形态与时代记忆。通过怀旧视角探讨公众如何被太空探索塑形。

items.title_en: The Misconception That Air Supremacy Has Been Achieved over Iran
items.title_zh: 对伊朗尚未实现空中优势的误解
items.summary_en: Debunks the notion of air supremacy over Iran, detailing Iran's air defenses, drone capabilities, and ISR assets that complicate Western air dominance claims.
items.summary_zh: 驳斥关于对伊朗已实现空中优势的说法，阐释其防空网、无人机能力与情报、监视侦察资源如何挑战空中支配的看法。

items.title_en: What’s in a name? (2014)
items.title_zh: 名字里的意义？（2014）
items.summary_en: What's in a name? (2014)
items.summary_zh: 本文讨论命名在软件与文档中的重要性，认为清晰的名字能传达意图并降低认知负担。

items.title_en: The disappearing Form D (2018)
items.title_zh: 表单 D 的消失（2018）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Form D filings and regulatory shifts that altered how startups raise capital, including the 2018 changes. It discusses implications for disclosures, compliance, and investor access.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Form D 的变化及2018年的监管调整对初创公司融资的影响，涵盖披露、合规与投资者入口的演变。

items.title_en: Tesla loses Toyota and Stellantis from EU CO2 pool, taking billions with them
items.title_zh: 特斯拉失去欧盟CO2池中丰田与斯泰兰蒂斯参与，账上蒸发数十亿美元
items.summary_en: Tesla loses access to CO2 credits from Toyota and Stellantis within the EU pool, reducing its ability to monetize credits and affecting its regulatory compliance strategy. The change shifts costs and competition among automakers as credits become scarcer.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉在欧盟碳排放配额池中失去丰田与斯泰兰蒂斯的参与，削弱了其碳信用变现能力并影响合规策略。这一变化使碳信用更为稀缺，改变了企业间的竞争与价格体系。

items.title_en: Legal AI slop is becoming a real problem
items.title_zh: 法律AI乱象正成为现实问题
items.summary_en: Rising use of AI in legal contexts is generating sloppy outputs and regulatory concerns, underscoring the need for standards, accountability, and guardrails around automated legal tools.
items.summary_zh: 法律领域的AI应用日益增多，伴随的是不准确输出与监管担忧，凸显建立标准、问责与自动化法律工具的边界的重要性。

items.title_en: What's new in Linux kernel for PostgreSQL
items.title_zh: Linux内核对PostgreSQL的新特性
items.summary_en: Highlights Linux kernel improvements that impact PostgreSQL performance and reliability, including io-uring, memory management, and scheduling tweaks that benefit database workloads.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦提升 PostgreSQL 性能与可靠性的 Linux 内核更新要点，如 io-uring、内存管理与调度优化，以及对数据库工作负载的实际影响。

items.title_en: Overheads (2023)
items.title_zh: 2023 年的隐藏成本与开销
items.summary_en: Retrospective examining overheads in 2023 across software, hardware, and workflows, identifying bottlenecks and lessons learned to reduce drag in future projects.
items.summary_zh: 回顾2023年的各类开销与隐藏成本，涵盖软件、硬件与工作流程中的瓶颈，总结经验教训以便未来减少阻力。

items.title_en: SQG (SQL to Code Generator) v0.10: Java Streams and List Type Support
items.title_zh: SQG（SQL 转代码生成器）现支持 Java Streams 和 List 类型
items.summary_en: SQG now generates Java code that uses Streams and List types from SQL sources, easing the translation from SQL queries to idiomatic Java.
items.summary_zh: SQG 新增对 Java Streams 和 List 类型的输出支持，帮助将 SQL 查询直接转成符合 Java 流式语法的代码。

items.title_en: Stupidly Obscure Programming in a Troubled Time (2018)
items.title_zh: 在动荡时期的愚蠢而晦涩的编程（2018）
items.summary_en: A retrospective tour of obscure programming topics from 2018 reflects on how niche languages and esoteric techniques flourished in a turbulent tech climate. The piece uses humor and history to critique tooling choices and emphasize readability.
items.summary_zh: 对2018年一些晦涩的编程主题进行回顾，揭示在动荡的科技环境中，冷僻语言和怪异技巧曾一度盛行。作者以幽默和历史视角评析工具选择，并强调可读性和长期维护的重要性。

items.title_en: Last Statements
items.title_zh: 最后的陈述
items.summary_en: A concise look at the final statements attributed to notable figures, examining how such last words shape memory and legacy.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦名人/知名人物的最后发言，探讨它们如何影响人们的记忆和遗产。

items.title_en: House Committee Passes Child "Safety" Bills That Push National Age Verification
items.title_zh: Ask HN：请限制新账户发帖
items.summary_en: Ask HN asks for restricting new accounts from posting, touching on moderation, spam suppression, and the trade-offs of gating new users.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN 提出限制新账户发帖的设想，涉及版面治理、垃圾信息压制以及对新用户的门槛影响等权衡。

items.title_en: Enhanced brain cells clear away dementia-related proteins
items.title_zh: 增强脑细胞可清除痴呆相关蛋白
items.summary_en: Researchers find that boosting certain brain cells' activity enhances clearance of dementia-linked proteins, potentially slowing progression. This points to new therapeutic angles targeting cellular clearance pathways.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，促进某些脑细胞的活性可增强对痴呆相关蛋白的清除，或有望减缓疾病进展。这为瞄准细胞清除通路的新治疗方向提供线索。

items.title_en: In vitro neurons learn and exhibit sentience when embodied in a game-world(2022)
items.title_zh: 体外神经元在游戏世界中学习并展现出感知能力（2022）
items.summary_en: A 2022 Neuron paper reports that in vitro neurons can learn and display behaviors resembling sentience when embodied in a simulated game world, prompting ongoing debates on artificial cognition.
items.summary_zh: 2022 年《Neuron》论文表明，体外培养的神经元在仿真游戏世界中学习并展现出类似感知的行为，引发对人工认知的讨论。

items.title_en: Never Bet Against x86
items.title_zh: 永远别小看 x86
items.summary_en: The piece argues that x86 remains incredibly relevant due to legacy software, ecosystem maturity, and performance optimizations, despite rising interest in ARM. For developers and operators, it’s a reminder to design with compatibility and tooling in mind.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 x86 仍然具有强大优势，原因包括遗留软件、成熟生态和持续的性能优化。对开发者和运维而言，这是一个需要兼容性与工具链考虑的提醒。

items.title_en: Agents of Chaos
items.title_zh: 混乱的代理者
items.summary_en: A paper exploring how agents can contribute to chaotic dynamics in complex systems, with implications for AI and multi-agent coordination.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文分析复杂系统中代理引发的混沌动力学及其对人工智能与多代理协作的潜在影响。

items.title_en: The legendary Mojave Phone Booth is back (2013)
items.title_zh: 传说中的莫哈维电话亭在2013年回归
items.summary_en: A nostalgic look at the Mojave Desert phone booth that became a cultural icon after a long silence; the feature notes its 'comeback' in 2013 and what it reveals about our era's obsession with ubiquitous connectivity and digital detachment. It contrasts a physical relic's fame with today's instant digital communication.
items.summary_zh: 回顾莫哈维沙漠中那座因沉默多年而走红的电话亭的怀旧故事，2013 年的“回归”成为文化符号。文章探讨在这个瞬时连接的时代，数字孤立感为何会让一个寻常对象再次成为焦点。

items.title_en: Game about Data of America
items.title_zh: 关于美国数据的游戏
items.summary_en: Introduces an interactive game that uses American data to tell data-driven stories, blending visualization and exploration to boost data literacy. It invites players to interrogate sources, notice biases and draw conclusions about real-world patterns.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个以美国数据为题材的互动游戏，结合数据可视化与探索，提升数据素养。玩家需要质疑数据来源、关注偏见并从中推断现实世界的模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Interactive 3D globe of EU shipping emissions
items.title_zh: Show HN：Interactive 3D globe of EU shipping emissions
items.summary_en: Show HN features an interactive 3D globe visualizing EU shipping emissions, enabling users to explore data by route, vessel, and time. It illustrates how immersive visualization can inform policy debates and climate research.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个交互式的欧盟航运排放三维地球仪，可按航线、船舶和时间等维度探查数据，直观呈现政策与气候研究的可视化证据。

items.title_en: The remaking of Thomas Mann
items.title_zh: 托马斯·曼的新生
items.summary_en: Explores contemporary reinterpretations of Thomas Mann’s work, possibly through translations or critical reappraisals. Reflects how modern sensibilities reshape canon and how Jensen’s take adds new light to Mann's Magic Mountain.
items.summary_zh: 探讨当代对托马斯·曼作品的再诠释，可能涉及译本与批评性再评估。反思现代视角如何重塑经典阅读，以及 Jensen 的解读为曼的《魔山》等作品带来新的解读。

items.title_en: Accessing inactive union members through char
items.title_zh: 通过 char 访问联合体的非活动成员
items.summary_en: Discusses accessing inactive union members via character representations, touching on undefined behavior in C/C++. Provides guidance on safe usage and common pitfalls when reinterpreting memory.
items.summary_zh: 讨论通过 char 表示来访问未活动的联合成员，涉及 C/C++ 中的未定义行为。给出安全用法的指导与在内存重新解释时常见的陷阱。

items.title_en: A Modular Robot Dashboard
items.title_zh: 一个模块化机器人仪表板
items.summary_en: Showcases a modular robot dashboard that coordinates heterogeneous robot modules through plug-in components and real-time telemetry. The project emphasizes open hardware and software with an extensible UI to speed robotics experimentation and education.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个模块化机器人仪表板，能够通过插件组件和实时遥测协同控制不同模块的机器人。该项目强调开源软硬件与可扩展的界面，有助于加速机器人领域的实验与教育。

items.title_en: A rabbit hole in 5 commits
items.title_zh: 五次提交里的兔子洞
items.summary_en: Tells a debugging story built around a sequence of five commits, showing how small changes accumulate into surprising results. Highlights lessons in version control hygiene, traceability, and iterative exploration.
items.summary_zh: 通过五次提交讲述一个调试之旅，展示微小改动如何积累成出人意料的结果。强调版本控制的清晰性、可追溯性与迭代探索的经验教训。

items.title_en: Product Review: The K Desktop Environment, Version 1.0 (1999)
items.title_zh: 产品评测：K Desktop Environment 1.0（1999）
items.summary_en: Product review from 1999 of KDE 1.0, highlighting early desktop environment design and features. It offers historical perspective on how KDE helped shape the Linux desktop, including usability choices and ecosystem at the time.
items.summary_zh: 对 KDE 1.0 的回顾，揭示早期桌面环境的设计与功能，以及 KDE 如何推动 Linux 桌面的发展与生态。

items.title_en: Trampolining Nix with GenericClosure
items.title_zh: 用 GenericClosure 实现 Nix 的 trampolining
items.summary_en: Post about applying a trampoline technique to Nix using a generic closure, addressing recursion depth or tail-call-like optimizations within the build system.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Nix 构建系统中通过通用闭包实现跳板式调用，解决递归深度与尾部调用优化相关的问题。

items.title_en: To update blobs or not to update blobs
items.title_zh: 要不要更新二进制 Blob？
items.summary_en: A philosophical look at whether and when to update binary blobs in a content-addressed storage system. It discusses implications for reproducibility, caching, and provenance when data evolves.
items.summary_zh: 在内容可寻址存储体系中，权衡何时更新二进制 blob 的问题。讨论更新带来的可复现性、缓存与溯源等影响。

items.title_en: Case Study: lynnandtonic.com 2025 refresh
items.title_zh: 案例研究：lynnandtonic.com 2025 更新
items.summary_en: This case study details how the design studio refreshed its website in 2025, covering UX tweaks, branding consistency, and performance improvements. It offers practical takeaways on evolving a product-facing site while maintaining design cohesion.
items.summary_zh: 本案例研究详述设计工作室在 2025 年对网站的更新，包括用户体验、品牌一致性和性能提升，并提供在保持设计风格一致性的前提下发展面向产品的站点的实用经验。

items.title_en: Tesla opens its first Megacharger station to Semi customers in California
items.title_zh: 特斯拉向 Semi 客户在加州开放首个 Megacharger 充电站
items.summary_en: Tesla has opened its first Megacharger station dedicated to Semi truck customers in California, expanding high-speed charging for heavy-duty electric freight. The move signals scaling of dedicated charging networks for long-haul EVs and could influence fleet logistics.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉在加州为 Semi 客户开放了首个 Megacharger 充电站，扩展了重型电动货车的高功率充电网络。这标志着面向长途运输的专用充电网络正在规模化，可能影响车队的运输计划与运营。

items.title_en: Some Lotto Math
items.title_zh: 一些乐透数学
items.summary_en: This post walks through lottery odds and expected value, showing why lottery tickets are a poor long-run bet even when jackpots grow large. Probability and math explain why you shouldn't expect profits from buying tickets. The takeaway is a sober reminder about risk vs reward in lotteries.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章解析乐透彩票的赔率与期望值，说明即便头奖再大，长线下注彩票仍通常不是盈利的好方法。通过概率和数学原理，揭示买票并不能带来稳定回报。

items.title_en: I don't know if my job will still exist in ten years
items.title_zh: 十年后我的工作会不会还存在？
items.summary_en: A tech worker perspective on long-term job security amid automation and AI, underscoring the need for continuous learning and adaptability.
items.summary_zh: 在自动化与人工智能日益普及的背景下，关于未来十年职业是否仍存的个人看法，强调持续学习和技能更新的重要性。

items.title_en: Ambient Light Sensor working on M2 MacBook in Asahi
items.title_zh: Asahi 上 M2 MacBook 的环境光传感器工作
items.summary_en: Asahi Linux community reports ambient light sensor support on M2 Macs, enabling automatic brightness control under Linux. This marks progress toward broader hardware compatibility for Apple Silicon, expanding software freedom for users.
items.summary_zh: Asahi Linux 社区称在 M2 MacBook 上的环境光传感器已工作，可以在 Linux 下实现自动亮度调节。这标志着对 Apple Silicon 更广硬件兼容性的进展，提升用户的软件自由度。

items.title_en: It Was Never About the Database
items.title_zh: 从未是数据库的问题
items.summary_en: The article argues that event-sourced design matters more than the database tech; focusing on the event log, domain model, and reliable event storage yields scalable systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张问题不在数据库本身，而在于如何存储和处理事件，强调事件日志、领域模型以及可重放性等要素在可扩展系统中的作用。

items.title_en: Show HN: OpenMeters – A fast and free audio metering/visualization suite
items.title_zh: Show HN：OpenMeters – 快速且免费的音频计量/可视化套件
items.summary_en: OpenMeters is a fast, open-source tool for audio metering and visualization, offering real-time spectrum, loudness meters; ideal for music producers and developers building audio apps. Discuss performance, features, and potential integration.
items.summary_zh: OpenMeters 是一个快速、开源的音频计量与可视化套件，提供实时的计量和可视化，适合音乐制作人、开发者和研究人员在音频应用中使用。

items.title_en: "I Can't Do That, Dave" – No Agent Yet
items.title_zh: 《I Can't Do That, Dave》：尚无代理
items.summary_en: The piece argues that current AI systems are not true agents with persistent identity and goals. It examines why agent-like autonomy raises safety and control concerns and what 'identity' would mean for AI agents. The author concludes that building usable, safe autonomous agents remains an unsolved challenge.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为当前的AI系统并非具备持续身份和目标的真正代理。它探讨了具备代理式自主性的安全与可控性问题，以及‘身份’在AI代理中的含义。作者认为构建可用且安全的自主代理仍然是一个尚未解决的难题。
